# Ai8051U ж•°жҚ®жүӢеҶҢпјҲе…Ёж–ҮжЈҖзҙўзүҲпјү

> **жқҘжәҗ**: `AI8051U.pdf`  
> **йЎөж•°**: 1979 йЎө  
> **ж–Үд»¶еӨ§е°Ҹ**: зәҰ 70 MB (PDF) / 4.2 MB (ж–Үжң¬)  
> **иҪ¬жҚўж—¶й—ҙ**: 2025-05-29  

---

## дҪҝз”ЁиҜҙжҳҺ

жң¬ж–ҮжЎЈдёә AI8051U ж•°жҚ®жүӢеҶҢзҡ„зәҜж–Үжң¬жҸҗеҸ–зүҲпјҢдҝқз•ҷдәҶеҺҹе§ӢжҺ’зүҲз»“жһ„гҖӮ

**еҝ«йҖҹжЈҖзҙўе»әи®®**пјҡ
- жҗңзҙўеҜ„еӯҳеҷЁеҗҚпјҲеҰӮ `CMPCR1`гҖҒ`T4T3M`гҖҒ`IP2`пјүеҸҜзӣҙжҺҘе®ҡдҪҚеҜ„еӯҳеҷЁжҸҸиҝ°
- жҗңзҙў `дёӯж–ӯ` + жЁЎеқ—еҗҚеҸҜе®ҡдҪҚдёӯж–ӯеҗ‘йҮҸиЎЁ
- жҗңзҙў `дјҳе…Ҳзә§` еҸҜе®ҡдҪҚдёӯж–ӯдјҳе…Ҳзә§й…ҚзҪ®
- жҗңзҙў `еј•и„ҡ` жҲ– `Pin` еҸҜе®ҡдҪҚеј•и„ҡе®ҡд№үиЎЁ
- жҗңзҙў `SFR` еҸҜе®ҡдҪҚзү№ж®ҠеҠҹиғҪеҜ„еӯҳеҷЁжұҮжҖ»

#include "ai8051u.h" //
#include "ai_usb.h" //USB  USB  USB 
// USB  ISP "@STCISP#"
//" ISP "
// USB  ISP  ISP 

void main(void)

{
      EAXFR = 1; //XFR
      WTST = 0; // 0 
      CKCON = 0; // xdata  0 

usb_init();

// USB P3.0, P3.1 USBD-, D+

EA = 1;      //

      while (1)
      {

            printf_usb("Hello World !\r\n");
            // "Hello World !"  USBCDC/HID-
            // \r \n \r\n 
      }
}

2.15                   printf_usb("Hello

            World !\r\n")

 C  printf() C  printf_usb()

2.15.1 printf( )printf_usb( )

#include "ai8051u.h" //
#include "ai_usb.h" //USB  USB  USB 
// USB  ISP "@STCISP#"
//" ISP "
// USB  ISP  ISP 
void main(void)
{

      EAXFR = 1; //XFR
      WTST = 0; // 0 
      CKCON = 0; // xdata  0 

usb_init();  // USB 

// USB P3.0, P3.1 USBD-, D+

EA = 1;      //

while(1)

{

      if(bUsbOutReady)
      { //USB-Device  USB 

            //"bUsbOutReady": HID/CDC 
            //USB  bUsbOutReady "usb_OUT_done();"
            // 1  HID/CDC 
            //

         if(UsbOutBuffer[0]==6)
               printf_usb("HelloWorld!\r\n");
                     // 0  6"HelloWorld"

         else if(UsbOutBuffer[0]==7)
               printf_usb("China!\r\n");
                     // 0  7 "China"

                  usb_OUT_done(); //USB Device 
                        // if(bUsbOutReady) USB 
                        //"usb_OUT_done();"
                        // USB "usb_OUT_done();"
                        //USB 

            }
      }
}

#include "ai8051u.h" //
#include "ai_usb.h" //USB  USB  USB 
// USB  ISP "@STCISP#"
//" ISP "
// USB  ISP  ISP 

// USB 
// 
void USBLIB_OUT_Callback(void)
{ // USB 

      if (UsbOutBuffer[0] == 6)
            printf_usb("Hello World !\r\n");
            // 6 "Hello World !" USBCDC/HID-
            // \r \n \r\n 

      else if (UsbOutBuffer[0] == 7)
            printf_usb("China !\r\n");
            // 7  "China !"  USBCDC/HID-"

}

void main(void)

{
      EAXFR = 1; //XFR
      WTST = 0; // 0 
      CKCON = 0; // xdata  0 

usb_init();  // USB 

// USB P3.0, P3.1 USBD-, D+

set_usb_OUT_callback(USBLIB_OUT_Callback); // USB 
// USBLIB_OUT_Callback / USB 

EA = 1;      //

      while (1);
}

{

   while (i) i--;          //

}

// Ai8051U  USB 

#include <AI8051U.H>          // AI8051U 

#include "intrins.h"          //_nop_(),

                              //_nop_()

                              ////unsigned char cnt;

void Delay500ms(void)         //@40.000MHz
{

      unsigned long edata i;

      _nop_();
      _nop_();
      i = 4999998UL;
      while (i) i--;
}

void main(void)

{                             //XFR
      EAXFR = 1;              // 0 
      WTST = 0;

CKCON = 0;                    // xdata  0 
                              //

P0M0 = 0x00; P0M1 = 0x00;     // P0 
P1M0 = 0x00; P1M1 = 0x00;     // P1 

P2M0 = 0x00; P2M1 = 0x00;     // P2 
P3M0 = 0x00; P3M1 = 0x00;     // P3 

P4M0 = 0x00; P4M1 = 0x00;     // P4 
P5M0 = 0x00; P5M1 = 0x00;     // P5 
P6M0 = 0x00; P6M1 = 0x00;     // P6 
P7M0 = 0x00; P7M1 = 0x00;     // P7 

P40 = 0;                      // LED 
while(1)
{                             // LED 
                              // P0  0 LED
      P0 = 0;
      Delay500ms();

P0 = 0xff;                    // P0  ff LED
Delay500ms();

P00 = 0;                      // P00  0 LED LED0
Delay500ms();                 // P00  1 LED LED0
P00 = 1;

       Delay500ms();

       P01 = 0;            // P01  0 LED LED1
       Delay500ms();       // P01  1 LED LED1
       P01 = 1;
       Delay500ms();

       P02 = 0;            // P02  0 LED LED2
       Delay500ms();       // P02  1 LED LED2
       P02 = 1;
       Delay500ms();

       P03 = 0;            // P03  0 LED LED3
       Delay500ms();       // P03  1 LED LED3

void Delay500ms(void)      //@40MHz

{

   unsigned long edata i;  //

2.22.5 

; P6.0~P6.7  LED 
;
;251 
$INCLUDE(AI8051U.INC)

STACK_POIRTER EQU 0D0H ;

ORG     0000H
LJMP    START
ORG     0100H

START:

SETB EAXFR              ;XFR

MOV WTST, #00H          ; 0 

MOV CKCON, #00H ; xdata  0 

                        ;

MOV SP, #STACK_POIRTER ;

;

CLR A

MOV P0M1, A ; P0 

MOV P0M0, A

MOV P1M1, A ; P1 

MOV P1M0, A

MOV P2M1, A ; P2 

MOV P2M0, A

MOV P3M1, A

MOV P3M0, A

MOV P4M1, A

MOV P4M0, A

MOV P5M1, A

MOV P5M0, A

MOV P6M1, A

MOV P6M0, A

MOV P7M1, A

MOV P7M0, A

MOV P0, #0FFH

;

CLR P40         ;

LOOP:                   ;P00 ~ P07 
      MOV P0, #00H      ;
      ACALL DELAY500MS  ;P00 ~ P07 
      MOV P0, #0FFH     ;
      ACALL DELAY500MS

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 198 -
Ai8051U      : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

CLR P00           ; P6^0  led 
ACALL DELAY500MS  ;
SETB P00          ; P6^0  1 led 
CLR P01           ;
ACALL DELAY500MS
SETB P01          ;
CLR P02
ACALL DELAY500MS  ;500MS;
SETB P02
CLR P03           ;
ACALL DELAY500MS
SETB P03          ;
CLR P04
ACALL DELAY500MS  ;
SETB P04
CLR P05
ACALL DELAY500MS
SETB P05
CLR P06
ACALL DELAY500MS
SETB P06
CLR P07
ACALL DELAY500MS
SETB P07

SJMP LOOP    ; LOOP 

DELAY500MS:  ; 0.5S @40.000MHz

PUSH DR0     ; DR0 R0~R3

MOV WR0, #76 ; WR0  76 R0=R1=

MOV WR2, #19262 ; WR2  19262 R2=R3=

NEXT:

DEC DR0, #1  ;DR0<-DR0-1

JNE NEXT     ;(DR0)0 NEXT -1 0 

POP DR0      ;

RET          ;

END               ;

     #include "AI8H.h"

#define FOSC              11059200UL                   // 2  Keil 
#define BAUD              (65536 - (FOSC/115200+2)/4)  //

char code *STCISPCMD = "@STCISP#";            //
char index;

void uart_isr() interrupt 4
{

       char dat;

   if (TI)
   {

         TI = 0;
   }

   if (RI)                                    //
   {

         RI = 0;
         dat = SBUF;

          if (dat == STCISPCMD[index])        //

          {

                index++;                      //+1

                if (STCISPCMD[index] == '\0') //

                  IAP_CONTR = 0x60;           // ISP

          }

          else

          {                                   //,
                index = 0;

                if (dat == STCISPCMD[index])

                  index++;

          }

   }

}

          void main()
          {

                  P0M0 = 0x00; P0M1 = 0x00;
                  P1M0 = 0x00; P1M1 = 0x00;

AUXR = 0x40;

TL1 = BAUD;
TR1 = 1;
ES = 1;
EA = 1;

index = 0;                 //

       while (1);

#include "ai8051u.h"

#include "ai_usb.h"

/* 2 

     www.STCAI.com  | AiCube-ISP 

     Keil  

     Keil  Keil 

     Ai8051U.h  AI_usb.h  Keil , 

    AI_usb.h  stc32_stc8_usb.h  1 

     Keil_v5\C251\INC\STC  Keil_v5\C51\INC\STC 

     USB  USB  "@STCISP#"

    USB  ISP  USB 

*/

void usb_callback()

{

    USB_SendData(UsbOutBuffer,OutNumber);  //, 

}

void main()

{

    EAXFR = 1;                             //XFR

    WTST = 0;                              //

                                           // 0 

    CKCON = 0;                             // xdata 

                                           // 0 

                                           //

    P0M0 = 0x00; P0M1 = 0x00;              // P0 

    P1M0 = 0x00; P1M1 = 0x00;              // P1 

    P2M0 = 0x00; P2M1 = 0x00;              // P2 

    P3M0 = 0x00; P3M1 = 0x00;              // P3 

    P4M0 = 0x00; P4M1 = 0x00;              // P4 

    P5M0 = 0x01; P5M1 = 0x00;              // P5 

    P6M0 = 0x00; P6M1 = 0x00;              // P6 

    P7M0 = 0x00; P7M1 = 0x00;              // P7 

    usb_init(); // USB  USB 

    /* USB 
        USB_SendData( ) printf_usb( )

         USB 
         USB  USB 

    */

    set_usb_OUT_callback(usb_callback);    //

    EA = 1;          //

    while (1);

}

       P1M1 = 0x00;

WTST = 0;                                        //PLL  24M  2 
                                                 //PLL  48M  4 
CKCON = 0;                                       //PLL  96M  8 
                                                 // PLL
       P0M0 = 0x00;                              // PLL  50us 
       P0M1 = 0x00;                              // 4 ,
       P1M0 = 0x00;                              //,
       P1M1 = 0x00;                              // PLL 
       P2M0 = 0x00;
       P2M1 = 0x00;
       P3M0 = 0x00;
       P3M1 = 0x00;
       P4M0 = 0x00;
       P4M1 = 0x00;
       P5M0 = 0x00;
       P5M1 = 0x00;

       CLKSEL &= ~0x80;
// CLKSEL |= 0x80;

       USBCLK &= ~0x60;
       USBCLK |= 0x00;
// USBCLK |= 0x20;
// USBCLK |= 0x40;
// USBCLK |= 0x60;

       USBCLK |= 0x80;

       delay();

       CLKDIV = 0x04;

       CLKSEL &= 0xf0;
       CLKSEL |= 0x04;

       while (1);
}

void main()                        //XFR
{                                  //(8 )
                                   //
       EAXFR = 1;                  // 0 
                                   // xdata 
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                  // 0 

       WTST = 0;                   //, 0.5s
                                   //, 1s
       CKCON = 0;                  //, 8s
                                   //
    P0M0 = 0x00;
    P0M1 = 0x00;                   //,
    P1M0 = 0x00;                   //,
    P1M1 = 0x00;                   //,
    P2M0 = 0x00;                   //
    P2M1 = 0x00;                   //
    P3M0 = 0x00;                   //
    P3M1 = 0x00;
    P4M0 = 0x00;
    P4M1 = 0x00;
    P5M0 = 0x00;
    P5M1 = 0x00;

// WDT_CONTR = 0x23;
       WDT_CONTR = 0x24;

// WDT_CONTR = 0x27;
       P32 = 0;

    while (1)

    {

//     WDT_CONTR = 0x33;

       WDT_CONTR = 0x34;

//     WDT_CONTR = 0x37;

              Display();
              Scankey();
              MotorDriver();
       }
}

void Initial(void)
{

       UartBusy = FALSE;

   SCON = 0xd0;                // 8 +1 

   AUXR = 0xc0;

   TMOD = 0x00;

   TH0 = HIBYTE(T1MS);

   TL0 = LOBYTE(T1MS);

   TR0 = 1;

   TH1 = HIBYTE(BR(MINBAUD));

   TL1 = LOBYTE(BR(MINBAUD));

   TR1 = 1;

   ET0 = 1;

   ES = 1;

   EA = 1;

}

//Xms

{

              f1ms = FALSE;
              while (!f1ms);
       } while (x--);
}

// CLKDIV = 0x00;

       while (1);
}

12.5.1  1.19V BGV

// 11.0592MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                                         //

#include "intrins.h"                                         //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

#define FOSC                11059200UL                       //,
#define BRT                 (65536 - (FOSC / 115200+2) / 4)
                                                             // 2  Keil 
                                                             //

#define VREFH_ADDR          CHIPID7
#define VREFL_ADDR          CHIPID8

bit  busy;

void UartIsr() interrupt 4
{

       if (TI)
       {

              TI = 0;
              busy = 0;
       }
       if (RI)
       {
              RI = 0;
       }
}

void UartInit()
{

       SCON = 0x50;
       TMOD = 0x00;
       TL1 = BRT;
       TH1 = BRT >> 8;
       TR1 = 1;
       T1x12 = 1;
       busy = 0;
}

void UartSend(char dat)
{

       while (busy);
       busy = 1;
       SBUF = dat;
}

void main()                                                  //XFR
{                                                            //(32 )
                                                             //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                                            //(8 )

// P_SW2 |= 0x80;

       CKCON = 0;                                         // 0

       P1M0 = 0x00;                                       // 1.19V

       P4M0 = 0x00;

       P5M1 = 0x00;

       UartInit();
       ES = 1;
       EA = 1;
       UartSend(VREF_ADDRH);
       UartSend(VREF_ADDRL);

       while (1);
}

void UartSend(char dat)

void main()
{

       char i;

EAXFR = 1;

       EA = 1;

       while (1);

#include "Ai8051U.H"                   //

#include "intrins.h"                   //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

#define  EXRAMB        ((unsigned char volatile far *)0x7f0000)
#define  EXRAMW        ((unsigned int volatile far *)0x7f0000)
#define  EXRAMD        ((unsigned long volatile far *)0x7f0000)

void main()                            //XFR
{                                      //(32 )
                                       //XFR
       char x8;                        //(8 )
       int x16;                        //
       long x32;                       // 0 
                                       // xdata 
       EAXFR = 1;                      // 0 

// P_SW2 |= 0x80;

       WTST = 0;

       CKCON = 0;

P0M0 = 0x00;                           //
P0M1 = 0x00;                           //
P1M0 = 0x00;
P1M1 = 0x00;                           // RAM  0x0100  1  x8
P2M0 = 0x00;                           // RAM  0x0400  2  x16
P2M1 = 0x00;                           // RAM  0x0C00  4  x32
P3M0 = 0x00;                           //Keil  BE(big-endian)
P3M1 = 0x00;                           //
P4M0 = 0x00;
P4M1 = 0x00;                           // x8  RAM  0x0101 
P5M0 = 0x00;                           // x16  RAM  0x040A 
P5M1 = 0x00;                           // x32  RAM  0x0C30 

EXTRAM = 1;
BUS_SPEED = 2;

x8 = EXRAMB[0x0100];
x16 = EXRAMW[0x0200];
x32 = EXRAMD[0x0300];

EXRAMB[0x0101] = x8;
EXRAMB[0x0205] = x16;
EXRAMB[0x030c] = x32;

       while (1);
}

#include <AI8051U.H>          // AI8051U 
#include "intrins.h"          //_nop_(),
                              //_nop_()
                              //

void Delay1ms(void)           //@40.000MHz
{

      unsigned long edata i;

      _nop_();
      _nop_();
      _nop_();
      i = 9998UL;
      while (i) i--;
}

void main(void)

{                     //XFR
      EAXFR = 1;

WTST = 0;             // 0 

CKCON = 0;

// xdata  0 

P0M0 = 0x38; P0M1 = 0x20;

P2M0 = 0x00; P2M1 = 0x00; // P2

// P33P34P35  I/O

// I/O 10011 1100B0x3c P3

//P3M0 = 0x00; P3M1 = 0x3c; // P32P33P34P35 

//P3PU = 0x3c;                     //0011 1100B

P4M0 = 0x00; P4M1 = 0x00; // P4 

P5M0 = 0x00; P5M1 = 0x00; // P5 

P6M0 = 0x00; P6M1 = 0x00; // P6 

P7M0 = 0x00; P7M1 = 0x00; // P7 

Delay1ms();                        // 1ms I/O 

//

EA = 1;                            //

P40 = 0;                           // LED 

while(1)                           //P32  LED02 
{                                  //P32  LED02 

      if(P32 == 0) P02 = 0;
      else P02 = 1;

        if(P33 == 0) P03 = 0;      //P33  LED03 
        else P03 = 1;              //P33  LED03 

        if(P34 == 0) P04 = 0;      //P34  LED04 
        else P04 = 1;              //P34  LED04 

            if(P35 == 0) P05 = 0;  //P35  LED05 
            else P05 = 1;          //P35  LED05 
      }
}

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 693 -

CHECKP34:

P34ISHIGH:            ;P34  LED04

CHECKP35:

P35ISHIGH:            ;P35  LED05 
      SETB P0.5       ;
      SJMP MAINLOOP

P35ISLOW:             ;P35  LED05 
      CLR P0.5

SJMP MAINLOOP         ;

DELAY1MS:             ;@40.000MHz
      PUSH DR0

      MOV WR2, #9998

NEXT:      DR0, #1
      DEC  NEXT
      JNE  DR0
      POP
      RET

#include "intrins.h"         //_nop_(),
                             //_nop_()
bit keyok;                   //

void Delay1ms(void)          //
{
                             //@40.000MHz 1ms
      unsigned long edatai;

      _nop_();               // x(ms)
      _nop_();
      _nop_();
      i = 9998UL;
      while (i) i--;
}

void DelayXms(int n)
{

      while (n--)
            Delay1ms();

}

void DelayXus(int n)         //@40.000MHz, x(us)
{

      unsigned long edatai;

      while (n--)
      {

            i = 8UL;
            while (i) i--;
      }
}

{
}

void OtherEvent(void)           //
{                               // 10ms

void Beep(int tone)             //
{                               //,

      int i;

      for (i = 0; i < 50; i++)  //
      {                         //()
                                //
            P50 = 1;            //
            DelayXus(tone);
            P50 = 0;
            DelayXus(tone);
      }
}

void KeyEvents(void)            //
{                               //
                                //
      if (keyok)
      {

            keyok = 0;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 747 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      switch (keycode)    //

      {

      case 0: Beep(956); break; //Key0 , Do
                                          // 956 956us 

                          // 1000000/(956+956)=523Hz
                          // 8  Do 261.6Hz*2

      case 1: Beep(851); break; //Key1 , Re
                                          // 851 851us 

      case 2:                          // 1000000/(851+851)=587Hz
                                       // 8  Re 293.6Hz*2
               Beep(758); break; //Key2 , Mi

                          // 758 758us 
                          // 1000000/(758+758)=660Hz

                                          // 8  Mi 329.6Hz*2
      case 3: Beep(716); break; //Key3 , Fa

                          // 716 716us 
                          // 1000000/(716+716)=698Hz

      case 4:                          // 8  Fa 349.2Hz*2
               Beep(638); break; //Key4 , So

                                       // 638 638us 
                                       // 1000000/(638+638)=784Hz
                                       // 8  So 392Hz*2

      case 5: Beep(568); break; //Key5 , La
                                          // 568 568us 

                          // 1000000/(568+568)=880Hz
                          // 8  La 440Hz*2

      case 6: Beep(506); break; //Key6 , Si
                                          // 506 506us 

      case 7:                          // 1000000/(506+506)=988Hz
                                       // 8  Si 493.8Hz*2
               Beep(478); break; //Key7 , Do
                                       // 478 478us 
                                       // 1000000/(478+478)=1046Hz

                          // 8  Do 261.6Hz*2*2

      }

   }

}

}                              // P0 
P0 = 0xff;

{                              //

}

P1M1 = 0x00;

#include "Ai8051U.H"                   //

#include "intrins.h"                   //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

void I2C_Isr() interrupt 24            //
{                                      //

       if (I2CMSST & 0x40)

              I2CMSST &= ~0x40;
              P10 = !P10;
       }
}

P5M1 = 0x00;

void int0_isr(void) interrupt INT0_VECTOR
{

      int0_flag = 1; // int0_flag  1  INT0 
                        // 1 INT0  INT0 

      if(INT0)              //
      {
                            // P00  LED 
            P00 = 0;        //
            _nop_();        // LED 
            P00 = 1;
      }                     // P07  LED 
      else                  //
      {                     // LED 
            P07 = 0;
            _nop_();
            P07 = 1;
      }
}

void int1_isr(void) interrupt INT1_VECTOR
{

      int1_flag = 1; // int1_flag  1  INT1 
                        // 1 INT1  INT1 

      P04 = 0;              // P04  LED 
      _nop_();              //
      P04 = 1;              // LED 
}

h) 

; INT0  INT1  USB 

$INCLUDE(AI8051U.INC)     ; AI8051U 

;------------------------------------------------

ORG 0000H                 ;
LJMP START                ;

ORG 0003H                 ;INT0 
LJMP INT0_ISR             ; INT0 

ORG 0013H                 ;INT1 
LJMP INT1_ISR             ; INT1 

;------------------------------------------------

ORG 0100H

INT0_ISR:                 ;INT0 

JNB INT0, P32ISLOW ;

P32ISHIGH:                ; P00  LED 
      CLR P0.0            ;
      NOP                 ; LED 
      SETB P0.0           ; INT0 
      SJMP INT0_ISR_EXIT

P32ISLOW:                 ; P07  LED 
      CLR P0.7            ;
      NOP                 ; LED 
      SETB P0.7

INT0_ISR_EXIT:            ;
      RETI

;------------------------------------------------

INT1_ISR:                 ;INT1 
      CLR P0.4            ; P04  LED 
      NOP                 ;
      SETB P0.4           ; LED 
      RETI                ;

;------------------------------------------------

MOV     A, #0CH
MOV     @DR0, R11

      CLR IT0       ; INT0 
; SETB IT0          ; INT0

#include <AI8051U.H>  //_nop_(),
#include "intrins.h"  //_nop_()
                      //

bit int2_flag = 0; // 1 INT2  INT2 
//  INT2  INT2 
bit int3_flag = 0; // 1 INT3  INT3 
//  INT3  INT3 

void main (void)

{                     //XFR
      EAXFR = 1;

WTST = 0;             // 0 
CKCON = 0;            // xdata  0 
                      //

P0M0 = 0x00; P0M1 = 0x00;

P1M0 = 0x00; P1M1 = 0x00;

P2M0 = 0x00; P2M1 = 0x00;  //P36P37 
P3M0 = 0x00; P3M1 = 0x00;

P4M0 = 0x00; P4M1 = 0x00;

P5M0 = 0x00; P5M1 = 0x00;

P6M0 = 0x00; P6M1 = 0x00;

P7M0 = 0x00; P7M1 = 0x00;

P3PU = 0xc0;          //P36P37 
AUXINTIF = 0x00;      // INT2INT3 
EX2 = 1;              // INT2 
EX3 = 1;              // INT3 

EA = 1;               //
P40 = 0;              // LED 

P36 = 1;              //INT2  I/O 
NOP12();              //
P36 = 0;              // INT2 
NOP12();              //
NOP12();              //

P37 = 1;              //INT3  I/O 
NOP12();              //
P37 = 0;              // INT3 
NOP12();              //
NOP12();              //

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 823 -
Ai8051U         : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

   P37 = 1;                     //
   NOP12();                     //
   NOP12();                     //

   while(1)

   {

      if(int2_flag) //INT2  INT2 

      {

                int2_flag = 0;  // 0INT2 
                _nop_();        //

                _nop_();

      }

      if(int3_flag) //INT3  INT3 

      {                         // 0INT3 
            int3_flag = 0;

                _nop_();        //

                _nop_();

      }

   }

}

void int2_isr(void) interrupt INT2_VECTOR
{

      int2_flag = 1; // int2_flag  1  INT2 
                        // 1 INT2  INT2 

      P00 = 0;                  // P00  LED 
      NOP12();                  //
      P00 = 1;                  // LED 
}

void int3_isr(void) interrupt INT3_VECTOR
{

      int3_flag = 1; // int3_flag  1  INT3 
                        // 1 INT3  INT3 

      P07 = 0;                  // P07  LED 
      _nop_();                  //
      P07 = 1;                  // LED 
}

void TM0_Isr() interrupt 1             //
{

       P10 = !P10;
}

void main()                            //XFR
{                                      //(32 )
                                       //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                      //(8 )
                                       //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                      // 0 
                                       // xdata 
       WTST = 0;                       // 0 

       CKCON = 0;

P0M0 = 0x00;
P0M1 = 0x00;
P1M0 = 0x00;
P1M1 = 0x00;
P2M0 = 0x00;
P2M1 = 0x00;
P3M0 = 0x00;
P3M1 = 0x00;
P4M0 = 0x00;
P4M1 = 0x00;
P5M0 = 0x00;
P5M1 = 0x00;

TMOD = 0x00;                           // 0
TL0 = 0x66;                            //65536-11.0592M/12/1000
TH0 = 0xfc;
TR0 = 1;                               //
ET0 = 1;                               //
EA = 1;

       while (1);
}

// T11CR = 0x18;                    //(T11PS+1)

       T11PS = 0;                   // 11 
       T11L = T11MS1T;
       T11H = T11MS1T >> 8;         // P1.5  11 
       T11CR |= 0x82;
       EA = 1;

      //
       T11CR |= 0x20;

       while (1)
       {

              P11 = ~P11;

             // PD 
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              PCON = 0x02;
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
       }
}

void Timer0_Isr(void) interrupt TMR0_VECTOR // 0 

{

   P00 = ~P00; //P00 

                 //

                 //

   t0_flag = 1; // t0_flag  1  T0 

                 // 1 0  0

// 0 TMR0_VECTOR  AI8051U.H  1

void Timer0_Init(void)  // 0 2 @40.000MHz

{

   TM0PS = 0x65;        // ( :, )

   AUXR &= 0x7F;        // 12T 

   TMOD &= 0xF0;        //

   TL0 = 0xB1;          //

   TH0 = 0x00;          //

   TF0 = 0;             // TF0 

   TR0 = 1;             // 0 

   ET0 = 1;             // 0 

}

void Timer1_Isr(void) interrupt TMR1_VECTOR

{

   P07 = ~P07;          //P07 

                        //
                        //

   t1_flag = 1;         // t1_flag  1  T1 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 910 -
Ai8051U                 : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

                        // 1 1  1 

}

// 1 TMR1_VECTOR  AI8051U.H  3

void Timer1_Init(void)  // 1 500 @40.000MHz

{

   TM1PS = 0x19;        // ( :, )

   AUXR &= 0xBF;        // 12T 

   TMOD &= 0x0F;        //
   TL1 = 0x99;          //

   TH1 = 0x05;          //

   TF1 = 0;             // TF1 
   TR1 = 1;             // 1 

   ET1 = 1;             // 1 

}

void sys_init(void)     //
{
                        //XFR
      EAXFR = 1;        // 0 
      WTST = 0;
      CKCON = 0;        // xdata  0 

      P0M0 = 0x00; P0M1 = 0x00;  // P0 
      P1M0 = 0x00; P1M1 = 0x00;  // P1 
      P2M0 = 0x00; P2M1 = 0x00;  // P2 
      P3M0 = 0x00; P3M1 = 0x00;  // P3 
      P4M0 = 0x00; P4M1 = 0x00;  // P4 
      P5M0 = 0x00; P5M1 = 0x00;  // P5 
      P6M0 = 0x00; P6M1 = 0x00;  // P6 
      P7M0 = 0x00; P7M1 = 0x00;  // P7 
}

void main(void)

{

   sys_init(); //

   usb_init(); // USB  USB 
   /* USB 

        USB_SendData( ) printf_usb( )
        USB 

        USB  USB 

   */

   EA = 1;                       //

   Timer0_Init();                // 0 
   Timer1_Init();                // 1

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 911 -
Ai8051U            : www.STCAI.com       MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

   while(1)        // T0/T1 

   {

      if(t0_flag) // 0  0 

      {                    // 0T0 
            t0_flag = 0;

             printf_usb("Timer0\r\n");
             // USB-CDC "Timer0" T0 

      }            // 1  1 
      if(t1_flag)

      {

             t1_flag = 0;  // 0T1 

             printf_usb("Timer1\r\n");

             // USB-CDC "Timer1" T1 

      }

   }

}

a) main.c -- 

//main.c             // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 
//
#include "config.h"

void main()                      //
{
                                 // 1ms 
      SYS_Init();
      while (1)                  // 1ms  1ms 
      {                          //
                                 //
            if (f1ms)            //LED 
            {
                                 // 500ms 
                  f1ms = 0;
                  ScanKey();     // 500ms  500ms 
                  KeyEvents();   // RTC 
                  ScanLed();     // LED  RTC 
            }
            if (f500ms)
            {
                  f500ms = 0;
                  RTC_Update();
                  RTC_Show();
            }
      }
}

void SYS_Init(void)              //
{
                                 // XFR
      EAXFR = 1;                 //
      WTST = 0x00;               // XDATA
      CKCON = 0x00;

P0M0 = 0x00; P0M1 = 0x00;        // P0 
P1M0 = 0x00; P1M1 = 0x00;        // P1 
P2M0 = 0x00; P2M1 = 0x00;        // P2 
P3M0 = 0x00; P3M1 = 0x00;        // P3 
P4M0 = 0x00; P4M1 = 0x00;        // P4 
P5M0 = 0x01; P5M1 = 0x00;        // P5.0 , 
P6M0 = 0x00; P6M1 = 0x00;        // P6 
P7M0 = 0x00; P7M1 = 0x00;        // P7 

usb_init();                      //USB 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 938 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      Led_Init();              //LED 
      Timer0_Init();           // 0 , 1ms  500ms 
      Timer1_Init();           // 1 ,,
      RTC_Init();              // RTC 

      EA = 1;                  //
}

b) key.c -- 

//key.c                        // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 
//
#include "config.h"

bit fKeyOK;                    //
bit fKeyHold;                  //, 2 ,
BYTE bKeyCode;                 //,
BYTE bDebounce;                //
WORD wHoldCount;               //

void ScanKey()                 // ( 1ms !!!)
{                              //

      BYTE key;

key = 0xff;                    //
P0 = 0xff;                     //P0 ,
P06 = 0; P07 = 1;              // 1 (P0.6)
_nop_();                       // 2  nop 
_nop_();
if (!P00) key = 0;             // 1  1 
else if (!P01) key = 1;        // 1  2 
else if (!P02) key = 2;        // 1  3 
else if (!P03) key = 3;        // 1  4 
else                           //
{
                               // 2 (P0.7)
      P07 = 0; P06 = 1;        // 2  nop 
      _nop_();
      _nop_();                 // 2  1 
      if (!P00) key = 4;       // 2  2 
      else if (!P01) key = 5;  // 2  3 
      else if (!P02) key = 6;  // 2  4 
      else if (!P03) key = 7;
}                              // P0 
P0 = 0xff;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 939 -
Ai8051U                  : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

if (key != bKeyCode)                 //
{
                                     //
      fKeyOK = 0;                    //
      fKeyHold = 0;                  //
      bKeyCode = key;                //( 20ms)
      bDebounce = 20;                //( 2000ms,
      wHoldCount = 2000;             //)

}                                    //
else
{                                    //

      if (bDebounce != 0)            //
      {

            if (--bDebounce == 0)
            {

                  fKeyOK = 1;
            }
      }

            if (--wHoldCount == 0)   //
            {
                                     //, 100ms 
                  wHoldCount = 100;  //
                  fKeyHold = 1;      //
                  fKeyOK = 1;
            }
      }
}

void KeyEvents()                     // ( 1ms !!!)
{                                    //
                                     //
      if (fKeyOK)
      {

            fKeyOK = 0;

SetLed(0, bKeyCode, 0);              // LED  0 
BeepOn(bKeyCode);                    //

if (fKeyHold)                        //
{                                    //
                                     //
      fKeyHold = 0;
      switch (bKeyCode)              // 4, RTC 
      {
      case 4:

            RTC_SetUp();
            break;
      case 5:

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 940 -
Ai8051U              : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

                     RTC_SetDown(); // 5, RTC 

                     break;

            }

      }

      else                     //

      {                        //
            switch (bKeyCode)

            {

            case 0:

                     RTC_SetMode(); // 0, RTC 

                     break;

            case 4:

                     RTC_SetUp(); // 4, RTC 

                     break;

            case 5:
                  RTC_SetDown(); // 5, RTC 

                     break;

            }

      }

   }

}

 c) led.c --  LED 

//led.c
// 74HC595  LED 
// LED  8  SEG  8  COM  LED
// LED 

#include "config.h"          // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 

sbit DAT = P3^4;             //74HC595 
sbit SCK = P3^2;             //74HC595 ,
sbit RCK = P3^5;             //74HC595 ,

#define LED_OFF 0x00           // LED ,LED ,
#define LED_POINT 0x80         // SEG  0  8 
                               // LED 

BYTE ShowIndex;                //LED (8 )
BYTE LedBuf[8];                //8  LED 

BYTE code LED_PATTERN[10] =    // LED  0~9 
{                              //

      0x3F, //0

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 941 -
Ai8051U              : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      0x06, //1
      0x5B, //2
      0x4F, //3
      0x66, //4
      0x6D, //5
      0x7D, //6
      0x07, //7
      0x7F, //8
      0x6F, //9
};

void Shift_74HC595(BYTE dat)   // 74HC595
{

      BYTE i;

      for (i = 0; i < 8; i++)  //( 8Bit)
      {
                               // CY
            dat <<= 1;         // 74HC595 
            DAT = CY;          //74HC595 
            SCK = 0;           // 2 
            _nop_();
            _nop_();           //74HC595 ,
            SCK = 1;
      }
}

void Output_74HC595(void)      //74HC595 
{
                               //74HC595 
      RCK = 0;                 // 2 
      _nop_();
      _nop_();                 //74HC595 ,
      RCK = 1;
}

void Led_Init(void)            //LED 
{                              // 74HC595 

      DAT = 0;
      RCK = 0;
      SCK = 0;

LedBuf[0] = LED_OFF;           // LED ,
LedBuf[1] = LED_OFF;
LedBuf[2] = LED_OFF;
LedBuf[3] = LED_OFF;
LedBuf[4] = LED_OFF;
LedBuf[5] = LED_OFF;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 942 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com            MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

   LedBuf[6] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[7] = LED_OFF;

      ShowIndex = 0;         //
}

void ScanLed(void)           //LED , ( 1ms !!!)

{
      Shift_74HC595(LedBuf[ShowIndex]); // LED  74HC595

   Shift_74HC595(~(1 << ShowIndex)); // LED  COM  74HC595

   Output_74HC595();         // 74HC595  COM  LED 

      if (++ShowIndex >= 8)  //
      ShowIndex = 0;         //
}

void SetLed (BYTE nIndex,    // LED ,nIndex:,0~7  8 

             BYTE nNum,      //nNum:, 0~9,

             BOOL bShowPoint //bShowPoint:

             )

{

   if (nIndex < 8)           // 0~7

   {

      if (nNum < 10)         // 0~9

             LedBuf[nIndex] = LED_PATTERN[nNum]; // LED 

      else

             LedBuf[nIndex] = LED_OFF;          //

            if (bShowPoint)                     //
                  LedBuf[nIndex] |= LED_POINT;  //,

      }
}

int cnt500;                 //500 , 500ms 

void Timer0_Init(void)      //1 @40.000MHz
{
                            // 0  1T 
      AUXR |= 0x80;         // 0  0
      TMOD &= 0xF0;         // 0 
      TL0 = 0xC0;           // 0 
      TH0 = 0x63;           // TF0 
      TF0 = 0;              // 0 
      TR0 = 1;              // 0 
      ET0 = 1;

      cnt500 = 0;           // 500 
      f1ms = 0;             // 1m 
      f500ms = 0;           // 500ms 
}

void Timer1_Init(void)      //@40.000MHz
{
                            // 1  12T 
      AUXR &= ~0x40;        // 1  0
      TMOD &= 0x0F;         // 1 
      TL1 = 0x00;           // 1 
      TH1 = 0x00;           // TF1 
      TF1 = 0;              // 1 
      TR1 = 1;              // 1 
      ET1 = 1;

      fBeepEn = 0;          //
}

void Timer0_Isr(void) interrupt 1 // 0 

{

   f1ms = 1;                // 1ms 

      if (cnt500++ >= 500)  // 500 
      {
                            //,
            cnt500 = 0;     // 500ms 
            f500ms = 1;
      }
}

void Timer1_Isr(void) interrupt 3 // 1 

{

   if (fBeepEn)             //
         P50 = !P50;        // P5.0

   else

}

//rtc.c
// RTC

//RTC  RTC 

#include "config.h"        // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 

bit fToggle;               //0.5 ->1 (),
BYTE bHour;                //RTC 
BYTE bMinute;              //RTC 
BYTE bSecond;              //RTC 

BYTE bMode;                //RTC 
                           //0:
                           //1:
                           //2:
                           //3:

void RTC_Init()            //RTC 
{                          // 12:30:00

      bHour = 12;          // RTC 
      bMinute = 30;        //
      bSecond = 0;
      bMode = 0;
      fToggle = 0;
}

void RTC_Update()                 //RTC , ( 500ms !!!)
{                                 //

      fToggle = !fToggle;

if ((fToggle == 1) &&             // 1 , RTC 
   (bMode == 0))
                                        // 1, 60
{                                       //
      if (++bSecond >= 60)              // 1, 60
      {                                 //
            bSecond = 0;
            if (++bMinute >= 60)
            {
                  bMinute = 0;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 945 -
Ai8051U             : www.STCAI.com          MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

                        if (++bHour >= 24)  // 1, 24
                        {                   //

                              bHour = 0;
                        }
                  }
            }
      }
}

void RTC_Show()                             //RTC ,

{

   switch (bMode)                           // RTC 

   {

   case 0:                                  //

      SetLed(2, (BYTE)(bHour / 10), 0);     // 2 

      SetLed(3, (BYTE)(bHour % 10), 1);     // 3 

      SetLed(4, (BYTE)(bMinute / 10), 0);   // 4 

      SetLed(5, (BYTE)(bMinute % 10), 1); // 5 

      SetLed(6, (BYTE)(bSecond / 10), 0);   // 6 

      SetLed(7, (BYTE)(bSecond % 10), 0); // 7 

      break;

   case 1:                                  // RTC 

      if (fToggle)                          //

      {

            SetLed(2, (BYTE)(bHour / 10), 0); // 2 

            SetLed(3, (BYTE)(bHour % 10), 1); // 3 

      }

      else

      {

            SetLed(2, -1, 0);               // 2 ,

            SetLed(3, -1, 1);               // 3 

      }

      SetLed(4, (BYTE)(bMinute / 10), 0);   // 4 

      SetLed(5, (BYTE)(bMinute % 10), 1); // 5 

      SetLed(6, (BYTE)(bSecond / 10), 0);   // 6 

      SetLed(7, (BYTE)(bSecond % 10), 0); // 7 

      break;

   case 2:                                  // RTC 

      SetLed(2, (BYTE)(bHour / 10), 0);     // 2 

      SetLed(3, (BYTE)(bHour % 10), 1);     // 3 

      if (fToggle)                          //

      {

            SetLed(4, (BYTE)(bMinute / 10), 0); // 4 

            SetLed(5, (BYTE)(bMinute % 10), 1); // 5 

      }

      else

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 946 -
Ai8051U                 : www.STCAI.com     MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      {

            SetLed(4, -1, 0);              // 4 ,

            SetLed(5, -1, 1);              // 5 

      }

      SetLed(6, (BYTE)(bSecond / 10), 0);  // 6 

      SetLed(7, (BYTE)(bSecond % 10), 0); // 7 

      break;

   case 3:                                 // RTC 

      SetLed(2, (BYTE)(bHour / 10), 0);    // 2 

      SetLed(3, (BYTE)(bHour % 10), 1);    // 3 

      SetLed(4, (BYTE)(bMinute / 10), 0);  // 4 

      SetLed(5, (BYTE)(bMinute % 10), 1); // 5 

      if (fToggle)                         //

      {

            SetLed(6, (BYTE)(bSecond / 10), 0); // 6 

            SetLed(7, (BYTE)(bSecond % 10), 0); // 7 

      }

      else

            SetLed(7, -1, 0);              // 7 

      }

      break;

   }

}

void RTC_SetMode()             //RTC 
{
                               //RTC (0:->1:->
      if (++bMode > 3)         //2:->3:->0:->...)
                               // RTC  3, RTC 
      bMode = 0;
}

void RTC_SetUp()               //RTC 
{
                               //,
      if (bMode == 0)          //
            return;

   switch (bMode)              ////
   {
   case 1:                     //
                               //
         if (++bHour >= 24)    //
               bHour = 0;
                               //
         break;                //
   case 2:

         if (++bMinute >= 60)

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 947 -
Ai8051U                : www.STCAI.com   MCU   139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

            bMinute = 0;    //
      break;
case 3:                     //
      if (++bSecond >= 60)  //
                            //
            bSecond = 0;
      break;
}

      fToggle = 1;          //, 500ms
      RTC_Show();           //
}

void RTC_SetDown()          //RTC 
{
                            //,
      if (bMode == 0)       //
      return;

switch (bMode)              ////
{
case 1:                     //
                            //
      if (--bHour >= 24)    //
            bHour = 23;
                            //
      break;                //
case 2:                     //

      if (--bMinute >= 60)  //
            bMinute = 59;   //
                            //
      break;
case 3:

      if (--bSecond >= 60)
            bSecond = 59;

      break;
}

      fToggle = 1;          //, 500ms
      RTC_Show();           //
}

//beep.c
//
//
// P5.0 
//
//

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 948 -
Ai8051U              : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

#include "config.h"      // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 

// Do/Re/Mi/Fa/So/La/Si/Do  8  1 
//,*2
#define BEEP_DO (WORD)(65536 - (float)FOSC / 12 / (261.6 * 2))
#define BEEP_RE (WORD)(65536 - (float)FOSC / 12 / (293.6 * 2))
#define BEEP_MI (WORD)(65536 - (float)FOSC / 12 / (329.6 * 2))
#define BEEP_FA (WORD)(65536 - (float)FOSC / 12 / (349.2 * 2))
#define BEEP_SO (WORD)(65536 - (float)FOSC / 12 / (392.0 * 2))
#define BEEP_LA (WORD)(65536 - (float)FOSC / 12 / (440.0 * 2))
#define BEEP_SI (WORD)(65536 - (float)FOSC / 12 / (493.8 * 2))
#define BEEP_DOH (WORD)(65536 - (float)FOSC / 12 / (523.2 * 2))

bit fBeepEn;               //

void BeepOn(BYTE bBeep)    //

{

   switch (bBeep)          //,

   {

   case 0:                 // 0 , Do 

      TL1 = BEEP_DO;       // Do  8  1 

      TH1 = BEEP_DO >> 8; // Do  8  1 

      break;

   case 1:                 // 1 , Re 

      TL1 = BEEP_RE;       // Re  8  1 

      TH1 = BEEP_RE >> 8; // Re  8  1 

      break;

   case 2:                 // 2 , Mi 

      TL1 = BEEP_MI;       // Mi  8  1 

      TH1 = BEEP_MI >> 8; // Mi  8  1 

      break;

   case 3:                 // 3 , Fa 

      TL1 = BEEP_FA;       // Fa  8  1 

      TH1 = BEEP_FA >> 8;  // Fa  8  1 

      break;

   case 4:                 // 4 , So 

      TL1 = BEEP_SO;       // So  8  1 

      TH1 = BEEP_SO >> 8; // So  8  1 

      break;

   case 5:                 // 5 , La 

      TL1 = BEEP_LA;       // La  8  1 

      TH1 = BEEP_LA >> 8; // La  8  1 

      break;

   case 6:                 // 6 , Si 

      TL1 = BEEP_SI;       // Si  8  1 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 949 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

        TH1 = BEEP_SI >> 8;       // Si  8  1 

        break;

   case 7:                        // 70 , DoH 

        TL1 = BEEP_DOH;           // DoH  8  1 

        TH1 = BEEP_DOH >> 8; // DoH  8  1 

         break;                   //
   default:

        BeepOff();                //
        return;                   //

   }                              //
   fBeepEn = 1;

}

void BeepOff()                    //
{                                 //

      fBeepEn = 0;
}

#define  MAIN_Fosc                22118400L
#define  Baudrate                 115200L
#define  TM                       (65536 -(MAIN_Fosc/Baudrate+2)/4)

bit      B1S_Flag;

void RTC_config(void);

void UartInit(void)
{

       SCON = (SCON & 0x3f) | 0x40;
       T2L = TM;
       T2H = TM>>8;
       S1BRT = 1;
       T2x12 = 1;
       T2R = 1;
}

void UartPutc(unsigned char dat)
{

       SBUF = dat;
       while(TI==0);
       TI = 0;
}

char putchar(char c)
{

       UartPutc(c);
       return c;
}

void RTC_Isr() interrupt 13       //
{
                                         //
       if(RTCIF & 0x08)
       {

              RTCIF &= ~0x08;
              B1S_Flag = 1;
       }
}

void main()                                // RTC 
{                                          // RTC , RTC
                                           //
       SysInit();                          // RTC ,
       UartInit();                         // RTC ,
       RTCInit();
       EA = 1;                             // 12  RTC 

       fUartBusy = 0;                      //
       fFetchRtc = 0;                      // ISP 
       fReset2Isp = 0;
       bUartStage = 0;

       while (1)
       {

              if (fFetchRtc)
              {

                     fFetchRtc = 0;

                     RTCCR = 0;

                     bDump[0] = RTCYEAR;

                     bDump[1] = RTCMONTH;
                     bDump[2] = RTCDAY;
                     bDump[3] = RTCHOUR;
                     bDump[4] = RTCMIN;
                     bDump[5] = RTCSEC;
                     bDump[6] = RTCSSEC;
                     RTCCR = 1;

                     SendUart(0x5a);
                     SendUart(bDump[0]);
                     SendUart(bDump[1]);
                     SendUart(bDump[2]);
                     SendUart(bDump[3]);
                     SendUart(bDump[4]);
                     SendUart(bDump[5]);
                     SendUart(bDump[6]);
                     SendUart(ALAHOUR);
                     SendUart(ALAMIN);
                     SendUart(ALASEC);
                     SendUart(ALASSEC);
              }

              if (fReset2Isp)
              {

                     fReset2Isp = 0;

                     IAP_CONTR = 0x60;
              }
       }
}

       P0M0 = 0x00; P0M1 = 0x00;
       P1M0 = 0x00; P1M1 = 0x00;

       P3M0 = 0x00; P3M1 = 0x00;
       P4M0 = 0x00; P4M1 = 0x00;

void UartInit()
{

       SCON = 0x50;
       AUXR = 0x40;
       TMOD = 0x00;
       TL1 = BAUD;
       TH1 = BAUD >> 8;
       TR1 = 1;
       ES = 1;
}

void RTCInit()
{
// IRC32KCR = 0x80;
// while (!(IRC32KCR &0x01));
// RTCCFG |= 0x02;

       X32KCR = 0xc0;
       while (!(X32KCR & 0x01));
       RTCCFG &= ~0x02;

       if (InitBlock.bValidTag == 0x5a)
       {

              INIYEAR = InitBlock.bIniYear;
              INIMONTH = InitBlock.bIniMonth;

INIHOUR = InitBlock.bIniHour;                            // RTC 
INIMIN = InitBlock.bIniMinute;
INISEC = InitBlock.bIniSecond;                           // RTC 
INISSEC = InitBlock.bIniSSecond;                         //RTC 
ALAHOUR = InitBlock.bAlaHour;                            // RTC 
ALAMIN = InitBlock.bAlaMinute;                           // RTC 
ALASEC = InitBlock.bAlaSecond;                           //
ALASSEC = InitBlock.bAlaSSecond;
                                                         //EEPROM 
              IapProgram(0x0000, 0x00);
       }
       else
       {

              INIYEAR = 23;
              INIMONTH = 1;
              INIDAY = 29;
              INIHOUR = 12;
              INIMIN = 0;
              INISEC = 0;
              INISSEC = 0;
              ALAHOUR = 0;
              ALAMIN = 0;
              ALASEC = 0;
              ALASSEC = 0;
       }
       RTCCFG |= 0x01;
       RTCCR = 0x01;
       while (RTCCFG & 0x01);
       RTCIF = 0x00;
       RTCIEN = 0x08;
}

void SendUart(BYTE dat)
{

       while (fUartBusy);
       SBUF = dat;
       fUartBusy = 1;
}

void IapProgram(WORD addr, BYTE dat)
{

       IAP_CONTR = 0x80;
       IAP_TPS = 11;
       IAP_CMD = 2;
       IAP_ADDRL = addr;
       IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8;
       IAP_DATA = dat;
       IAP_TRIG = 0x5a;
       IAP_TRIG = 0xa5;
       _nop_();
       _nop_();
       _nop_();
       _nop_();}
}

                         (65536 ӯ(MAIN_Fosc/Baudrate+2)/4)

void UartInit(void)

{

#if(PrintUart == 1)

   SCON = (SCON & 0x3f) | 0x40;                              // 1T 
   AUXR |= 0x40;

   AUXR &= 0xFE;                                             // 1  1 

   TL1 = TM;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 971 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       TH1 = TM>>8;                                 // 1 
       TR1 = 1;

// SCON = (SCON & 0x3f) | 0x40;                   // 1  2 
// T2L = TM;                                      //UART2 switch to: 0: P1.0 P1.1, 1: P4.6 P4.7
// T2H = TM>>8;                                   //8 , 1 , 1 , 
// AUXR |= 0x15;
#else                                             // 2  1T ,

       P_SW2 |= 1;
       S2CON &= ~(1<<7);
       T2L = TM;
       T2H = TM>>8;
       AUXR |= 0x14;
#endif
}

void UartPutc(unsigned char dat)                  //Clear Tx flag
{
#if(PrintUart == 1)

       SBUF = dat;
       while(TI == 0);
       TI = 0;
#else
       S2BUF = dat;
       while((S2CON & 2) == 0);
       S2CON &= ~2;
#endif
}

char putchar(char c)
{

       UartPutc(c);
       return c;
}

void Ext_Vcc_Det(void)

{                                               // 0
       P35 = 0;                                 //
       CMPCR1 |= 0x80;

_nop_();

_nop_();

_nop_();

if(CMPCR1 & 0x01)                               // CMP+ CMP-

{

      P40 = 0;                                  //LED Power On

      P6 = ~ledNum[ledIndex];                   //

      ledIndex++;

      if(ledIndex > 7)

      {

          ledIndex = 0;

      }

}

else

{

      CMPCR1 &= ~0x80;                          //
      P35 = 1;                                  // 1I/O 

      P40 = 1;                                  //LED Power Off

      _nop_();

      _nop_();

void CMP_config(void)

{

       CMPEXCFG = 0x00;                  // DC 0:0mV;
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x40;

                                         // 0x40:10mV; 0x80:20mV; 0xc0:30mV

// CMPEXCFG &= ~0x04;                    //P4.4  CMP-
       CMPEXCFG |= 0x04;                 // 1.19V  CMP-

       CMPEXCFG &= ~0x03;                //P4.6  CMP+
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x01;                     //P5.0  CMP+
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x02;                     //P5.1  CMP+
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x03;                     //ADC  CMP+

       CMPCR2 = 0x00;                    //
       CMPCR2 &= ~0x80;                  //
// CMPCR2 |= 0x80;                       // 0.1us 
       CMPCR2 &= ~0x40;                  // 0.1us 
// CMPCR2 |= 0x40;                       //
       CMPCR2 &= ~0x3f;                  // 16 
// CMPCR2 |= 0x10;
                                         //
       CMPCR1 = 0x00;                    //
// CMPCR1 |= 0x30;                       //
// CMPCR1 &= ~0x20;                      //
// CMPCR1 |= 0x20;                       //
// CMPCR1 &= ~0x10;
// CMPCR1 |= 0x10;                       //
                                         //
       CMPCR1 &= ~0x02;
// CMPCR1 |= 0x02;                       // P4.5 
                                         // P4.1 
// P_SW2 &= ~0x08;                       //
       P_SW2 |= 0x08;
       CMPCR1 |= 0x80;

}

void RTC_Isr() interrupt 13

{

    if(RTCIF & 0x80)                               //

    {

//     P01 = !P01;

       RTCIF &= ~0x80;

       B_Alarm = 1;

    }

    if(RTCIF & 0x08)                               //

    {

//     P00 = !P00;

       RTCIF &= ~0x08;

       B_1s = 1;

    }

}

void sys_init(void)           //

{

   EAXFR = 1;                 //XFR

   WTST = 0;                  // 0 

   CKCON = 0;                 // xdata  0 

   P0M0 = 0x00; P0M1 = 0x00; // P0 

   P1M0 = 0x00; P1M1 = 0x00; // P1 

   P2M0 = 0x00; P2M1 = 0x00; // P2 

   P3M0 = 0x00; P3M1 = 0x00; // P3 

   P4M0 = 0x00; P4M1 = 0x00; // P4 

   P5M0 = 0x00; P5M1 = 0x00; // P5 

   P6M0 = 0x00; P6M1 = 0x00; // P6 

   P7M0 = 0x00; P7M1 = 0x00; // P7 

}

void Delay5000ms(void)        // 5s@40.000MHz
{

      unsigned long edata i;

      _nop_();
      _nop_();
      i = 49999998UL;
      while (i) i--;
}

void main(void)               //
{                             // USB 
                              //
      sys_init();             // LED 
      usb_init();
      EA = 1;
      P40 = 0;

   Delay5000ms();             // 5s USB-CDC "RTC Start"

   X32KCR = 0xc0;             // 32K 
   while (!(X32KCR & 0x01));  //
   RTCCFG &= ~0x02;           // 32K  RTC 

   RTCIF = 0;                 // RTC

   RTCIEN = 0x80;             // RTC 
   ALASEC = 10;               // 10s
                              // 00 

                              // 10  RTC  10s 

   RTCCR = 0x01;              // RTC 
   RTCCFG |= 0x01;            // RTC 
   while(RTCCFG & 0x01);      // RTC 

   printf_usb("RTC Start\r\n");
         // "RTC Start"  USBCDC/HID-

   while(1)                   // RTC 

   {

      if(alarm_flag)          //

      {

             alarm_flag = 0;            //
             printf_usb("Alarm!\r\n");

      }

      if(bUsbOutReady)        //

             //USB  bUsbOutReady "usb_OUT_done();"

      }

   }

}

#include "Ai8051U.H"                                      //

                                                          // 2  Keil 
                                                          //

bit   busy;

char  wptr;

char  rptr;

char  buffer[16];

void UartIsr() interrupt 4
{

       if (TI)
       {

              TI = 0;
              busy = 0;
       }
       if (RI)
       {
              RI = 0;
              buffer[wptr++] = SBUF;
              wptr &= 0x0f;
       }
}

void UartInit()
{

       SCON = 0x50;
       T2L = BRT;
       T2H = BRT >> 8;
       S1BRT = 1;
       T2x12 = 1;
       T2R = 1;
       wptr = 0x00;
       rptr = 0x00;
       busy = 0;
}

void UartSend(char dat)
{

       while (busy);
       busy = 1;
       SBUF = dat;
}

void UartSendStr(char *p)
{

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1033 -

       }                                                     //
}                                                            // 0

void main()                                                  // 0 
{

       EAXFR = 1;

// P_SW2 |= 0x80;

WTST = 0;

CKCON = 0;

       P0M0 = 0x00;
       P0M1 = 0x00;
       P1M0 = 0x00;
       P1M1 = 0x00;
       P2M0 = 0x00;
       P2M1 = 0x00;
       P3M0 = 0x00;
       P3M1 = 0x00;
       P4M0 = 0x00;
       P4M1 = 0x00;
       P5M0 = 0x00;
       P5M1 = 0x00;

       UartInit();
       ES = 1;
       EA = 1;
       UartSendStr("Uart Test !\r\n");

       while (1)
       {

              if (rptr != wptr)
              {

                     UartSend(buffer[rptr++]);
                     rptr &= 0x0f;
              }
       }
}

}

    ptr = pdat;

    {

       printf("%02bx ", *ptr++);           //,

       if ((sz% 16) == 15)

       {

                  printf("\r\n        ");

       }

    }

    printf("\r\n");

}

    usart1_spi_shift(0x06);

void flash_erase_sector(DWORD addr)
{

       flash_write_enable();

    S1SS = 0;                                    //
    usart1_spi_shift(0x20);
    usart1_spi_shift((BYTE)(addr >> 16));
    usart1_spi_shift((BYTE)(addr >> 8));
    usart1_spi_shift((BYTE)(addr));
    S1SS = 1;

       printf("Erase Sector !\r\n");
}

void usart1_tx_dma(WORD size, BYTE xdata *pdat)  //DMA  1
{
                                                 // DMA 
       size--;                                   // DMA 
                                                 // DMA 
       DMA_UR1T_CFG = 0x00;
       DMA_UR1T_STA = 0x00;                      //(: xdata )
       DMA_UR1T_AMT = size;
       DMA_UR1T_AMTH = size >> 8;                // DMA, 1 
       DMA_UR1T_TXAL = (BYTE)pdat;
       DMA_UR1T_TXAH = (WORD)pdat >> 8;          // DMA 
       DMA_UR1T_CR = 0xc0;                       // DMA 
                                                 // DMA
       while (!(DMA_UR1T_STA & 0x01));
       DMA_UR1T_STA = 0x00;
       DMA_UR1T_CR = 0x00;
}

{

       size--;

       }

              S2RI = 0;

       }
}

void timer0(void) interrupt 1
{

//========================================================================
// : void Timer0_config(void)

// : Timer0 
// : none.
// : none.

// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void Timer0_config(void)

{

   TMOD &= 0xf0;                           //16 bits timer auto-reload

   T0x12 = 1;                              //Timer0 set as 1T

   TH0 = (u8)(Timer0_Reload / 256);

   TL0 = (u8)(Timer0_Reload % 256);

   ET0 = 1;                                //Timer0 interrupt enable

   TR0 = 1;                                //Tiner0 run

}

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_TxByte(u8 dat)
// : .
// : .
// : .
//========================================================================
void UART1_TxByte(u8 dat)
{

       B_TX1_Busy = 1;
       SBUF = dat;
       while(B_TX1_Busy);
}

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_Send(u8 addr,u8 *dat,u8 len)
// : .
// : .
// : .

//========================================================================

{

       u8 i;

   TB8 = 1;                                //
   UART1_TxByte(addr);

       TB8 = 0;                        //
       For (i=0;i<len;i++)
       {

              UART1_TxByte(dat[i]);
       }
}

//========================================================================

// : SetTimer2Baudraye(u32 dat)
// :  Timer2 

// : dat: Timer2 .

// : none.
// : VER1.0

// :

//========================================================================

void SetTimer2Baudraye(u32 dat)        //, 2:  Timer2 ,

                                       //:  Timer1 .

{

   T2R = 0;                            //Timer stop

   T2_CT = 0;                          //Timer2 set As Timer

   T2x12 = 1;                          //Timer2 set as 1T mode

   T2H = (u8)(dat / 256);

   T2L = (u8)(dat % 256);

   ET2 = 0;                            //

   T2R = 1;                            //Timer run enable

}

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_config(u8 brt)

// : UART1 
// : brt: , 2:  Timer2 , :  Timer1 .
// : none.

// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void UART1_config(u8 brt)              //, 2:  Timer2 ,
                                       //:  Timer1 .

{

   /***********  2 *****************/

   if(brt == 2)

   {

         S1BRT = 1;                    //S1 BRT Use Timer2;

         SetTimer2Baudraye(65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1);

   }

   /***********  1 *****************/

   else

   {

         TR1 = 0;

         S1BRT = 0;                    //S1 BRT Use Timer1;

         T1_CT = 0;                    //Timer1 set As Timer

         T1x12 = 1;                    //Timer1 set as 1T mode

         TMOD &= ~0x30;                //Timer1_16bitAutoReload;

         TH1 = (u8)((65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1) / 256);

         TL1 = (u8)((65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1) % 256);

         ET1 = 0;                      //

         TR1 = 1;

   }

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_int (void) interrupt UART1_VECTOR

// : UART1 
// : nine.
// : none.

// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void UART1_int (void) interrupt 4

{

   if(RI)

   {

      RI = 0;

      RX1_Buffer[RX1_Cnt] = SBUF;

      if(++RX1_Cnt >= UART1_BUF_LENGTH)                 //
             RX1_Cnt = 0;

      RX1_TimeOut = 5;

   }

       if(TI)
       {

              TI = 0;
              B_TX1_Busy = 0;
       }
}

//========================================================================
// : void KeyResetScan(void)

// : P3.2  1  USB 

// : none.
// : none.

// : VER1.0

// :

//========================================================================

void KeyResetScan(void)

{

   if(!P32)

   {

      if(!Key_Flag)

      {

             Key_cnt++;

             if(Key_cnt >= 1000)               // 1000ms 

             {                                 //
                    Key_Flag = 1;

             USBCON = 0x00;                    // USB 
             USBCLK = 0x00;
             IRC48MCR = 0x00;

                            delay_ms(10);      // ISP 
                            IAP_CONTR = 0x60;
                            while (1);
                     }
              }
       }
       else
       {
              Key_cnt = 0;
              Key_Flag = 0;
       }
}

//========================================================================

// : void Timer0_config(void)
// : Timer0 

// : none.

// : none.
// : VER1.0

// :

//========================================================================

void Timer0_config(void)

{

   TMOD &= 0xf0;                           //16 bits timer auto-reload

   T0x12 = 1;                              //Timer0 set as 1T

   TH0 = (u8)(Timer0_Reload / 256);

   TL0 = (u8)(Timer0_Reload % 256);

   ET0 = 1;                                //Timer0 interrupt enable

   TR0 = 1;                                //Tiner0 run

}

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_TxByte(u8 dat)
// : .
// : .
// : .
// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void UART1_TxByte(u8 dat)

{

       B_TX1_Busy = 1;

       SBUF = dat;

       while(B_TX1_Busy);

}

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_Send(u8 addr,u8 *dat,u8 len)
// : .
// : .
// : .
// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void UART1_Send(u8 addr,u8 *dat,u8 len)

{

       u8 i;

   TB8 = 1;                                //
   UART1_TxByte(addr);

       TB8 = 0;                            //
       For (i=0;i<len;i++)
       {

              UART1_TxByte(dat[i]);
       }
}

//========================================================================
// : SetTimer2Baudraye(u32 dat)
// :  Timer2 
// : dat: Timer2 .

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1057 -
Ai8051U              : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

// : none.
// : VER1.0

// :

//========================================================================

void SetTimer2Baudraye(u32 dat)                         //, 2:  Timer2 ,

                                                        //:  Timer1 .

{

   T2R = 0;                                             //Timer stop

   T2_CT = 0;                                           //Timer2 set As Timer

   T2x12 = 1;                                           //Timer2 set as 1T mode

   T2H = (u8)(dat / 256);

   T2L = (u8)(dat % 256);

   ET2 = 0;                                             //

   T2R = 1;                                             //Timer run enable

}

//========================================================================

void UART1_config(u8 brt)                               //, 2:  Timer2 ,
                                                        //:  Timer1 .

   {

         S1BRT = 1;                                     //S1 BRT Use Timer2;

   else

   {

         TR1 = 0;

         S1BRT = 0;                                     //S1 BRT Use Timer1;

         T1_CT = 0;                                     //Timer1 set As Timer

         T1x12 = 1;                                     //Timer1 set as 1T mode

         TMOD &= ~0x30;                                 //Timer1_16bitAutoReload;

         TH1 = (u8)((65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1) / 256);

         TL1 = (u8)((65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1) % 256);

         ET1 = 0;                                       //

         TR1 = 1;

   }

   /*************************************************/

                                                        //0x40: 8 ,,
       SM2 = 1;                                         //0x80: 9 ,,
// PS = 1;                                              //0xc0: 9 ,

       REN = 1;                                         //

       SADEN = 0xf0;                                    //

   P_SW1 &= 0x3f;                                          //UART1 switch to, 0x00: P3.0 P3.1,
   P_SW1 |= 0x80;                                          //0x40: P3.6 P3.7, 0x80: P1.6 P1.7,
                                                           //0xC0: P4.3 P4.4

       RX1_TimeOut = 0;
       B_TX1_Busy = 0;
       TX1_Cnt = 0;
       RX1_Cnt = 0;
}

void UART1_int (void) interrupt 4

{

        RI = 0;                              //SM2  0

          RX1_Buffer[RX1_Cnt] = SBUF;        //

       if(TI)
       {

              TI = 0;
              B_TX1_Busy = 0;
       }
}

//========================================================================

// : 
// : ms, ms ,  1~255ms. .
// : none.

// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void delay_ms(u8 ms)

{

   u16 i;

   do{

        i = MAIN_Fosc / 6000;

        while(--i);                          //6T per loop

   }while(--ms);

}

      IE2 |= 0x01;

      T3L = 0xA9;      //
      T3H = 0xFF;

}

{

   TH1 = 0x05;          //

   TR1 = 1;             // 1

void Timer3_Init(void)  // 3 100 @40.000MHz

void Timer4_Init(void)  // 4 200 @40.000MHz

// 11.0592MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                                       //

#include "intrins.h"                                       //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

#define FOSC              11059200UL                       //,
#define BRT               (65536 - (FOSC / 115200+2) / 4)
                                                           // 2  Keil 
                                                           //

bit   busy;

char  wptr;

char  rptr;

char  buffer[16];

void Uart3Isr() interrupt 17
{

       if (S3TI)
       {

              S3TI = 0;
              busy = 0;
       }
       if (S3RI)
       {
              S3RI = 0;
              buffer[wptr++] = S3BUF;
              wptr &= 0x0f;
       }
}

void Uart3Init()
{

       S3CON = 0x10;
       T2L = BRT;
       T2H = BRT >> 8;
       T2x12 = 1;
       T2R = 1;
       wptr = 0x00;
       rptr = 0x00;
       busy = 0;
}

void Uart3Send(char dat)
{

       while (busy);
       busy = 1;
       S3BUF = dat;
}

void Uart3SendStr(char *p)
{

       while (*p)

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1092 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com             MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       {                                                      //XFR
              Uart3Send(*p++);                                //(32 )
                                                              //XFR
       }                                                      //(8 )
}                                                             //
                                                              // 0 
void main()                                                   // xdata 
{                                                             // 0 

       EAXFR = 1;

// P_SW2 |= 0x80;

WTST = 0;

CKCON = 0;

       P0M0 = 0x00;
       P0M1 = 0x00;
       P1M0 = 0x00;
       P1M1 = 0x00;
       P2M0 = 0x00;
       P2M1 = 0x00;
       P3M0 = 0x00;
       P3M1 = 0x00;
       P4M0 = 0x00;
       P4M1 = 0x00;
       P5M0 = 0x00;
       P5M1 = 0x00;

       Uart3Init();
       ES3 = 1;
       EA = 1;
       Uart3SendStr("Uart Test !\r\n");

       while (1)
       {

              if (rptr != wptr)
              {

                     Uart3Send(buffer[rptr++]);
                     rptr &= 0x0f;
              }
       }
}

// 11.0592MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                   //

#include "intrins.h"                   //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

void CMP_Isr() interrupt 21            //
{                                      //
                                       //
       CMPIF = 0;
       if (CMPRES)
       {

              P10 = !P10;
       }
       else
       {

              P11 = !P11;
       }
}

void main()                            //XFR
{                                      //(32 )
                                       //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                      //(8 )
                                       //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                      // 0 
                                       // xdata 
       WTST = 0;                       // 0 

       CKCON = 0;

P0M0 = 0x00;
P0M1 = 0x00;
P1M0 = 0x00;
P1M1 = 0x00;
P2M0 = 0x00;
P2M1 = 0x00;
P3M0 = 0x00;
P3M1 = 0x00;
P4M0 = 0x00;
P4M1 = 0x00;
P5M0 = 0x00;
P5M1 = 0x00;

       CMPEXCFG = 0x00;                // DC 
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x40;                   //0:0mV; 0x40:10mV; 0x80:20mV; 0xc0:30mV

       CMPEXCFG &= ~0x03;              //P4.6  CMP+
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x01;                   //P5.0  CMP+
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x02;                   //P5.1  CMP+
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x03;                   //ADC  CMP+
                                       //P4.4  CMP-
       CMPEXCFG &= ~0x04;              // 1.19V  CMP-
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x04;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1103 -

       CMPCR1 = 0x00;                  //
       CMPCR2= 0x00;                   //
       INVCMPO = 0;                    // 0.1us 
// INVCMPO = 1;                        // 0.1us 
       DISFLT = 0;                     //

// PIE = 0;                            //

       while (1);

// CMPEXCFG |= 0x01;                                //P5.0  CMP+
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x02;                                //P5.1  CMP+
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x03;                                //ADC  CMP+
                                                    //P4.4  CMP-
       CMPEXCFG &= ~0x04;                           // 1.19V  CMP-
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x04;
                                                    //
       CMPCR1 = 0x00;                               //
       CMPCR2= 0x00;                                // 0.1us 
       INVCMPO = 0;                                 // 0.1us 
// INVCMPO = 1;                                     //
       DISFLT = 0;                                  // 16 
// DISFLT = 1;                                      //
// CMPCR2 &= ~0x3f;                                 //
       CMPCR2 |= 0x10;                              //
       PIE = NIE = 1;                               //
// PIE = 0;                                         //
// PIE = 1;                                         //
// NIE = 0;                                         //
// NIE = 1;                                         //
// CMPOE = 0;
       CMPOE = 1;                                   //
       CMPEN = 1;

       while (1)
       {

              P10 = CMPRES;
       }
}

       P0M1 = 0x00;
       P1M0 = 0x00;                         //>2.5V
       P1M1 = 0x00;                         //P2.1  0
       P2M0 = 0x00;
       P2M1 = 0x00;
       P3M0 = 0x00;
       P3M1 = 0x00;
       P4M0 = 0x00;
       P4M1 = 0x00;
       P5M0 = 0x00;
       P5M1 = 0x00;

       P2M0 = 0x3f;
       P2M1 = 0x3f;
       P2 = 0xff;

       CMPEXCFG = 0x00;

// CMPEXCFG |= 0x01;
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x02;
// CMPEXCFG |= 0x03;
// CMPEXCFG &= ~0x04;
       CMPEXCFG |= 0x04;

       CMPCR2 = 0x10;
       CMPCR1 = 0x00;
       CMPEN = 1;

       while (1)
       {

              v = 0x00;
              P2 = 0xfe;
              delay();
              if (!(CMPRES)) goto ShowVol;
              v = 0x01;
              P2 = 0xfd;
              delay();

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1109 -

              if (!(CMPRES)) goto ShowVol;               //>3.0V
              v = 0x03;                                  //P2.2  0
              P2 = 0xfb;

              if (!(CMPRES)) goto ShowVol;               //P2.3  0
              v = 0x07;

              delay();                                   //P2.4  0

              v = 0x0f;                                  //>4.5V

              v = 0x1f;
              P2 = 0xdf;
              delay();
              if (!(CMPRES)) goto ShowVol;
              v = 0x3f;
ShowVol:
              P2 = 0xff;
              P0 = ~v;
       }

// 11.0592MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                           //

#include "intrins.h"                           //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

void IapIdle()                                 // IAP 
{                                              //
                                               //
       IAP_CONTR = 0;
       IAP_CMD = 0;
       IAP_TRIG = 0;
       IAP_ADDRE = 0x00;
       IAP_ADDRH = 0x00;
       IAP_ADDRL = 0x00;
}

char IapRead(unsigned long addr)               // EA 
{                                              //
                                               // IAP
       char dat;                               // 11MHz
       bit flag;                               // IAP 
                                               // IAP 
       flag = EA;                              // IAP 
       EA = 0;                                 // IAP 
       IAP_CONTR = 0x80;                       //(0x5a)
       IAP_TPS = 11;                           //(0xa5)
       IAP_CMD = 1;
       IAP_ADDRL = addr;                       // IAP 
       IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8;                  // IAP 
       IAP_ADDRE = addr >> 16;                 // EA 
       IAP_TRIG = 0x5a;
       IAP_TRIG = 0xa5;
       _nop_();
       _nop_();
       _nop_();
       _nop_();
       dat = IAP_DATA;
       IapIdle();
       EA = flag;

       return dat;
}

void IapProgram(unsigned long addr, char dat)
{

       bit flag;

flag = EA;                                     // EA 
EA = 0;                                        //
IAP_CONTR = 0x80;                              // IAP
IAP_TPS = 11;                                  // 11MHz
IAP_CMD = 2;                                   // IAP 
IAP_ADDRL = addr;                              // IAP 
IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8;                         // IAP 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1117 -
Ai8051U            : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       IAP_ADDRE = addr >> 16;                   // IAP 
       IAP_DATA = dat;                           // IAP 
       IAP_TRIG = 0x5a;                          //(0x5a)
       IAP_TRIG = 0xa5;                          //(0xa5)
       _nop_();
       _nop_();                                  // IAP 
       _nop_();                                  // EA 
       _nop_();
       IapIdle();                                // EA 
       EA = flag;                                //
}                                                // IAP
                                                 // 11MHz
void IapErase(unsigned long addr)                // IAP 
{                                                // IAP 
                                                 // IAP 
       bit flag;                                 // IAP 
                                                 //(0x5a)
       flag = EA;                                //(0xa5)
       EA = 0;
       IAP_CONTR = 0x80;                          //
       IAP_TPS = 11;                             // IAP 
       IAP_CMD = 3;                              // EA 
       IAP_ADDRL = addr;
       IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8;                    //XFR
       IAP_ADDRE = addr >> 16;                   //(32 )
       IAP_TRIG = 0x5a;                          //XFR
       IAP_TRIG = 0xa5;                          //(8 )
       _nop_();                                  //
       _nop_();                                  // 0 
       _nop_();                                  // xdata 
       _nop_();                                  // 0 
       IapIdle();
       EA = flag;
}

void main()
{

       EAXFR = 1;

// P_SW2 |= 0x80;

WTST = 0;

CKCON = 0;

P0M0 = 0x00;
P0M1 = 0x00;
P1M0 = 0x00;
P1M1 = 0x00;
P2M0 = 0x00;
P2M1 = 0x00;
P3M0 = 0x00;
P3M1 = 0x00;
P4M0 = 0x00;
P4M1 = 0x00;
P5M0 = 0x00;
P5M1 = 0x00;

IapErase(0x0400);

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1118 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

P0 = IapRead(0x0400);                                //P0=0xff
IapProgram(0x0400, 0x12);                            //P1=0x12
P1 = IapRead(0x0400);

       while (1);
}

// 11.0592MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                                    //

#include "intrins.h"                                    //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

#define IAP_BASE           0xff0000                     // 16K  EEPROM64K-16K
#define ROM_OFFSET         0xc000                       // 48K0xc000

void IapIdle()                                          // IAP 
{                                                       //
                                                        //
       IAP_CONTR = 0;
       IAP_CMD = 0;
       IAP_TRIG = 0;
       IAP_ADDRE = 0x00;
       IAP_ADDRH = 0x00;
       IAP_ADDRL = 0x00;
}

unsigned char IapRead(unsigned long addr)               // MOV  EEPROM 
{                                                       // MOV 

       Addr = (addr & 0xffff) + IAP_BASE + ROM_OFFSET;
       return *( unsigned char far *)(addr);
}

void IapProgram(unsigned long addr, unsigned char dat)
{

       bit flag;

flag = EA;                                              // EA 
EA = 0;                                                 //
IAP_CONTR = 0x80;                                       // IAP
IAP_TPS = 11;                                           // 11MHz
IAP_CMD = 2;                                            // IAP 
IAP_ADDRL = addr;                                       // IAP 
IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8;                                  // IAP 
IAP_ADDRE = addr >> 16;                                 // IAP 
IAP_DATA = dat;                                         // IAP 
IAP_TRIG = 0x5a;                                        //(0x5a)
IAP_TRIG = 0xa5;                                        //(0xa5)
_nop_();
_nop_();                                                // IAP 
_nop_();                                                // EA 
_nop_();
IapIdle();
EA = flag;

}                                                // EA 
                                                 //
void IapErase(unsigned long addr)                // IAP
{                                                // 11MHz
                                                 // IAP 
       bit flag;                                 // IAP 
                                                 // IAP 
       flag = EA;                                // IAP 
       EA = 0;                                   //(0x5a)
       IAP_CONTR = 0x80;                         //(0xa5)
       IAP_TPS = 11;
       IAP_CMD = 3;                               //
       IAP_ADDRL = addr;                         // IAP 
       IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8;                    // EA 
       IAP_ADDRE = addr >> 16;
       IAP_TRIG = 0x5a;                          //XFR
       IAP_TRIG = 0xa5;                          //(32 )
       _nop_();                                  //XFR
       _nop_();                                  //(8 )
       _nop_();                                  //
       _nop_();                                  // 0 
       IapIdle();                                // xdata 
       EA = flag;                                // 0 
}
                                                  //P0=0xff

#include "Ai8051U.H"                                       //
