//_nop_()

#define FOSC              11059200UL
#define BRT               (65536 - (FOSC / 115200+2) / 4)

                                                           // 2  Keil 
                                                           //

void UartInit()
{

       SCON = 0x5a;
       T2L = BRT;
       T2H = BRT >> 8;
       S1BRT = 1;
       T2x12 = 1;
       T2R = 1;
}

void UartSend(char dat)
{

       while (!TI);
       TI = 0;
       SBUF = dat;
}

void IapIdle()                                             // IAP 
{                                                          //
                                                           //
       IAP_CONTR = 0;
       IAP_CMD = 0;
       IAP_TRIG = 0;
       IAP_ADDRE = 0x00;
       IAP_ADDRH = 0x00;
       IAP_ADDRL = 0x00;
}

char IapRead(unsigned long addr)                           // EA 
{                                                          //

       bit flag;                                           // 11MHz
                                                           // IAP 
       flag = EA;                                          // IAP 
       EA = 0;                                             // IAP 
                                                           // IAP 
       IAP_CONTR = 0x80;                                   //(0x5a)
       IAP_TPS = 11;                                       //(0xa5)
       IAP_CMD = 1;
       IAP_ADDRL = addr;
       IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8;
       IAP_ADDRE = addr >> 16;
       IAP_TRIG = 0x5a;
       IAP_TRIG = 0xa5;
       _nop_();

                                                            // IAP

                                                            // IAP 
void IapProgram(unsigned long addr, char dat)               // IAP 
{                                                           // IAP 
                                                            // IAP 
       bit flag;                                            //(0x5a)
                                                            //(0xa5)
       flag = EA;
       EA = 0;                                              // IAP 
       IAP_CONTR = 0x80;                                    // EA 
       IAP_TPS = 11;
       IAP_CMD = 2;                                         // EA 
       IAP_ADDRL = addr;                                    //
       IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8;                               // IAP
       IAP_ADDRE = addr >> 16;                              // 11MHz
       IAP_DATA = dat;                                      // IAP 
       IAP_TRIG = 0x5a;                                     // IAP 
       IAP_TRIG = 0xa5;                                     // IAP 
       _nop_();                                             // IAP 
       _nop_();                                             //(0x5a)
       _nop_();                                             //(0xa5)
       _nop_();
       IapIdle();                                            //
       EA = flag;                                           // IAP 
}                                                           // EA 

void IapErase(unsigned long addr)                           //XFR
{                                                           //(32 )

       bit flag;

       flag = EA;
       EA = 0;
       IAP_CONTR = 0x80;
       IAP_TPS = 11;
       IAP_CMD = 3;
       IAP_ADDRL = addr;
       IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8;
       IAP_ADDRE = addr >> 16;
       IAP_TRIG = 0x5a;
       IAP_TRIG = 0xa5;
       _nop_();
       _nop_();
       _nop_();
       _nop_();
       IapIdle();
       EA = flag;
}

/*  , , , . */

/*************  **************
Ai8051U  EEPROM .
, . 11.0592MHZ.
PC :  115200,8,n,1.
 EEPROM  64  64 

:
E 0  EEPROM E ,  0  0 (, 0~126,  IC).
W 0  EEPROM W ,  0  0 (, 0~126,  IC). 
 64 .
R 0  EEPROM  IAP R ,  0  0 (, 0~126,  IC). 
 64 .
M 0  EEPROM  MOVC (*512+) 0  0 (, 0~126,  IC).
 64 .

******************************************/

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1123 -

#include "config.H"
#include "EEPROM.h"

#define  Baudrate1                         115200L            // EEPROM  MOV ,
#define  UART1_BUF_LENGTH                  10
#define  EEADDR_OFFSET                     0xff0000
#define  TimeOutSet1                       5

/*************  **************/
u8 code T_Strings[]={""};

/*************  **************/
u8 xdatatmp[70];
u8 xdata RX1_Buffer[UART1_BUF_LENGTH];
u8 RX1_Cnt;
u8 RX1_TimeOut;
bit B_TX1_Busy;

/*************                 **************/
void UART1_config(void);
void TX1_write2buff(u8 dat);                                  //
void PrintString1(u8 *puts);                                  //

/*************  *****************/

/**********************************************/

u8 CheckData(u8 dat)
{

       if((dat >= '0') && (dat <= '9')) return (dat-'0');
       if((dat >= 'A') && (dat <= 'F')) return (dat-'A'+10);
       if((dat >= 'a') && (dat <= 'f')) return (dat-'a'+10);
       return 0xff;
}

u16 GetAddress(void)
{

       u16 address;
       u8 i;

address = 0;

if(RX1_Cnt < 3)             return 65535;                     //error
if(RX1_Cnt <= 5)                                              //5 ,
                                                              //: E 0, E 12, E 120

                                                              //         W 0, W 12, W 120

                                                              //         R 0, R 12, R 120

{

         for(i=2; i<RX1_Cnt; i++)

         {

            if(CheckData(RX1_Buffer[i]) > 9)

              return 65535;                                   //error

            address = address * 10 + CheckData(RX1_Buffer[i]);

         }                                                    // 0~123 
         if(address < 124)

         {

            address <<= 9;

            return (address);

         }

}

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1124 -
Ai8051U                : www.STCAI.com    MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

else if(RX1_Cnt == 8)                               //8 ,
                                                    //: E 0x1234, W 0x12b3, R 0x0A00

{

   if((RX1_Buffer[2] == '0') && ((RX1_Buffer[3] == 'x') || (RX1_Buffer[3] == 'X')))

   {

      for(i=4; i<8; i++)

      {

          if(CheckData(RX1_Buffer[i]) > 0x0F)

                       return 65535;                //error

          address = (address << 4) + CheckData(RX1_Buffer[i]);

      }

      if(address < 63488)                           // 0~123 
             return (address);

   }

}

        return 65535;                               //error
}

//========================================================================
// : void delay_ms(u8 ms)
// : 
// : ms, ms ,  1~255ms. .
// : none.
// : VER1.0
// :
//========================================================================
void delay_ms(u8 ms)
{

       u16 i;
       do
       {

              i = MAIN_Fosc / 10000;
              while(--i) ;
       }while(--ms);
}

// MOV  EEPROM
void EEPROM_MOV_read_n(u16 EE_address, u8 *DataAddress, u16 number)
{

       u8 far *pc;

       pc = EE_address + EEADDR_OFFSET;             //
       do
       {

              *DataAddress = *pc;
              DataAddress++;
              pc++;
       }while(--number);
}

/*********************  *************************/
void main(void)
{

       u8 i;
       u16 addr;

UART1_config();                                     // , 2:  Timer2 ,
                                                    //:  Timer1 .

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1125 -
Ai8051U            : www.STCAI.com         MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       EA = 1;                                          //

PrintString1("AI MCU  1  EEPROM !\r\n"); //UART1 

while(1)

{

   delay_ms(1);                                     //
   if(RX1_TimeOut > 0)

   {

          if(--RX1_TimeOut == 0)

          {

                if(RX1_Buffer[1] == ' ')

                {

                   addr = GetAddress();             // 0~123 
                   if(addr < 63488)

                   {                                //PC 
                          if(RX1_Buffer[0] == 'E')

                        {

                           EEPROM_SectorErase(addr);
                           PrintString1("!\r\n");

                        }

                        else if(RX1_Buffer[0] == 'W') //PC  EEPROM 64 
                        {

                               EEPROM_write_n(addr,T_Strings,64);
                              PrintString1("!\r\n");
                        }

                             else if(RX1_Buffer[0] == 'R') //PC  64  EEPROM 
                              {

                                    PrintString1("IAP \r\n");
                                     EEPROM_read_n(addr,tmp,64);
                                     for(i=0; i<64; i++)

                                           TX1_write2buff(tmp[i]); //
                                     TX1_write2buff(0x0d);
                                     TX1_write2buff(0x0a);
                              }
                             else if(RX1_Buffer[0] == 'M') //PC  64  EEPROM 
                              {
                                    PrintString1("MOVC \r\n");
                                     EEPROM_MOVC_read_n(addr,tmp,64);
                                     for(i=0; i<64; i++)

                                           TX1_write2buff(tmp[i]); //

                                     TX1_write2buff(0x0d);
                                     TX1_write2buff(0x0a);
                              }
                             else PrintString1("!\r\n");
                       }
                      else PrintString1("!\r\n");
                }

                            RX1_Cnt = 0;
                     }
              }
       }
}
/**********************************************/

/***************  *******************************/

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1126 -
Ai8051U                 : www.STCAI.com     MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

void TX1_write2buff(u8 dat)                              //
{
                                                         //
       B_TX1_Busy = 1;                                   //
       SBUF = dat;                                       //
       while(B_TX1_Busy);
}

//========================================================================
// : void PrintString1(u8 *puts)
// :  1 
// : puts: .
// : none.
// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void PrintString1(u8 *puts)                                //

{                                                          // 0 
      for (; *puts != 0; puts++)

   {

      TX1_write2buff(*puts);

   }

}

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_config(void)
// : UART1 
// : none.
// : none.
// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void UART1_config(void)

{

   TR1 = 0;

   AUXR &= ~0x01;                                          //S1 BRT Use Timer1;

   AUXR |= (1<<6);                                         //Timer1 set as 1T mode

   TMOD &= ~(1<<6);                                        //Timer1 set As Timer

   TMOD &= ~0x30;                                          //Timer1_16bitAutoReload;

   TH1 = (u8)((65536L-(MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1) >> 8);

   TL1 = (u8)(65536L-(MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1);         //  Timer1 
   ET1 = 0;                                                // Timer1 
   INT_CLKO &= ~0x02;                                      //  Timer1
   TR1 = 1;

   S1_USE_P30P31(); P3n_standard(0x03);                    // P3.0 P3.1
   //S1_USE_P36P37(); P3n_standard(0xc0);                  // P3.6 P3.7
   //S1_USE_P16P17(); P1n_standard(0xc0);                  // P1.6 P1.7

       SCON = (SCON & 0x3f) | 0x40;                        //UART1 , 0x00: ,

// PS = 1;                                                 //  0x40: 8 ,,
       ES = 1;
       REN = 1;                                            //  0x80: 9 ,,

                                                           //  0xc0: 9 ,

                                                           //

                                                           //

                                                           //

       B_TX1_Busy = 0;
       RX1_Cnt = 0;
}

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1127 -
Ai8051U                : www.STCAI.com        MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_int (void) interrupt UART1_VECTOR
// : UART1 
// : nine.
// : none.
// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void UART1_int (void) interrupt 4

{

    if(RI)

    {

            RI = 0;

            if(RX1_Cnt >= UART1_BUF_LENGTH)  //
                   RX1_Cnt = 0;

            RX1_Buffer[RX1_Cnt++] = SBUF;

            RX1_TimeOut = TimeOutSet1;

    }

       if(TI)
       {

              TI = 0;
              B_TX1_Busy = 0;
       }
}

EEPROM.c

// 11.0592MHz

//  EEPROM 

#include "config.h"
#include "eeprom.h"

//========================================================================
// : void IAP_Disable(void)
// :  ISP/IAP.
// : non.
// : non.
// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void DisableEEPROM(void)

{                                            // ISP/IAP 
       IAP_CONTR = 0;

    IAP_TPS = 0;                             // ISP/IAP 
    IAP_CMD = 0;                                  // ISP/IAP 
    IAP_TRIG = 0;
    IAP_ADDRE = 0xff;                        // 0 
    IAP_ADDRH = 0xff;                        // 0 
    IAP_ADDRL = 0xff;                        // 0  EEPROM 

}

//========================================================================

// : void EEPROM_read_n(u16 EE_address,u8 *DataAddress,u16 number)

// :  EEPROM  n .

// : EE_address:  EEPROM .

//     DataAddress: .

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1128 -
Ai8051U                  : www.STCAI.com           MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

//      number:        .

// : non.

// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void EEPROM_read_n(u32 EE_address,u8 *DataAddress,u16 number)

{                                                 //
       EA = 0;                                    // ISP/IAP 
       IAP_CONTR = IAP_EN;                        //
       IAP_TPS = (u8)(MAIN_Fosc / 1000000L);      //
       IAP_READ();

    do

    {                                             //
           IAP_ADDRE = EE_address / 65536;        //
           IAP_ADDRH = (EE_address / 256) % 256;  //
           IAP_ADDRL = EE_address % 256;          // 5AH A5H  ISP/IAP 
           IAP_TRIG();                            //
                                                  // A5H ISP/IAP 
                                                  //CPU  IAP 

        _nop_();

        _nop_();

        _nop_();

        _nop_();                                               //
        *DataAddress = IAP_DATA;

        EE_address++;

        DataAddress++;

    }while(--number);

       DisableEEPROM();                           //
       EA = 1;
}

/********************  *****************/

//========================================================================
// : void EEPROM_SectorErase(u16 EE_address)
// :  EEPROM .
// : EE_address:  EEPROM .
// : non.
// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void EEPROM_SectorErase(u32 EE_address)

{                                                 //
       EA = 0;                                    //512 /
                                                  //
       IAP_ADDRE = EE_address / 65536;            //
       IAP_ADDRH = (EE_address / 256) % 256;      //
       IAP_ADDRL = EE_address % 256;              //
       IAP_CONTR = IAP_EN;                        // ISP/IAP 
       IAP_TPS = (u8)(MAIN_Fosc / 1000000L);      //
       IAP_ERASE();                               //

    IAP_TRIG();

    _nop_();

    _nop_();

    _nop_();

    _nop_();

    DisableEEPROM();                              //
    EA = 1;

}

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1129 -
Ai8051U                  : www.STCAI.com           MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

//========================================================================

// : void EEPROM_write_n(u16 EE_address,u8 *DataAddress,u16 number)

// :  n  EEPROM.

// : EE_address:  EEPROM .

//  DataAddress: .

//  number:     .

// : non.

// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void EEPROM_write_n(u32 EE_address,u8 *DataAddress,u16 number)

{                                                 //
       EA = 0;

    IAP_CONTR = IAP_EN;                           // ISP/IAP 
    IAP_TPS = (u8)(MAIN_Fosc / 1000000L);         //
    IAP_WRITE();                                  //
    do
    {                                             //
                                                  //
           IAP_ADDRE = EE_address / 65536;        //
           IAP_ADDRH = (EE_address / 256) % 256;  // IAP_DATA
           IAP_ADDRL = EE_address % 256;
           IAP_DATA = *DataAddress;
           IAP_TRIG();
           _nop_();
           _nop_();
           _nop_();
           _nop_();
           EE_address++;
           DataAddress++;
    }while(--number);

       DisableEEPROM();                           //
       EA = 1;
}

#include "config.H"
#include "EEPROM.h"

u8 code T_StringW[]={""};

void TX1_write2buff(u8 dat);                   //

/*************  EEPROM , , , 0 , 1  *****************/

u8 ReadRecord(u16 addr)

{

   u8 i;                                       //
   u16 ChckSum;                                //
   u16 j;

   for(i=0; i<66; i++) tmp[i] = 0;             //
   PassWord = D_PASSWORD;                       //
   EEPROM_read_n(addr,tmp,66);                 // 0
   for(ChckSum=0, i=0; i<64; i++)
                                               //
          ChckSum += tmp[i];                   //
   j = ((u16)tmp[64]<<8) + (u16)tmp[65];       //,  0
   j ^= 0x5555;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1131 -
Ai8051U             : www.STCAI.com      MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       if(ChckSum != j)return 1;                    //,  1
       return 0;                                    //,  0
}

/*************  EEPROM , , , 0 , 1  *****************/

u8 SaveRecord(u16 addr)

{

   u8 i;                                            //
   u16 ChckSum;

   for(ChckSum=0, i=0; i<64; i++)                   //
          ChckSum += SaveTmp[i];                    //,  0

   ChckSum ^= 0x5555;                               //
   SaveTmp[64] = (u8)(ChckSum >> 8);                //
   SaveTmp[65] = (u8)ChckSum;                       //
                                                    //
   PassWord = D_PASSWORD;
   EEPROM_SectorErase(addr);
   PassWord = D_PASSWORD;
   EEPROM_write_n(addr, SaveTmp, 66);

       for(i=0; i<66; i++)                          //
              tmp[i] = 0;                           //
                                                    // 0
       PassWord = D_PASSWORD;                       //
       EEPROM_read_n(addr,tmp,66);
       for(i=0; i<66; i++)                          //,  1
       {
                                                    //,  0
              if(SaveTmp[i] != tmp[i])
                     return 1;

       }
       return 0;
}

void main(void)

{

   u8 i;                                            //
   u8 status;

   UART1_config();                                  // , 2:  Timer2 ,

                                                    // status.0=1

          for(i=0; i<64; i++)                       // 1
                                                    // status.1=1
                 SaveTmp[i] = tmp[i];               //
   }
   if(ReadRecord(0x0200) == 0)
   {

          status |= 0x02;
          for(i=0; i<64; i++)

                 SaveTmp[i] = tmp[i];

             PrintString1(" 1 !\r\n");

}
if((status & 0x04) == 0)
{

       if(SaveRecord(0x0400) == 0)
             PrintString1(" 2 !\r\n");

       else
             PrintString1(" 2 !\r\n");

}

while(1)                                          //
{
                                                  //
       if(cmd != 0)                               //PC 
       {                                          //
                                                  //
              if((cmd >= 'a') && (cmd <= 'z'))    //
                     cmd -= 0x20;                 //
                                                  //
              if(cmd == 'E')                      //
              {
                                                  //PC  EEPROM 64 
                     PassWord = D_PASSWORD;
                     EEPROM_SectorErase(0x0000);
                     PassWord = D_PASSWORD;
                     EEPROM_SectorErase(0x0200);
                     PassWord = D_PASSWORD;
                     EEPROM_SectorErase(0x0400);
                    PrintString1("!\r\n");
              }

              else if(cmd == 'W')
              {

                     for(i=0; i<64; i++)

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1133 -
Ai8051U                 : www.STCAI.com              MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

                             SaveTmp[i] = T_StringW[i];      //

            if(SaveRecord(0x0000) == 0)                      // 0 
                  PrintString1(" 0 !\r\n");

            else                                             // 0 
                  PrintString1(" 0 !\r\n");

            if(SaveRecord(0x0200) == 0)                      // 1 
                  PrintString1(" 1 !\r\n");

            else                                             // 1 
                  PrintString1(" 1 !\r\n");

            if(SaveRecord(0x0400) == 0)                      // 2 
                  PrintString1(" 2 !\r\n");

            else                                             // 2 
                  PrintString1(" 2 !\r\n");

         }

         else if(cmd == 'R')                                 //PC  64  EEPROM 

         {                                                   // 0 
                if(ReadRecord(0x0000) == 0)

            {
                  PrintString1(" 0 \r\n");

                             for(i=0; i<64; i++)             //
                                    TX1_write2buff(tmp[i]);  //

                             TX1_write2buff(0x0d);

                             TX1_write2buff(0x0a);

            }
            else PrintString1(" 0 !\r\n");

            if(ReadRecord(0x0200) == 0)                      // 1 

            {
                  PrintString1(" 1 \r\n");

                             for(i=0; i<64; i++)             //
                                    TX1_write2buff(tmp[i]);  //

                             TX1_write2buff(0x0d);

                             TX1_write2buff(0x0a);

            }
            else PrintString1(" 1 !\r\n");

            if(ReadRecord(0x0400) == 0)                      // 2 

            {
                  PrintString1(" 2 \r\n");

                             for(i=0; i<64; i++)             //
                                    TX1_write2buff(tmp[i]);  //

                             TX1_write2buff(0x0d);

                             TX1_write2buff(0x0a);

            }
            else PrintString1(" 2 !\r\n");

         }
         else PrintString1("!\r\n");

         cmd = 0;

      }

   }

}

/***************  *******************************/

void TX1_write2buff(u8 dat)                                  //

{                                                            //
       B_TX1_Busy = 1;                                       //
       SBUF = dat;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1134 -
Ai8051U                 : www.STCAI.com     MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       while(B_TX1_Busy);                              //
}

//========================================================================
// : void PrintString1(u8 *puts)
// :  1 
// : puts: .
// : none.
// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void PrintString1(u8 *puts)                                //

{                                                          // 0 
      for (; *puts != 0; puts++)

   {

      TX1_write2buff(*puts);

   }

}

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_config(void)
// : UART1 
// : none.
// : none.
// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void UART1_config(void)

{

   TR1 = 0;

   AUXR &= ~0x01;                                          //S1 BRT Use Timer1;

   AUXR |= (1<<6);                                         //Timer1 set as 1T mode

   TMOD &= ~(1<<6);                                        //Timer1 set As Timer

   TMOD &= ~0x30;                                          //Timer1_16bitAutoReload;

   TH1 = (u8)((65536L-(MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1) >> 8);

   TL1 = (u8)(65536L-(MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1);         //  Timer1 
   ET1 = 0;                                                // Timer1 
   INT_CLKO &= ~0x02;                                      //  Timer1
   TR1 = 1;

   S1_USE_P30P31(); P3n_standard(0x03);                    // P3.0 P3.1
   //S1_USE_P36P37(); P3n_standard(0xc0);                  // P3.6 P3.7
   //S1_USE_P16P17(); P1n_standard(0xc0);                  // P1.6 P1.7

       SCON = (SCON & 0x3f) | 0x40;                        //UART1 , 0x00: ,

// PS = 1;                                                 //  0x40: 8 ,,
       ES = 1;
       REN = 1;                                            //  0x80: 9 ,,

                                                           //  0xc0: 9 ,

                                                           //

                                                           //

                                                           //

       B_TX1_Busy = 0;
}

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_int (void) interrupt UART1_VECTOR
// : UART1 
// : nine.

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1135 -
Ai8051U                : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

// : none.
// : VER1.0
// :
//========================================================================
void UART1_int (void) interrupt 4
{

       if(RI)
       {

              RI = 0;
              cmd = SBUF;
       }

       if(TI)
       {

              TI = 0;
              B_TX1_Busy = 0;
       }
}

EEPROM.c

// 11.0592MHz

//  EEPROM 

#include "config.h"
#include "EEPROM.h"

u32  PassWord;                          // 

//========================================================================
// : void IAP_Disable(void)
// :  ISP/IAP.
// : non.
// : non.
// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void DisableEEPROM(void)

{                                       // ISP/IAP 
       IAP_CONTR = 0;

     IAP_TPS = 0;                       // ISP/IAP 
     IAP_CMD = 0;                        // ISP/IAP 
     IAP_TRIG = 0;                      // 0 
     IAP_ADDRE = 0xff;                  // 0 
     IAP_ADDRH = 0xff;                  // 0  EEPROM 
     IAP_ADDRL = 0xff;

}

//========================================================================

// : void EEPROM_read_n(u16 EE_address,u8 *DataAddress,u16 number)

// :  EEPROM  n .

// : EE_address:  EEPROM .

//   DataAddress: .

//   number:           .

// : non.

// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void EEPROM_read_n(u32 EE_address,u8 *DataAddress,u16 number)

{

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1136 -
Ai8051U   : www.STCAI.com                      MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

if(PassWord == D_PASSWORD)                    // EEPROM
{
                                              //
       EA = 0;                                // ISP/IAP 
       IAP_CONTR = IAP_EN;                    //
       IAP_TPS = (u8)(MAIN_Fosc / 1000000L);  //
       IAP_READ();
       do                                     //
       {                                      //
       IAP_ADDRE = EE_address / 65536;        //
       IAP_ADDRH = (EE_address / 256) % 256;  //
       IAP_ADDRL = EE_address % 256;
                                              // 5AH A5H  ISP/IAP 
              if(PassWord == D_PASSWORD)      //
              {                               // A5H ISP/IAP 
                                              //CPU  IAP 
                     IAP_TRIG = 0x5A;
                                               //
                     IAP_TRIG = 0xA5;
              }
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              *DataAddress = IAP_DATA;
              EE_address++;
              DataAddress++;
       }while(--number);

              DisableEEPROM();                //
              EA = 1;                         //
       }
       PassWord = 0;
}

/********************  *****************/

//========================================================================
// : void EEPROM_SectorErase(u16 EE_address)
// :  EEPROM .
// : EE_address:  EEPROM .
// : non.
// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void EEPROM_SectorErase(u32 EE_address)

{                                             // EEPROM
       if(PassWord == D_PASSWORD)

{                                             //
       EA = 0;                                //512 /
                                              //
       IAP_ADDRE = EE_address / 65536;        //
       IAP_ADDRH = (EE_address / 256) % 256;  //
       IAP_ADDRL = EE_address % 256;          //
       IAP_CONTR = IAP_EN;                    // ISP/IAP 
       IAP_TPS = (u8)(MAIN_Fosc / 1000000L);  //
       IAP_ERASE();                           //
                                              //
              if(PassWord == D_PASSWORD)

{                                             // 5AH A5H  ISP/IAP 
       IAP_TRIG = 0x5A;                       //
                                              // A5H ISP/IAP 
       IAP_TRIG = 0xA5;                       //CPU  IAP 
}

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1137 -
Ai8051U             : www.STCAI.com         MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

              _nop_();                                 //
              _nop_();                                 //
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              DisableEEPROM();
              EA = 1;
       }
       PassWord = 0;
}

//========================================================================

// : void EEPROM_write_n(u16 EE_address,u8 *DataAddress,u16 number)

// :  n  EEPROM.

// : EE_address:  EEPROM .

//  DataAddress: .

//  number:         .

// : non.

// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void EEPROM_write_n(u32 EE_address,u8 *DataAddress,u16 number)

{                                          // EEPROM
       if(PassWord == D_PASSWORD)

    {                                      //
           EA = 0;

    IAP_CONTR = IAP_EN;                    // ISP/IAP 
    IAP_TPS = (u8)(MAIN_Fosc / 1000000L);  //
    IAP_WRITE();                           //
    do
    {                                      //
    IAP_ADDRE = EE_address / 65536;        //
    IAP_ADDRH = (EE_address / 256) % 256;  //
    IAP_ADDRL = EE_address % 256;          // IAP_DATA
                                           //
           IAP_DATA = *DataAddress;
           if(PassWord == D_PASSWORD)      // 5AH A5H  ISP/IAP 
           {                               //
                                           // A5H ISP/IAP 
                  IAP_TRIG = 0x5A;         //CPU  IAP 

                  IAP_TRIG = 0xA5;
           }
           _nop_();
           _nop_();
           _nop_();
           _nop_();
           EE_address++;
           DataAddress++;
    }while(--number);

              DisableEEPROM();             //
              EA = 1;                      //
       }
       PassWord = 0;
}

// 11.0592MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                                         //

#include "intrins.h"                                         //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

#define FOSC                11059200UL
#define BRT                 (65536 - (FOSC / 115200+2) / 4)

                                                             // 2  Keil 
                                                             //

#define VREFH_ADDR          CHIPID7
#define VREFL_ADDR          CHIPID8

bit  busy;

int  BGV;

void UartIsr() interrupt 4
{

       if (TI)
       {

              TI = 0;
              busy = 0;
       }
       if (RI)
       {
              RI = 0;
       }
}

void UartInit()
{

       SCON = 0x50;
       TMOD = 0x00;
       T1x12 = 1;
       TL1 = BRT;
       TH1 = BRT >> 8;
       TR1 = 1;
       busy = 0;
}

void UartSend(char dat)
{

       while (busy);
       busy = 1;
       SBUF = dat;
}

void ADCInit()                                               // ADC 
{                                                            // ADC /2/16
                                                             // ADC , 15 
       ADCTIM = 0x3f;
       ADCCFG = 0x2f;
       ADC_CONTR = 0x8f;
}

int ADCRead()

//main.c
//

#include "config.h"           // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 

void main()
{

      u16 Res;

SYS_Init();                      //

while (1)                        // 1ms 
{
                                 // 1ms  1ms 
      if (f1ms)                  //LED 
      {

            f1ms = 0;
            ScanLed();
      }

if (f10ms)                       // 10ms 

{

                f10ms = 0;       // 10ms  10ms 

                Res = Get_ADC12bitResult(0); // ADC 

                if(Res < 4096) //

                {                            //
                      CalculateAdcKey(Res);

                }

                KeyEvents();     //

}

            if (f500ms)          // 500ms 
            {
                                 // 500ms  500ms 
                  f500ms = 0;    // RTC 
                  RTC_Update();  // LED  RTC 
                  RTC_Show();
            }
      }
}

void SYS_Init(void) //
{

 b) key.c -- 

//key.c
//

#include "config.h"  // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 

u8  ADC_KeyState=0;

u8  ADC_KeyState1=0;

u8  ADC_KeyState2=0;

u8  ADC_KeyState3=0; //

u16 ADC_KeyHoldCnt=0; //

u8  KeyCode=0;                 //, 1~16 

/***************** ADC  *****************************
 ADC , , ,.
16 , ADC  (4096 / 16) * k = 256 * k, k = 1 ~ 16, , k=16 , ADC
 4095.
        ,           , ADC_OFFSET  +/-   ,  ADC  
(256*k-ADC_OFFSET)  (256*k+ADC_OFFSET).
, ADC, 10ms.
 ADC ,  ADC ,  3  ADC 
, ADC .

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1168 -
Ai8051U          : www.STCAI.com    MCU          139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

, .
**********************************************/
#define ADC_OFFSET 64
void CalculateAdcKey(u16 adc)
{

      u8 i;
      u16 j;

if(adc < (256-ADC_OFFSET))       //
{                                // 0

      ADC_KeyState = 0;
      ADC_KeyHoldCnt = 0;
}

j = 256;                         //KEY0  ADC  256
for(i=1; i<=16; i++)             // ADC  16 

{

   if((adc >= (j - ADC_OFFSET)) && (adc <= (j + ADC_OFFSET))) break;

   j += 256;                     //
                                 //

}

ADC_KeyState3 = ADC_KeyState2;     //
ADC_KeyState2 = ADC_KeyState1;     //

if(i > 16) ADC_KeyState1 = 0;      //
else                               //

{                                  //
      ADC_KeyState1 = i;

   if((ADC_KeyState3 == ADC_KeyState2) && (ADC_KeyState2 == ADC_KeyState1) &&

      (ADC_KeyState3 > 0) && (ADC_KeyState2 > 0) && (ADC_KeyState1 > 0))

                                   // 0

   {

      if(ADC_KeyState == 0)        //

      {                            //
            KeyCode = i;

              ADC_KeyState = i;    //

              ADC_KeyHoldCnt = 0;

      }

      if(ADC_KeyState == i)        //

      {

              if(++ADC_KeyHoldCnt >= 100)        // 1 , 10  Repeat Key

              {

                 ADC_KeyHoldCnt = 90;

                                   // 10*10ms=100ms 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1169 -
Ai8051U              : www.STCAI.com         MCU   139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

                              KeyCode = i;  //
                        }
                  }                           // 0
                  else ADC_KeyHoldCnt = 0;
            }
      }
}

void KeyEvents()          // ( 1ms !!!)

{
      if(KeyCode > 0) //

      {

         SetLed(0, (BYTE)(KeyCode / 10), 0);  // 0 
         SetLed(1, (BYTE)(KeyCode % 10), 0);  // 1 

         switch (KeyCode)                     //
         {                                    // F, RTC 
                                              // E, RTC 
               case 16:                       // D, RTC 
                     RTC_SetMode();
                     break;

               case 14:
                     RTC_SetUp();
                     break;

               case 15:
                     RTC_SetDown();
                     break;

         }

            KeyCode = 0;  //
      }
}

//led.c
// 74HC595  LED 
// LED  8  SEG  8  COM  LED
// LED 

#include "config.h"       // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 

sbit DAT = P3^4;          //74HC595 

sbit SCK = P3^2;          //74HC595 ,

sbit     RCK = P3^5;      //74HC595 ,

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1170 -
Ai8051U              : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

#define LED_OFF 0x00
// LED ,LED , SEG  0  8 
#define LED_POINT 0x80 // LED 

BYTE ShowIndex;                //LED (8 )
BYTE LedBuf[8];                //8  LED 

BYTE code LED_PATTERN[10] =           // LED  0~9 
{                                     //

      0x3F, //0
      0x06, //1
      0x5B, //2
      0x4F, //3
      0x66, //4
      0x6D, //5
      0x7D, //6
      0x07, //7
      0x7F, //8
      0x6F, //9
};

void Shift_74HC595(BYTE dat)          // 74HC595
{

      BYTE i;

      for (i = 0; i < 8; i++)  //( 8Bit)
      {
                               // CY
            dat <<= 1;         // 74HC595 
            DAT = CY;          //74HC595 
            SCK = 0;           // 2 
            _nop_();
            _nop_();           //74HC595 ,
            SCK = 1;
      }
}

void Output_74HC595(void) //74HC595 

{

   RCK = 0;          //74HC595 
   _nop_();          // 2 

   _nop_();          //74HC595 ,
   RCK = 1;

}

void Led_Init(void)  //LED 
{

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1171 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com   MCU   139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      DAT = 0;        // 74HC595 
      RCK = 0;
      SCK = 0;

   LedBuf[0] = LED_OFF;      // LED ,
   LedBuf[1] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[2] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[3] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[4] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[5] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[6] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[7] = LED_OFF;

      ShowIndex = 0;         //
}

void ScanLed(void)           //LED , ( 1ms !!!)

{

   Shift_74HC595(LedBuf[ShowIndex]); // LED  74HC595

   Shift_74HC595(~(1 << ShowIndex));   // LED  COM  74HC595

   Output_74HC595();         // 74HC595  COM  LED 

      if (++ShowIndex >= 8)  //
            ShowIndex = 0;   //

}

void SetLed (BYTE nIndex,    // LED ,nIndex:,0~7  8 

         BYTE nNum,          //nNum:, 0~9,

         BOOL bShowPoint //bShowPoint:

      )

{

   if (nIndex < 8)           // 0~7

   {

      if (nNum < 10)         // 0~9

         LedBuf[nIndex] = LED_PATTERN[nNum];
                                 // LED 

      else                             //
            LedBuf[nIndex] = LED_OFF;

      if (bShowPoint)        //

         LedBuf[nIndex] |= LED_POINT;  //,

   }

}

//timer.c
//
// 0:1ms , 1ms  500ms 

#include "config.h" // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h

void Timer0_Init(void)     //1 @40.000MHz
{
                           // 0  1T 
      AUXR |= 0x80;        // 0  0
      TMOD &= 0xF0;        // 0 
      TL0 = 0xC0;          // 0 
      TH0 = 0x63;          // TF0 
      TF0 = 0;             // 0 
      TR0 = 1;             // 0 
      ET0 = 1;

      cnt10 = 0;           // 10 
      cnt500 = 0;          // 500 
      f1ms = 0;            // 1m 
      f10ms = 0;           // 10m 
      f500ms = 0;          // 500ms 
}

void Timer0_Isr(void) interrupt 1  // 0 

{

     f1ms = 1;             // 1ms 

     if (cnt10++ >= 10)    // 10 
     {
                           //,
           cnt10 = 0;      // 10ms 
           f10ms = 1;
     }

     if (cnt500++ >= 500)  // 500 
     {
                           //,
           cnt500 = 0;     // 500ms 
           f500ms = 1;
     }

void RTC_Show()           //RTC ,

{

      SetLed(3, (BYTE)(bHour % 10), 1);       // 3 

      SetLed(4, (BYTE)(bMinute / 10), 0);     // 4 
      SetLed(5, (BYTE)(bMinute % 10), 1);     // 5 

      SetLed(6, (BYTE)(bSecond / 10), 0);     // 6 
      SetLed(7, (BYTE)(bSecond % 10), 0);     // 7

void RTC_SetMode()         //RTC 
{
                           //RTC (0:->1:->

                           // RTC  3, RTC 
      bMode = 0;
}

void RTC_SetUp()           //RTC 
{
                           //,
      if (bMode == 0)      //
            return;

   switch (bMode)          ////

   {

      case 1:                     //

      if (++bHour >= 24) //

               bHour = 0;         //

      case 2:                     //

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1176 -

   break;

   if (++bSecond >= 60) //

                    bSecond = 0;  //

   break;

}

      fToggle = 1;                //, 500ms
      RTC_Show();                 //
}

void RTC_SetDown()                //RTC 
{
                                  //,
      if (bMode == 0)             //
      return;

switch (bMode)                    ////

{

   case 1:                        //
         if (--bHour >= 24)       //
               bHour = 23;        //

         break;                   //
   case 2:

   if (--bMinute >= 60) //
         bMinute = 59; //

         break;                   //
   case 3:

   if (--bSecond >= 60) //
         bSecond = 59; //

   break;

}

      fToggle = 1;                //, 500ms
      RTC_Show();                 //
}

 f) adc.c -- ADC  ADC 

//adc.c
//ADC 
// ADC  ADC 

#include "config.h" // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1177 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

void ADC_Init()       //ADC 

{

   ADCTIM = 0x3f;     // ADC ADC 

   ADCCFG = 0x2f;     // ADC /2/16

   ADC_CONTR = 0x80; // ADC 

}

u16 Get_ADC12bitResult(u8 channel)     //channel = 0~15
{

      ADC_RES = 0;
      ADC_RESL = 0;

   ADC_CONTR = (ADC_CONTR & 0xf0) | channel;             // ADC 

   ADC_START = 1;     // ADC 

   _nop_();

   _nop_();

   _nop_();

   _nop_();

   while(ADC_FLAG == 0); //wait for ADC finish

   ADC_FLAG = 0;      // ADC 

   return (((u16)ADC_RES << 8) | ADC_RESL);

}

//main.c
//

#include "config.h" // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 

void Delay2ms(void);

void main()           //
{                     //ADC  2ms 
                      // ADC 
      SYS_Init();
      Delay2ms();
      Get_ADC(3);

   while (1)               // 1ms 
   {
                           // 1ms  1ms 
         if (f1ms)         //LED 
         {

               f1ms = 0;
               ScanLed();
         }

      if (f500ms)          // 500ms 

      {
            f500ms = 0; // 500ms  500ms 
            NTC_Show(ADC_Data); // LED  NTC 
            Get_ADC(3); // ADC 

      }

   }

}

void SYS_Init(void)   //
{
                      // XFR
      EAXFR = 1;      //
      WTST = 0x00;    // XDATA
      CKCON = 0x00;

   P0M0 = 0x00; P0M1 = 0x00;  // P0 
   P1M0 = 0x00; P1M1 = 0x08;  // P1 , P1.3 
   P2M0 = 0x00; P2M1 = 0x00;  // P2 
   P3M0 = 0x00; P3M1 = 0x00;  // P3 
   P4M0 = 0x00; P4M1 = 0x00;  // P4 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1188 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      P5M0 = 0x02; P5M1 = 0x00;  // P5.1 , 
      P6M0 = 0x00; P6M1 = 0x00;  // P6 
      P7M0 = 0x00; P7M1 = 0x00;  // P7 

      usb_init();     //USB 
      Led_Init();     //LED 
      Timer0_Init();  // 0 , 1ms  500ms 
      ADC_Init();     //ADC 

      P51 = 1;        // NTC 
      EA = 1;         //
}

void Delay2ms(void) //@40.000MHz
{

      unsigned long edata i;

      _nop_();
      _nop_();
      _nop_();
      i = 19998UL;
      while (i) i--;
}

//led.c
// 74HC595  LED 
// LED  8  SEG  8  COM  LED
// LED 

#include "config.h"   // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 

sbit DAT = P3^4;      //74HC595 

sbit SCK = P3^2;      //74HC595 ,

sbit  RCK = P3^5;     //74HC595 ,

#define LED_OFF 0x00

// LED ,LED , SEG  0  8 

#define LED_          0x11 // LED 

#define LED_POINT 0x80 // LED 

BYTE ShowIndex;       //LED (8 )
BYTE LedBuf[8];       //8  LED 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1189 -
Ai8051U              : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

BYTE code LED_PATTERN[10] =           // LED  0~9 
{                                     //

      0x3F, //0
      0x06, //1
      0x5B, //2
      0x4F, //3
      0x66, //4
      0x6D, //5
      0x7D, //6
      0x07, //7
      0x7F, //8
      0x6F, //9
};

void Shift_74HC595(BYTE dat)          // 74HC595
{

      BYTE i;

      for (i = 0; i < 8; i++)  //( 8Bit)
      {
                               // CY
            dat <<= 1;         // 74HC595 
            DAT = CY;          //74HC595 
            SCK = 0;           // 2 
            _nop_();
            _nop_();           //74HC595 ,
            SCK = 1;
      }
}

void Output_74HC595(void) //74HC595 

{

   RCK = 0;          //74HC595 
   _nop_();          // 2 

   _nop_();

   RCK = 1;          //74HC595 ,

}

void Led_Init(void)  //LED 
{                    // 74HC595 

      DAT = 0;
      RCK = 0;
      SCK = 0;

   LedBuf[0] = LED_OFF;        // LED ,
   LedBuf[1] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[2] = LED_OFF;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1190 -
Ai8051U                : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

   LedBuf[3] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[4] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[5] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[6] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[7] = LED_OFF;

      ShowIndex = 0;         //
}

void ScanLed(void)           //LED , ( 1ms !!!)

{

   Shift_74HC595(LedBuf[ShowIndex]); // LED  74HC595

   Shift_74HC595(~(1 << ShowIndex));    // LED  COM  74HC595

   Output_74HC595();         // 74HC595  COM  LED 

      if (++ShowIndex >= 8)  //
            ShowIndex = 0;   //

}

void SetLed (BYTE nIndex,    // LED ,nIndex:,0~7  8 

         BYTE nNum,          //nNum:, 0~9,

         BOOL bShowPoint //bShowPoint:

      )

{                            // 0~7
      if (nIndex < 8)

   {                         // 0~9
         if (nNum < 10)

         LedBuf[nIndex] = LED_PATTERN[nNum];
                                 // LED 

      else if (nNum == 11) //"-"

         LedBuf[nIndex] = LED_;         //"-"

      else                              //
            LedBuf[nIndex] = LED_OFF;

      if (bShowPoint)        //

         LedBuf[nIndex] |= LED_POINT; //,

   }

}

#include "config.h"     // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 

bit     f1ms;           //1ms 

bit     f500ms;         //500ms 

int     cnt500;         //500 , 500ms 

void Timer0_Init(void)  //1 @40.000MHz
{
                        // 0  1T 
      AUXR |= 0x80;     // 0  0
      TMOD &= 0xF0;     // 0 
      TL0 = 0xC0;       // 0 
      TH0 = 0x63;       // TF0 
      TF0 = 0;          // 0 
      TR0 = 1;          // 0 
      ET0 = 1;

      cnt500 = 0;       // 500 
      f1ms = 0;         // 1m 
      f500ms = 0;       // 500ms 
}

void Timer0_Isr(void) interrupt 1  // 0 

{

     f1ms = 1;          // 1ms 

     if (cnt500++ >= 500) // 500 

     {

        cnt500 = 0;     //,
        f500ms = 1;     // 500ms 

     }

}

/********************  ***********************************************/
// : 0 -40.0 , 400  0 , 650  25.0 ,  1600  120.0 .
// , ADC  12bit  ADC .
/**********************************************/

#define D_SCALE 10 //,  10 

u16 get_temperature(u16 adc)

{

   u16 code *p;

   u16 i;

   u8          j,k,min,max;

   adc = 4096 - adc;         //Rt 
   p = temp_table;           //

   if(adc < p[0])      return (0xfffe);

   if(adc > p[160]) return (0xffff);

   min = 0;                  //-40 
   max = 160;                //120 

   for(j=0; j<5; j++)        // 5 

   {

         k = min / 2 + max / 2;

         if(adc <= p[k]) max = k;

         else                min = k;

   }

   if(adc == p[min])         i = min * D_SCALE;

                       // ADC  10 

   else if(adc == p[max]) i = max * D_SCALE;
                           // ADC  10 

   else                // min < temp < max

   {

         while(min <= max) //

         {

               min++;

               if(adc == p[min]) {i = min * D_SCALE; break;}

                             // ADC  p[min]  10 

               else if(adc < p[min]) // ADC  p[min-1]  p[min] 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1197 -
Ai8051U          : www.STCAI.com               MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

              {

                 min--;

                 i = p[min];     //min

                 j = (adc - i) * D_SCALE / (p[min+1] - i);

                 i = min;

                 i *= D_SCALE;

                 i += j;

                 break;

              }

         }

   }

   return i;

}

void NTC_Show(u16 adc)     //NTC 
{

      u16 temp;

   if(temp > 4095) return; // ADC 

   // ADC 

   if((adc / 1000) == 0)

   {

         SetLed(0, 12, 0); // 0 0 

   }

   else

   {

         SetLed(0, (BYTE)(adc / 1000), 0); // 0  ADC 

   }

   SetLed(1, (BYTE)((adc % 1000) / 100), 0);  // 1  ADC 
   SetLed(2, (BYTE)((adc % 100) / 10), 0);    // 2  ADC 
   SetLed(3, (BYTE)(adc % 10), 0);            // 3  ADC 

   temp = get_temperature(adc);   //

   if(temp >= 400) F0 = 0, temp -= 400;       // >= 0 

   else          F0 = 1, temp = 400 - temp; // < 0 

   if(F0)                        // 4 "-"
   {                             // 0 4 

         SetLed(4, 11, 0);
   }
   else if((temp / 1000) == 0)
   {

         SetLed(4, 12, 0);
   }

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1198 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      else                                        // 4  ADC 
      {
                                                  // 5  ADC 
            SetLed(4, (BYTE)(temp / 1000), 0);    // 6  ADC 
      }                                           // 7  ADC 
      SetLed(5, (BYTE)((temp % 1000) / 100), 0);
      SetLed(6, (BYTE)((temp % 100) / 10), 1);
      SetLed(7, (BYTE)(temp % 10), 0);
}

{                                      //(32 )
                                       //XFR

                                       //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                      // 0 
                                       // xdata 
       WTST = 0;                       // 0 

       CKCON = 0;

P0M0 = 0x00;
P0M1 = 0x00;
P1M0 = 0x00;
P1M1 = 0x00;
P2M0 = 0x00;
P2M1 = 0x00;
P3M0 = 0x00;
P3M1 = 0x00;
P4M0 = 0x00;
P4M1 = 0x00;
P5M0 = 0x00;
P5M1 = 0x00;

       CCON = 0x00;                    //PCA 
       CMOD = 0x08;
       CL = 0x00;                      //PCA  0  PWM 
       CH = 0x00;                      //PCA  0  6  PWM
//6  PWM                               //PWM  50%[(40H-20H)/40H]
       CCAPM0 = 0x42;
       PCA_PWM0 = 0x80;                //PCA  1  PWM 
       CCAP0L = 0x20;                  //PCA  1  7  PWM
       CCAP0H = 0x20;                  //PWM  75%[(80H-20H)/80H]
//7  PWM
       CCAPM1 = 0x42;                  //PCA  2  PWM 
       PCA_PWM1 = 0x40;                //PCA  2  8  PWM
       CCAP1L = 0x20;                  //PWM  87.5%[(100H-20H)/100H]
       CCAP1H = 0x20;
//8  PWM                               //PCA  2  PWM

// CCAP2L = 0x20;
// CCAP2H = 0x20;
//10  PWM
       CCAPM2 = 0x42;

24.4.2 PCA 

C 

// 11.0592MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                                   //

#include "intrins.h"                                   //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

unsigned char         cnt;                             // PCA 
unsigned long         count0;                          //
unsigned long         count1;                          //
unsigned long         length;                          //

void PCA_Isr() interrupt 7                             //PCA +1
{                                                      //
                                                       //length 
       if (CCON & CF)
       {

              CCON &= ~CF;
              cnt++;
       }
       if (CCON & CCF0)
       {
              CCON &= ~CCF0;
              count0 = count1;
              ((unsigned char *)&count1)[3] = CCAP0L;
              ((unsigned char *)&count1)[2] = CCAP0H;
              ((unsigned char *)&count1)[1] = cnt;
              ((unsigned char *)&count1)[0] = 0;
              length = count1 - count0;
       }
}

void main()                                            //XFR
{                                                      //(32 )
                                                       //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                                      //(8 )
                                                       //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                                      // 0 
                                                       // xdata 
       WTST = 0;                                       // 0 

       CKCON = 0;

P0M0 = 0x00;
P0M1 = 0x00;
P1M0 = 0x00;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1216 -
Ai8051U                : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       P1M1 = 0x00;                                  //
       P2M0 = 0x00;
       P2M1 = 0x00;                                  //PCA , PCA 
       P3M0 = 0x00;                                  //PCA  0  16 
       P3M1 = 0x00;                                  //PCA  0  16 
       P4M0 = 0x00;                                  //PCA  0  16 
       P4M1 = 0x00;
       P5M0 = 0x00;                                         // PCA 
       P5M1 = 0x00;

       cnt = 0;
       count0 = 0;
       count1 = 0;
       length = 0;
       CCON = 0x00;
       CMOD = 0x09;
       CL = 0x00;
       CH = 0x00;
       CCAPM0 = 0x11;
// CCAPM0 = 0x21;
// CCAPM0 = 0x31;
       CCAP0L = 0x00;
       CCAP0H = 0x00;
       CCON |= CR;
       EA = 1;

       while (1);
}

24.4.3 PCA  16 

C 

// 11.0592MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                                    //

#include "intrins.h"                                    //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

#define T50HZ                (11059200L / 12 / 2 / 50)

unsigned int           value;

void PCA_Isr() interrupt 7                              //
{

       CCON &= ~CCF0;
       CCAP0L = value;
       CCAP0H = value >> 8;
       value += T50HZ;

       P10 = !P10;
}

void main()                                             //XFR
{

       EAXFR = 1;

       CKCON = 0;                                   //(8 )
                                                    //
       P0M0 = 0x00;                                 // 0 
       P0M1 = 0x00;                                 // xdata 
       P1M0 = 0x00;                                 // 0 
       P1M1 = 0x00;
       P2M0 = 0x00;                                 //PCA /12
       P2M1 = 0x00;                                 //PCA  0  16 
       P3M0 = 0x00;
       P3M1 = 0x00;                                        // PCA 
       P4M0 = 0x00;
       P4M1 = 0x00;
       P5M0 = 0x00;
       P5M1 = 0x00;

       CCON = 0x00;
       CMOD = 0x00;
       CL = 0x00;
       CH = 0x00;
       CCAPM0 = 0x49;
       value = T50HZ;
       CCAP0L = value;
       CCAP0H = value >> 8;
       value += T50HZ;
       CCON |= CR;
       EA = 1;

       while (1);
}

// 11.0592MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                   //

#include "intrins.h"                   //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

sbit  SS                      = P1^0;
                              = P1^1;
sbit  LED

void main()                            //XFR
{                                      //(32 )
                                       //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                      //(8 )
                                       //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                      // 0 
                                       // xdata 
       WTST = 0;                       // 0 

       CKCON = 0;

      P0M0 = 0x00;
      P0M1 = 0x00;
      P1M0 = 0x00;
      P1M1 = 0x00;
      P2M0 = 0x00;
      P2M1 = 0x00;
      P3M0 = 0x00;
      P3M1 = 0x00;
      P4M0 = 0x00;
      P4M1 = 0x00;
      P5M0 = 0x00;
      P5M1 = 0x00;

      LED = 1;                         // SPI 
      SS = 1;                          //

      SPCTL = 0x50;
      SPSTAT = 0xc0;

       while (1)                       // SS 
       {                               //
                                       //
              SS = 0;                  //
              SPDAT = 0x5a;            // SS 
              while (!SPIF);           //
              SPIF = 1;
              SS = 1;
              LED = !LED;
       }
}

 b) led.c --  LED 

//led.c
// SPI  74HC595  LED 
// LED  8  SEG  8  COM  LED
// LED 

#include "config.h" // ai8051u.h 

sbit P_HC595_SER = P3^4;            //74HC595 
sbit P_HC595_RCLK = P3^5;           //74HC595 ,
sbit P_HC595_SRCLK = P3^2;          //74HC595 ,

BYTE ShowIndex;               //LED (8 )
BYTE LedBuf[8];               //8  LED 

BYTE code LED_PATTERN[12] =         // LED  0~9 

{

   0x3F, //0 //

   0x06, //1

   0x5B, //2

   0x4F, //3

   0x66, //4

   0x6D, //5

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1243 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      0x7D,  //6
      0x07,  //7
      0x7F,  //8
      0x6F,  //9
      0x00,  //black
      0x40,  //-
};

void Shift_74HC595(BYTE dat) // 74HC595

{                             // SPI 
      P_HC595_RCLK = 0;       // SPI 
      SPDAT = dat;

   while(SPIF == 0) ;         //
   P_HC595_RCLK = 1;          // SPI 

   SPIF = 1;                  // SPIF 
   WCOL = 1;                  // WCOL 

}

void Led_Init(void) //LED 

{

   SSIG = 1;          // SS  MSTR 
   SPEN = 1;          // SPI 
   DORD = 0;          /// MSB

   MSTR = 1;          //
   CPOL = 1;          //SCLK SCLK 

   CPHA = 1;          // SCLK 

   SPCTL = (SPCTL & ~3) | 2;  //SPI , 0: 4T, 1: 8T, 2: 16T, 3: 2T

   SPI_S1 = 1;        // SPI 

   SPI_S0 = 1;        //00: P1.4 P1.5 P1.6 P1.7, 01: P2.4 P2.5 P2.6 P2.7,

                      //10: P4.0 P4.1 P4.2 P4.3, 11: P3.5 P3.4 P3.3 P3.2

   P_HC595_SRCLK = 0;         // 74HC595 
   P_HC595_SER = 1;
   SPIF = 1;                  // SPIF 
   WCOL = 1;                  // WCOL 

   LedBuf[0] = LED_OFF;       // LED ,
   LedBuf[1] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[2] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[3] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[4] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[5] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[6] = LED_OFF;
   LedBuf[7] = LED_OFF;

   ShowIndex = 0;             //

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1244 -
Ai8051U                 : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

}

void ScanLed(void)           //LED , ( 1ms !!!)

{

     Shift_74HC595(LedBuf[ShowIndex]); // LED  74HC595

     Shift_74HC595(~(1 << ShowIndex));   // LED  COM  74HC595

      if (++ShowIndex >= 8)  //
            ShowIndex = 0;   //

}

void SetLed (BYTE nIndex,    // LED ,nIndex:,0~7  8 

           BYTE nNum,        //nNum:, 0~9, ,-,

           BOOL bShowPoint //bShowPoint:

        )

{

     if (nIndex < 8)         // 0~7

     {

        if (nNum < 12)       // 0~9, ,-

              LedBuf[nIndex] = LED_PATTERN[nNum];

                             // LED 

        else

              LedBuf[nIndex] = LED_OFF; //

        if (bShowPoint)      //

              LedBuf[nIndex] |= LED_POINT; //,

     }

}

#include "config.h" // ai8051u.h, ai_usb.h 

bit     f1ms;           //1ms 

bit     f1s;            //1s 

int     cnt1000; //1000 , 1000ms 

void Timer0_Init(void)       //1 @40.000MHz
{
                             // 0  1T

      TMOD &= 0xF0;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1245 -
Ai8051U              : www.STCAI.com   MCU     139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      TL0 = 0xC0;             // 0 
      TH0 = 0x63;             // 0 
      TF0 = 0;                // TF0 
      TR0 = 1;                // 0 
      ET0 = 1;                // 0 

      cnt1000 = 0;            // 1000 
      f1ms = 0;               // 1ms 
      f1s = 0;                // 1s 
}

void Timer0_Isr(void) interrupt 1  // 0 

{

   f1ms = 1;                       // 1ms 

      if (cnt1000++ >= 1000)       // 1000 
      {
                                   //,
            cnt1000 = 0;           // 1000ms 
            f1s = 1;
      }
}

 d) rtc.c -- RTC 

//rtc.c
// RTC 
// RTC 

#include "config.h" // ai8051u.h 

BYTE bHour;          //RTC 
BYTE bMinute;        //RTC 
BYTE bSecond;        //RTC 

void RTC_Init()      //RTC 
{                    // 12:30:00

      bHour = 12;
      bMinute = 30;
      bSecond = 0;
}

void RTC_Update() //RTC , ( 1s !!!)

{                                  // 1, 60
      if (++bSecond >= 60)

   {

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1246 -
Ai8051U                : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

         bSecond = 0;         //

         if (++bMinute >= 60) // 1, 60

         {

            bMinute = 0;      //

            if (++bHour >= 24) // 1, 24

            {                 //
                  bHour = 0;

            }

         }

   }

}

void RTC_Show()        //RTC ,

{

   SetLed(0, (BYTE)(bHour / 10), 0);    // 0 

   SetLed(1, (BYTE)(bHour % 10), 0);    // 1 

   SetLed(2, LED_, 0);                  // 2 "-"

   SetLed(3, (BYTE)(bMinute / 10), 0);  // 3 

   SetLed(4, (BYTE)(bMinute % 10), 0);  // 4 

   SetLed(5, LED_, 0);                  // 5 "-"

   SetLed(6, (BYTE)(bSecond / 10), 0);  // 6 

   SetLed(7, (BYTE)(bSecond % 10), 0); // 7 

}

#include "Ai8051U.H"                     //

#include "intrins.h"                     //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

#define FOSC 12000000UL

#define  HSCK_MCLK             0
#define  HSCK_PLL              1
#define  HSCK_SEL              HSCK_PLL

#define  PLL_96M               0
#define  PLL_144M              1
#define  PLL_SEL               PLL_96M

#define  CKMS                  0x80
#define  HSIOCK                0x40
#define  MCK2SEL_MSK           0x0c
#define  MCK2SEL_SEL1          0x00
#define  MCK2SEL_PLL           0x04
#define  MCK2SEL_PLLD2         0x08
#define  MCK2SEL_IRC48         0x0c
#define  MCKSEL_MSK            0x03
#define  MCKSEL_HIRC           0x00
#define  MCKSEL_XOSC           0x01
#define  MCKSEL_X32K           0x02
#define  MCKSEL_IRC32K         0x03

#define  ENCKM                 0x80
#define  PCKI_MSK              0x60
#define  PCKI_D1               0x00
#define  PCKI_D2               0x20
#define  PCKI_D4               0x40
#define  PCKI_D8               0x60

void delay()
{

       int i;

       for (i=0; i<100; i++);
}

void main()                              //XFR
{                                        //(32 )
                                         //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                        //(8 )
                                         //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                        // 0 

       WTST = 0;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1260 -
Ai8051U            : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       CKCON = 0;                                // xdata 
                                                 // 0 

      // PLL                        // PLL  96M  PLL 
#if (PLL_SEL == PLL_96M)            // PLL  144M  PLL 
                                    // PLL  96M  PLL 
       CLKSEL &= ~CKMS;
#elif (PLL_SEL == PLL_144M)

       CLKSEL |= CKMS;
#else

       CLKSEL &= ~CKMS;
#endif

      // PLL , 12M                  //PLL  1 
       USBCLK &= ~PCKI_MSK;         //PLL  2 
#if (FOSC == 12000000UL)            //PLL  4 
       USBCLK |= PCKI_D1;           //PLL  8 
#elif (FOSC == 24000000UL)          // PLL  1 
       USBCLK |= PCKI_D2;
#elif (FOSC == 48000000UL)
       USBCLK |= PCKI_D4;
#elif (FOSC == 96000000UL)
       USBCLK |= PCKI_D8;
#else
       USBCLK |= PCKI_D1;
#endif

// PLL                              // PLL 
USBCLK |= ENCKM;

delay();                            // PLL 

      // HSPWM/HSSPI                //HSPWM/HSSPI 
#if (HSCK_SEL == HSCK_MCLK)         //HSPWM/HSSPI  PLL 
                                    // HSPWM/HSSPI 
       CLKSEL &= ~HSIOCK;
#elif (HSCK_SEL == HSCK_PLL)

       CLKSEL |= HSIOCK;
#else

       CLKSEL &= ~HSIOCK;
#endif

HSCLKDIV = 0;                       //HSPWM/HSSPI 

SPCTL = 0xd0;                       // SPI , SPI /4
HSSPI_CFG2 |= 0x20;                 // SPI 

P1M0 = 0x28;
P1M1 = 0x00;

       while (1)
       {

              SPSTAT = 0xc0;
              SPDAT = 0x5a;
              while (!SPIF);
       }
}

//_nop_()

sbit  SDA                = P1^4;
                         = P1^5;
sbit  SCL

bit   busy;

void I2C_Isr() interrupt 24               //
{

       if (I2CMSST & 0x40)
       {

              I2CMSST &= ~0x40;
              busy = 0;
       }
}

void Start()                              // START 
{

       busy = 1;
       I2CMSCR = 0x81;
       while (busy);
}

void SendData(char dat)                   //
{                                         // SEND 

       I2CTXD = dat;
       busy = 1;
       I2CMSCR = 0x82;
       while (busy);
}

void RecvACK()                            // ACK 
{

       busy = 1;
       I2CMSCR = 0x83;
       while (busy);
}

char RecvData()                           // RECV 
{

       busy = 1;
       I2CMSCR = 0x84;
       while (busy);
       return I2CRXD;
}

void SendACK()                            // ACK 
{

       I2CMSST = 0x00;

{
                                                      //XFR
       I2CMSST = 0x01;                                //(32 )
       busy = 1;                                      //XFR
       I2CMSCR = 0x85;                                //(8 )

}                                                     // 0

void Stop()                                           // 0 
{
                                                      // I2C 
       busy = 1;
       I2CMSCR = 0x86;
       while (busy);
}

{

       int i;

       for (i=0; i<3000; i++)
       {

              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
              _nop_();
       }
}

              }
              else

              }

              isda = 1;

RecvACK();
SendData(0x00);
RecvACK();
SendData(0x12);
RecvACK();
SendData(0x78);
RecvACK();
Stop();

Start();
SendData(0x5a);
RecvACK();
SendData(0x00);
RecvACK();
Start();
SendData(0x5b);
RecvACK();
P0 = RecvData();
SendACK();
P2 = RecvData();
SendNAK();
Stop();

       while (1);
}

29.10.1 PWMA+PWMB  8 

// 12MHz

/*************  **************
 AI32G12K128  9 .
 PWMA+PWMB  8 .

PWMA  SYSclk/2
PWMA  1 1ms
PWMA  2 2ms
PWMA  3 4ms
PWMA  4 5ms

PWMB  SYSclk/10000
PWMB  1 1s
PWMB  2 2s
PWMB  3 3s
PWMB  4 4s

,  24MHZ ().
******************************************/

#include "Ai8051U.H"

#include "intrins.h"                                 //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

#define MAIN_Fosc 24000000L                          //

#define  PSCRA        2                              // 1ms(1KHz)
#define  PWMA_T1      MAIN_Fosc/PSCRA/1000           // 2ms(500Hz)
#define  PWMA_T2      MAIN_Fosc/PSCRA/500            // 4ms(250Hz)
#define  PWMA_T3      MAIN_Fosc/PSCRA/250            // 5ms(200Hz)
#define  PWMA_T4      MAIN_Fosc/PSCRA/200

#define  PSCRB        10000                          // 1s
#define  PWMB_T5      MAIN_Fosc/PSCRB*1              // 2s
#define  PWMB_T6      MAIN_Fosc/PSCRB*2              // 3s
#define  PWMB_T7      MAIN_Fosc/PSCRB*3              // 4s
#define  PWMB_T8      MAIN_Fosc/PSCRB*4

typedef  unsigned char u8;
typedef  unsigned int u16;
typedef  unsigned long u32;

/*****************************************************************************/

void PWMA_Timer();
void PWMB_Timer();

u16 cnt1, cnt2, cnt3, cnt4, cnt5, cnt6, cnt7, cnt8;

/********************  **************************/
void main(void)

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1386 -
Ai8051U             : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

{                                                 //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                                 //(32 )
                                                  //XFR
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                                 //(8 )
                                                  //
   WTST = 0;                                      // 0 
                                                  // xdata 
   CKCON = 0;                                     // 0 

   P0M1 = 0x00;    P0M0 = 0x00;                   //
   P1M1 = 0x00;    P1M0= 0x00;                    //
   P2M1 = 0x00;    P2M0= 0x00;                    //
   P3M1 = 0x00;    P3M0= 0x00;                    //
   P4M1 = 0x00;    P4M0= 0x00;                    //
   P5M1 = 0x00;    P5M0= 0x00;                    //
   P6M1 = 0x00;    P6M0= 0x00;                    //
   P7M1 = 0x00;    P7M0= 0x00;                    //

   PWMA_Timer();                     // LED 
   PWMB_Timer();                     //

   P40 = 0;
   EA = 1;

       while (1);
}

//========================================================================
// : void PWMA_Timer()

// : PWMA .

//========================================================================

void PWMA_Timer()

{

   PWMA_PSCRH = (PSCRA-1) >> 8;      //
   PWMA_PSCRL = (PSCRA-1);

   PWMA_ARRH = 0xff;

   PWMA_ARRL =0xff;

   PWMA_CCER1 = 0x00;

   PWMA_CCMR1 = 0x00;

   PWMA_CCMR2 = 0x00;

   PWMA_CCMR3 = 0x00;

   PWMA_CCMR4 = 0x00;

   cnt1 = PWMA_T1;

   cnt2 = PWMA_T2;

   cnt3 = PWMA_T3;

   cnt4 = PWMA_T4;

   PWMA_CCR1H = cnt1 >> 8;

   PWMA_CCR1L = cnt1;

   PWMA_CCR2H = cnt2 >> 8;

   PWMA_CCR2L = cnt2;

   PWMA_CCR3H = cnt3 >> 8;

   PWMA_CCR3L = cnt3;

   PWMA_CCR4H = cnt4 >> 8;

   PWMA_CCR4L = cnt4;                // 
   PWMA_IER = 0x1e;                  // ARR 
   PWMA_CR1 |= 0x81;

   cnt1 += PWMA_T1;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1387 -
Ai8051U             : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       cnt2 += PWMA_T2;
       cnt3 += PWMA_T3;
       cnt4 += PWMA_T4;
}

//========================================================================

// : void PWMB_Timer()
// : PWMB .

//========================================================================

void PWMB_Timer()

{

   PWMB_PSCRH = (PSCRB-1) >> 8;

   PWMB_PSCRL = (PSCRB-1);           //

   PWMB_ARRH = 0xff;

   PWMB_ARRL =0xff;

   PWMB_CCER1 = 0x00;

   PWMB_CCMR1 = 0x00;

   PWMB_CCMR2 = 0x00;

   PWMB_CCMR3 = 0x00;

   PWMB_CCMR4 = 0x00;

   cnt5 = PWMB_T5;

   cnt6 = PWMB_T6;

   cnt7 = PWMB_T7;

   cnt8 = PWMB_T8;

   PWMB_CCR5H = cnt5 >> 8;

   PWMB_CCR5L = cnt5;

   PWMB_CCR6H = cnt6 >> 8;

   PWMB_CCR6L = cnt6;

   PWMB_CCR7H = cnt7 >> 8;

   PWMB_CCR7L = cnt7;

   PWMB_CCR8H = cnt8 >> 8;

   PWMB_CCR8L = cnt8;                // 
   PWMB_IER = 0x1e;

   PWMB_CR1 |= 0x81;                 // ARR 

       cnt5 += PWMB_T5;
       cnt6 += PWMB_T6;
       cnt7 += PWMB_T7;
       cnt8 += PWMB_T8;
}

//========================================================================
// : PWMA_ISR() interrupt 26
// : PWMA .
//========================================================================
void PWMA_ISR() interrupt 26
{

       u8 sr;

   sr = PWMA_SR1;
   PWMA_SR1 = 0;

   if (sr & 0x02)                    //
   {                                 //

          PWMA_CCR1H = cnt1 >> 8;
          PWMA_CCR1L = cnt1;
          cnt1 += PWMA_T1;
          P60 = ~P60;
   }

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1388 -
Ai8051U         : www.STCAI.com         MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       if (sr & 0x04)                               //
       {                                            //

              PWMA_CCR2H = cnt2 >> 8;               //
              PWMA_CCR2L = cnt2;                    //
              cnt2 += PWMA_T2;
              P61 = ~P61;                           //
       }                                            //
       if (sr & 0x08)
       {
              PWMA_CCR3H = cnt3 >> 8;
              PWMA_CCR3L = cnt3;
              cnt3 += PWMA_T3;
              P62 = ~P62;
       }
       if (sr & 0x10)
       {
              PWMA_CCR4H = cnt4 >> 8;
              PWMA_CCR4L = cnt4;
              cnt4 += PWMA_T4;
              P63 = ~P63;
       }
}

//========================================================================
// : PWMB_ISR() interrupt 27
// : PWMB .
//========================================================================
void PWMB_ISR() interrupt 27
{

       u8 sr;

sr = PWMB_SR1;
PWMB_SR1 = 0;

if (sr & 0x02)                         //
{                                      //

       PWMB_CCR5H = cnt5 >> 8;         //
       PWMB_CCR5L = cnt5;              //
       cnt5 += PWMB_T5;
       P64 = ~P64;                     //
}                                      //
if (sr & 0x04)
{                                      //
       PWMB_CCR6H = cnt6 >> 8;
       PWMB_CCR6L = cnt6;
       cnt6 += PWMB_T6;
       P65 = ~P65;
}
if (sr & 0x08)
{
       PWMB_CCR7H = cnt7 >> 8;
       PWMB_CCR7L = cnt7;
       cnt7 += PWMB_T7;
       P66 = ~P66;
}
if (sr & 0x10)
{
       PWMB_CCR8H = cnt8 >> 8;
       PWMB_CCR8L = cnt8;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1389 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

              cnt8 += PWMB_T8;                      //
              P67 = ~P67;
       }
}

void PWM_Init();

void main()
{

       SYS_Init();
       PWM_Init();

       while (1);
}

void SYS_Init()                        //XFR
{                                      //(32 )
                                       //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                      //(8 )
                                       //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                      // 0 
                                       // xdata 
       WTST = 0;                       // 0 

       CKCON = 0;

       P0M1 = 0x00; P0M0 = 0x00;
       P1M1 = 0x00; P1M0 = 0x00;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1390 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com         MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       P2M1 = 0x00; P2M0 = 0x00;
       P3M1 = 0x00; P3M0 = 0x00;
       P4M1 = 0x00; P4M0 = 0x00;
       P5M1 = 0x00; P5M0 = 0x00;
       P6M1 = 0x00; P6M0 = 0x00;
       P7M1 = 0x00; P7M0 = 0x00;
}

void PWM_Init()                              // CCMRx  CCxE 
{                                            // PWM  1
                                             //
       PWMA_CCER1 = 0x00;                    //
       PWMA_CCMR1 = 0x60;
       PWMA_CCER1 = 0x01;                    //
       PWMA_ARRH = (char)(PWM_PERIOD >> 8);
       PWMA_ARRL = (char)(PWM_PERIOD);       // PWM 
       PWMA_CCR1H = (char)(PWM_DUTY >> 8);   //
       PWMA_CCR1L = (char)(PWM_DUTY);        //
       PWMA_ENO = 0x01;
       PWMA_BKR = 0x80;
       PWMA_CR1 = 0x01;
}
