29.10.5  PWM --

// 24MHz
/*************  **************
 PWM  PWM .
/, /.
 P6 , 10ms  PWM, 10 .
 1ms  PWM .
, 24MHZ ().

******************************************/

#include "Ai8051U.H"                                  //

#include "intrins.h"                                  //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

#define MAIN_Fosc      24000000L

typedef unsigned char  u8;

typedef unsigned int   u16;

typedef unsigned long  u32;

/****************************** ***********************************/

#define Timer0_Reload  (65536UL -(MAIN_Fosc / 1000))  //Timer0 ,1000 /

/*****************************************************************************/

#define  PWM1_1        0x00                           //P:P1.0 N:P1.1
#define  PWM1_2        0x01                           //P:P2.0 N:P2.1
#define  PWM1_3        0x02                           //P:P6.0 N:P6.1

#define PWM2_1         0x00                           //P:P1.2 N:P1.3
#define PWM2_2         0x04                           //P:P2.2 N:P2.3

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1394 -
Ai8051U            : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

#define PWM2_3              0x08                  //P:P6.2 N:P6.3

#define  PWM3_1             0x00                    //P:P1.4 N:P1.5
#define  PWM3_2             0x10                    //P:P2.4 N:P2.5
#define  PWM3_3             0x20                    //P:P6.4 N:P6.5

#define  PWM4_1             0x00                    //P:P1.6  N:P1.7
#define  PWM4_2             0x40                    //P:P2.6  N:P2.7
#define  PWM4_3             0x80                    //P:P6.6  N:P6.7
#define  PWM4_4             0xC0                    //P:P3.4  N:P3.3

#define  ENO1P     0x01
#define  ENO1N     0x02
#define  ENO2P     0x04
#define  ENO2N     0x08
#define  ENO3P     0x10
#define  ENO3N     0x20
#define  ENO4P     0x40
#define  ENO4N     0x80

/***************************/                       //1ms 
bit B_1ms;
bit PWM1_Flag;

u16 Period;
u8 Counter;
u8 msSecond;

void UpdatePwm(void);
void TxPulse(void);

/********************  **************************/

void main(void)

{                                                   //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                                   //(32 )
                                                    //XFR
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                                   //(8 )
       WTST = 0;                                    //
       CKCON = 0;                                   // 0 
                                                    // xdata 
                                                    // 0 

P0M1 = 0x00;       P0M0 = 0x00;                     //
P1M1 = 0x00;       P1M0 = 0x00;                     //
P2M1 = 0x00;       P2M0 = 0x00;                     //
P3M1 = 0x00;       P3M0 = 0x00;                     //
P4M1 = 0x00;       P4M0 = 0x00;                     //
P5M1 = 0x00;       P5M0 = 0x00;                     //
P6M1 = 0x00;       P6M0 = 0x00;                     //
P7M1 = 0x00;       P7M0 = 0x00;                     //

PWM1_Flag = 0;
Counter = 0;
Period = 0x1000;

//Timer0                                            //Timer0 set as 1T,16 bits timer auto-reload,
AUXR = 0x80;
TH0 = (u8)(Timer0_Reload / 256);

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1395 -
Ai8051U              : www.STCAI.com           MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

   TL0 = (u8)(Timer0_Reload % 256);                         //Timer0 interrupt enable
   ET0 = 1;                                                 //Tiner0 run
   TR0 = 1;

   PWMA_ENO = 0x00;                           //
   PWMA_ENO |= ENO1P;
                                              // PWM 
   PWMA_PS = 0x00;                            // PWM1_3 
   PWMA_PS |= PWM1_3;
                                              //
   UpdatePwm();                               //
   PWMA_BKR = 0x80;
   PWMA_CR1 |= 0x01;                          // LED 
                                              //
   P40 = 0;
   EA = 1;

       while (1)                              //10ms  PWM 
       {

              if(B_1ms)
              {

                     B_1ms = 0;
                     msSecond++;
                     if(msSecond >= 10)
                     {

                            msSecond = 0;
                            TxPulse();
                     }
              }
       }
}

/*************  **************/               // CCMRx  CCxE          
void TxPulse(void)                            // PWM1  1 
{                                             // CC1E , 
                                              //
       PWMA_CCER1 = 0x00;                     //
       PWMA_CCMR1 = 0x60;                     //
       PWMA_CCER1 = 0x01;                     /// 1 
       PWMA_SR1 = 0;
       PWMA_CNTRH = 0;
       PWMA_CNTRL = 0;
       PWMA_IER = 0x02;
}

/**********************        Timer0 1ms  ************************/

void timer0(void) interrupt 1

{

   B_1ms = 1;

   if(PWM1_Flag)

   {                                          //
          Period++;

         if(Period >= 0x1000) PWM1_Flag = 0;

   }

   else

   {                                          //
          Period--;

         if(Period <= 0x0100) PWM1_Flag = 1;

   }

   UpdatePwm();                               //

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1396 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com      MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

}

/******************* PWM  ********************/  //
void PWMA_ISR() interrupt 26
{

       if(PWMA_SR1 & 0X02)
       {

              PWMA_SR1 &=~0X02;

              Counter++;                         // 10  PWM 
              if(Counter >= 10)
              {                                  // CCMRx  CCxE             
                                                 // PWM1 
                     Counter = 0;                // CC1E , 
                     PWMA_CCER1 = 0x00;          //
                     PWMA_CCMR1 = 0x40;
                     PWMA_CCER1 = 0x01;
                     PWMA_IER = 0x00;
              }
       }
}

//========================================================================
// : UpdatePwm(void)
// :  PWM .

// : none.
// : none.
// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void UpdatePwm(void)

{

   PWMA_ARRH = (u8)(Period >> 8);

   PWMA_ARRL = (u8)Period;                       //: Period/2
   PWMA_CCR1 = (u8)((Period >> 1) >> 8);

   PWMA_CCR1 = (u8)(Period >> 1);

}

#define Timer0_Reload (65536UL -(MAIN_Fosc / 1000))  //Timer 0 , 1000 /

#define  PWM1_1        0x01                          //P:P2.0 N:P2.1

#define  PWM2_1        0x04                          //P:P2.2 N:P2.3
#define  PWM2_2        0x08                          //P:P6.2 N:P6.3

#define  PWM3_0        0x00                          //P:P1.4 N:P1.5
#define  PWM3_1        0x10                          //P:P2.4 N:P2.5
#define  PWM3_2        0x20                          //P:P6.4 N:P6.5

#define  PWM4_0        0x00                          //P:P1.6  N:P1.7
#define  PWM4_1        0x40                          //P:P2.6  N:P2.7
#define  PWM4_2        0x80                          //P:P6.6  N:P6.7
#define  PWM4_3        0xC0                          //P:P3.4  N:P3.3

#define  ENO1P         0x01
#define  ENO1N         0x02
#define  ENO2P         0x04
#define  ENO2N         0x08
#define  ENO3P         0x10
#define  ENO3N         0x20
#define  ENO4P         0x40
#define  ENO4N         0x80

/*****************************************************************************/

/***************************/                        //1ms 
bit B_1ms;
bit PWM1_Flag;

u16 Period;
u8 msSecond;

void UpdatePwm(void);
void TxPulse(u8 rep);

/********************  **************************/

void main(void)

{                                                    //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                                    //(32 )
                                                     //XFR
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                                    //(8 )
       WTST = 0;                                     //
       CKCON = 0;                                    // 0 
                                                     // xdata 
                                                     // 0 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1398 -
Ai8051U           : www.STCAI.com           MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

    P0M1 = 0x00;  P0M0 = 0x00;                          //
    P1M1 = 0x00;  P1M0 = 0x00;                          //
    P2M1 = 0x00;  P2M0 = 0x00;                          //
    P3M1 = 0x00;  P3M0 = 0x00;                          //
    P4M1 = 0x00;  P4M0 = 0x00;                          //
    P5M1 = 0x00;  P5M0 = 0x00;                          //
    P6M1 = 0x00;  P6M0 = 0x00;                          //
    P7M1 = 0x00;  P7M0 = 0x00;                          //

    PWM1_Flag = 0;                         //Timer0 
    Period = 0x1000;                       //Timer0 set as 1T, 16 bits timer auto-reload,

    AUXR = 0x80;                           //Timer0 interrupt enable
    TH0 = (u8)(Timer0_Reload / 256);       //Tiner0 run
    TL0 = (u8)(Timer0_Reload % 256);
    ET0 = 1;
    TR0 = 1;

       PWMA_ENO = 0x00;                    //
       PWMA_ENO |= ENO1P;
                                           // CCMRx  CCxE  
       PWMA_CCER1 = 0x00;                  // PWM1  1 
       PWMA_CCMR1 = 0x68;                  // CC1E , 
// PWMA_CCER1 = 0x01;                      // CC1E , 
       PWMA_CCER1 = 0x03;

       PWMA_PS = 0x00;                     // PWM1_2

    UpdatePwm();

    PWMA_BKR = 0x80;                       //
                                           // ARR 
//  PWMA_CR1 |= 0x89;
                                           // LED 
    P40 = 0;                               //
    EA = 1;

       while (1)                           //10ms  PWM 
       {                                   // 10 

              if (B_1ms)                   // rep 
              {

                     B_1ms = 0;
                     msSecond++;
                     if (msSecond >= 10)
                     {

                            msSecond = 0;
                            TxPulse(10);
                     }
              }
       }
}

/*************  **************/
void TxPulse(u8 rep)
{

       if (rep == 0) return;
       rep -= 1;

       PWMA_RCR = rep;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1399 -
Ai8051U               : www.STCAI.com           MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       PWMA_CR1 |= 0x89;                                    // ARR 
}

/********************** Timer0 1ms  ************************/

void timer0(void) interrupt 1

{

   B_1ms = 1;

   if (PWM1_Flag)

   {

         Period++;                             //

         if (Period >= 0x1000) PWM1_Flag = 0;

   }

   else

   {

         Period--;                             //

         if (Period <= 0x0100) PWM1_Flag = 1;

   }                                           //
   UpdatePwm();

}

//========================================================================
// : UpdatePwm(void)
// :  PWM .

// : none.
// : none.
// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void UpdatePwm(void)

{

   PWMA_ARRH = (u8)(Period >> 8);              //

   PWMA_ARRL = (u8)Period;                     //: Period/2
   PWMA_CCR1H = (u8)((Period >> 1) >> 8);

   PWMA_CCR1L = (u8)((Period >> 1));

}

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1402 -

// 11.0592MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                            //

#include "intrins.h"                            //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

int     cap;

int     cap_new;

int     cap_old;

void main(void)                                 //XFR
{                                               //(32 )
                                                //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                               //(8 )
                                                //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                               // 0 
                                                // xdata 
       WTST = 0;                                // 0 

       CKCON = 0;

       P0M1 = 0x00;                             //IO  PWM
       P0M0 = 0x00;                             //00:PWM at P1
       P1M1 = 0x00;
       P1M0 = 0x00;                             //

/* TRGI  pin  ENO  bit  input*/                 //
       PWMA_ENO = 0x00;
       PWMA_PS = 0x00;

       PWMA_CCMR1 = 0x01;
       PWMA_SMCR = 0x56;
       PWMA_CCER1 = 0x01;

     PWMA_IER = 0x02;                           //
     PWMA_CR1 |= 0x01;                          //

       EA = 1;
       while (1);
}

/* 1  PWMA_CCR1H / PWMA_CCR1L  */

void PWMA_ISR() interrupt 26

{

     if(PWMA_SR1 & 0x02)

     {

        cap_old = cap_new;                      // CCR1H
        cap_new = PWMA_CCR1H;

        cap_new = (cap_new << 8) + PWMA_CCR1L;  // CCR1L

        cap = cap_new - cap_old;

        PWMA_SR1 &= ~0x02;

     }

}

void PWMA_ISR() interrupt 26                         //CC1

       unsigned int cnt;

void PWMA_ISR() interrupt 26
{

       if (PWMA_SR1 & 0x01)
       {

              PWMA_SR1 &=~0x01;
              PWMA_Duty = T_SinTable[PWM_Index];
              if (++PWM_Index >= 200)

                     PWM_Index = 0;

              PWMA_CCR1H = (u8)(PWMA_Duty >> 8);  //
              PWMA_CCR1L = (u8)(PWMA_Duty);
       }
       PWMA_SR1 = 0;
}

#include "Ai8051U.H"

#define FOSC          24000000UL           // PWM 
                                           // PWM 
#define PWM_PSC       (240-1)              //(=FOSC/(PWM_PSC+1)/PWM_PERIOD=50Hz)
#define PWM_PERIOD    2000                 // PWM 
                                           //(=PWM_DUTY/PWM_PERIOD*100%=25%)
#define PWM_DUTY      500

void SYS_Init();
void PWM_Init();

void main()                                //
{

       SYS_Init();
       PWM_Init();

       EA = 1;

       while (1);
}

void SYS_Init()                            //XFR
{                                          //(32 )
                                           //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                          //(8 )
                                           //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                          // 0 
                                           // xdata 
       WTST = 0;                           // 0 

       CKCON = 0;

       P0M1 = 0x00; P0M0 = 0x00;
       P1M1 = 0x00; P1M0 = 0x00;
       P2M1 = 0x00; P2M0 = 0x00;
       P3M1 = 0x00; P3M0 = 0x00;
       P4M1 = 0x00; P4M0 = 0x00;
       P5M1 = 0x00; P5M0 = 0x00;
       P6M1 = 0x00; P6M0 = 0x00;
       P7M1 = 0x00; P7M0 = 0x00;
}

void PWM_Init()                            //
{

       PWMA_PSCRH = (char)(PWM_PSC >> 8);

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1421 -
Ai8051U   : www.STCAI.com                 MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

   PWMA_PSCRL = (char)(PWM_PSC);

   PWMA_CCER1 = 0x00;                              // CCMRx  CCxE 
   PWMA_CCER2 = 0x00;

   PWMA_CCMR1 = 0x60;                              // PWM  1
   PWMA_CCMR2 = 0x30;                              //
   PWMA_CCMR3 = 0x30;                              //

   PWMA_CCER1 = 0x55;                              // 1,2,3 
   PWMA_CCER2 = 0x05;

   PWMA_ARRH = (char)(PWM_PERIOD >> 8);            //
   PWMA_ARRL = (char)(PWM_PERIOD);

   PWMA_ENO = 0x3f;                                // PWM 
   PWMA_PS = 0x15;                                 // PWM  P2.0-P2.5
                                                   //
   PWMA_CCR1H = (char)(PWM_DUTY >> 8);             // OC2 
   PWMA_CCR1L = (char)(PWM_DUTY);                  // OC3 
   PWMA_CCR2H = (char)(PWM_PERIOD/3 >> 8);
   PWMA_CCR2L = (char)(PWM_PERIOD/3);              // OC2/OC3 ,
   PWMA_CCR3H = (char)(PWM_PERIOD/3*2 >> 8);
   PWMA_CCR3L = (char)(PWM_PERIOD/3*2);

   PWMA_IER = 0x0d;

       PWMA_BKR = 0x80;                            //
       PWMA_CR1 |= 0x01;                           //
}

void PWMA_ISR() interrupt 26

{

   if (PWMA_SR1 & 0x01)

   {                                               //
          PWMA_CCR2H = (char)(PWM_PERIOD/3 >> 8);

         PWMA_CCR2L = (char)(PWM_PERIOD/3);
         PWMA_CCR3H = (char)(PWM_PERIOD/3*2 >> 8); //

         PWMA_CCR3L = (char)(PWM_PERIOD/3*2);

         PWMA_SR1 &= ~0x01;

   }

   else if (PWMA_SR1 &0x04)

   {

         PWMA_CCR2H = (char)((PWM_PERIOD/3+PWM_DUTY) >> 8);    // 0C2 
                                                               // 0C3 
         PWMA_CCR2L = (char)(PWM_PERIOD/3+PWM_DUTY);

         PWMA_SR1 &= ~0x04;

   }

   else if (PWMA_SR1 &0x08)

   {

         PWMA_CCR3H = (char)((PWM_PERIOD/3*2+PWM_DUTY) >> 8);

         PWMA_CCR3L = (char)(PWM_PERIOD/3*2+PWM_DUTY);

         PWMA_SR1 &= ~0x08;

   }

   else

   {

         PWMA_SR1 = 0;

   }

}

void PWMA_ISR() interrupt 26
{

       if (PWMA_SR1 & 0X02)
       {

              P03 = ~P03;
              cnt_H = PWMA_CCR1H;
              cnt_L = PWMA_CCR1L;
              PWMA_SR1 &= ~0X02;
       }
}

/*************  **************

PWMA . PWMA .
 1(RXD-->P3.0 TXD-->P3.1),  115200,8,n,1;
 A : PWM1P (P1.0)

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1426 -
Ai8051U                 : www.STCAI.com                  MCU   139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

 B : PWM2P (P1.2)

,                        1:  2.
                         2:  2.
                         3:  4.

******************************************/

unsigned int  pulse;                                    //
bit           B_Change;                                 //

bit           B_TX1_Busy;                               // 

void          PWMA_config(void);

void          UART1_config(unsigned long brt);          // brt: 

void          UART1_TxByte(unsigned char dat);

void main(void)                                         //XFR
{                                                       //(32 )
                                                        //XFR
       unsigned int j;                                  //(8 )
                                                        //
       EAXFR = 1;                                       // 0 
                                                        // xdata 
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                                       // 0 

       WTST = 0;

       CKCON = 0;

       P1M1 = 0x00;                                     // brt: 
       P1M0 = 0x00;                                     //

       UART1_config(115200UL);

       EA = 1;

       PWMA_config();
       pulse = 10;

       while (1)
       {

              if(B_Change)
              {

                     B_Change = 0;
                     j = pulse;
                     UART1_TxByte(j/10000+'0');
                     UART1_TxByte((j%10000)/1000+'0');
                     UART1_TxByte((j%1000)/100+'0');
                     UART1_TxByte((j%100)/10+'0');
                     UART1_TxByte( j%10+'0');
                     UART1_TxByte(0x0d);
                     UART1_TxByte(0x0a);
              }
       }
}

//========================================================================
// : void PWMA_config(void)
// : PPWM 
// : noe.
// : none.
// : V1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void PWMA_config(void)

{                                              // Fck_cnt = Fck_psc/(PSCR[15:0]+1),
       PWMA_PSCRH = 0;                         // PWM  =SYSclk/((PSCR+1)*(ARR+1)),
       PWMA_PSCRL = 0;                         // =SYSclk/((PSCR+1)*(ARR+1)*2).
                                               //, PWM 
       PWMA_ARRH = 0xff;

   PWMA_ARRL = 0xff;                           //
   PWMA_CNTRH = 0;

   PWMA_CNTRL = 0;                             //IO  PWM
   PWMA_ENO = 0;

       PWMA_CCMR1 = 0x01+(10<<4);              // 1 , ,
                                               //0~15 :
       PWMA_CCMR2 = 0x01+(10<<4);
                                               //1 2 4 8 12 16 24 32 48 64 80 96 128 160 192 256
       PWMA_SMCR = 2;                          // 2 , ,
       PWMA_CCER1 = 0x55;                      //0~15 :
       PWMA_PS = 0;
       PWMA_IER = 0x02;                        //1 2 4 8 12 16 24 32 48 64 80 96 128 160 192 256
       PWMA_CR1 = 0x01;                        //, 1  2: 2.
                                               // 3:  4.
}                                              //, ,
                                               //IO  P1.0 P1.2
                                               //
                                               //, ,
                                               //, ,
                                               //bit7=1:(),
                                               // =0:()

//========================================================================
// : void PWMA_ISR(void) interrupt PWMA_VECTOR
// : PWMA .
// : None
// : none.
// : V1.0

//========================================================================

void PWMA_ISR(void) interrupt 26

{                                              //
       if(PWMA_SR1 & 0x02)

   {                                           //
         pulse = PWMA_CNTRH;

      pulse <<= 8;

      pulse |= PWMA_CNTRL;                     //
      B_Change = 1;

   }

   PWMA_SR1 = 0;

}

//========================================================================

// : void               UART1_config(u32 brt)

// : UART1 

// : brt:               .

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1428 -
Ai8051U             : www.STCAI.com         MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

// : none.
// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void UART1_config(unsigned long brt)       // brt: 

{

   Brt = 65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / brt;

   AUXR &= ~0x01;                          //S1 BRT Use Timer1;

   AUXR |= (1<<6);                         //Timer1 set as 1T mode

   TMOD &= 0x0f;                           //Timer1 16bits AutoReload;

   TH1 = (unsigned char)(brt >> 8);

   TL1 = (unsigned char)brt;               //  Timer1
   TR1 = 1;                                // 1  P3.0 P3.1
   P_SW1 &= ~0xc0;                         // 8 , 1 , 1 , 
   SCON = (SCON & 0x3f) | (1<<6);          //
   ES = 1;                                 //
   REN = 1;

}

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_TxByte(u8 dat)
// :  1 .
// : dat: .
// : none.
// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void UART1_TxByte(unsigned char dat)

{                                          //
       B_TX1_Busy = 1;                     //
       SBUF = dat;                         //
       while(B_TX1_Busy);

}

//========================================================================
// : void UART1_int (void) interrupt UART1_VECTOR
// :  1 
// : none.
// : none.
// : VER1.0
// :

//========================================================================

void UART1_int (void) interrupt 4

{

       if(RI)

              RI = 0;

       if(TI)
       {

              TI = 0;
              B_TX1_Busy = 0;
       }
}

#define MAIN_Fosc     24000000L              //
                                             //
#include "Ai8051U.H"

#define ADC_START (1<<6)                     /*  0 */
#define ADC_FLAG (1<<5)                      /*  0 */

#define ADC_SPEED 1                          /* 0~15, ADC  = SYSclk/2/(n+1) */
#define RES_FMT (1<<5)

#define CSSETUP       (0<<7)
#define CSHOLD        (1<<5)
#define SMPDUTY       20

sbit PWM1 = P1^0;
sbit PWM1_L = P1^1;
sbit PWM2 = P1^2;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1430 -

sbit PWM3_L = P1^5;                                      //  PWM 
                                                         //
u8 step;                                                 // PWM 
u8 PWM_Value;
bit B_RUN;                                               //4ms 
u8 PWW_Set;
u16 adc11;                                               //
bit B_4ms;                                               //

u8 TimeOut;                                              //
bit B_start;                                             //8 ,  sum/16  30

                                                         //1:, 2:, 0

/*************************/                 // N ms 

void Delay_n_ms(u8 dly)
{

       u16 j;
       do
       {

              j = MAIN_Fosc / 10000;
              while(--j) ;
       }while(--dly);
}

void delay_us(u8 us) //N us 
{

       do
       {

              NOP(20); //@24MHz
       }
       while(--us);
}

//========================================================================

// : u16 Get_ADC10bitResult(u8 channel))    //channel = 0~15

//========================================================================

u16 Get_ADC10bitResult(u8 channel)          //channel = 0~15

{

   u8 i;

   ADC_RES = 0;

   ADC_RESL = 0;

   ADC_CONTR = 0x80 | ADC_START | channel;

   NOP(5);

// while((ADC_CONTR & ADC_FLAG) == 0)       ;// ADC 

          i = 255;

          while(i != 0)

          {

             i--;
             if((ADC_CONTR & ADC_FLAG) != 0) break; // ADC 

          }

   ADC_CONTR &= ~ADC_FLAG;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1431 -
Ai8051U                 : www.STCAI.com   MCU            139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       return ((u16)ADC_RES * 256 + (u16)ADC_RESL);
}

void Delay_500ns(void)
{

       NOP(6);
}

void StepMotor(void)                                 // 

{

   switch(step)

   {

   case 0: // AB PWM1, PWM2_L=1

      PWMA_ENO = 0x00; PWM1_L=0; PWM3_L=0;

      Delay_500ns();                                 //  A  PWM
      PWMA_ENO = 0x01;                               //  B 
      PWM2_L = 1;

      ADC_CONTR = 0x80+10;                           //  P0.2  ADC   C 
      CMPCR1 = 0x8c + 0x10;                          //

      break;

   case 1: // AC PWM1, PWM3_L=1
                PWMA_ENO = 0x01; PWM1_L=0; PWM2_L=0; //  A  PWM

      Delay_500ns();

      PWM3_L = 1;                                    //  C 
      ADC_CONTR = 0x80+9;                            //  P0.1  ADC   B 
      CMPCR1 = 0x8c + 0x20;                          //

      break;

   case 2: // BC PWM2, PWM3_L=1

      PWMA_ENO = 0x00; PWM1_L=0; PWM2_L=0;

      Delay_500ns();                                 //  B  PWM
      PWMA_ENO = 0x04;                               //  C 
      PWM3_L = 1;

      ADC_CONTR = 0x80+8;                            //  P0.0  ADC   A 
      CMPCR1 = 0x8c + 0x10;                          //

      break;

   case 3: // BA PWM2, PWM1_L=1
                PWMA_ENO = 0x04; PWM2_L=0; PWM3_L=0; //  B  PWM

      Delay_500ns();

      PWM1_L = 1;                                    //  C 
      ADC_CONTR = 0x80+10;                           //  P0.2  ADC   C 
      CMPCR1 = 0x8c + 0x20;                          //

      break;

   case 4: // CA PWM3, PWM1_L=1

      PWMA_ENO = 0x00; PWM2_L=0; PWM3_L=0;

      Delay_500ns();                                 //  C  PWM

void ADC_config(void)                        //ADC ( ADC ,
                                             // ADC )
{

       P0n_pure_input(0x0f);                 //

       ADCCFG = RES_FMT + ADC_SPEED;
       P_SW2 |= 0x80;                        // XSFR
       ADCTIM = CSSETUP + CSHOLD + SMPDUTY;

}

//========================================================================

// : u16 Get_ADC10bitResult(u8 channel))          //channel = 0~15

//========================================================================

u16 Get_ADC10bitResult(u8 channel)                //channel = 0~15

{

   u8 i;

   ADC_RES = 0;

   ADC_RESL = 0;

   ADC_CONTR = 0x80 | ADC_START | channel;

   NOP(5);                                        //

   i = 255;                                       //

   while(i != 0)

   {

          i--;                                    // ADC 
          if((ADC_CONTR & ADC_FLAG) != 0) break;

   }

   ADC_CONTR &= ~ADC_FLAG;

   return ((u16)ADC_RES * 256 + (u16)ADC_RESL);

}

void Delay_500ns(void)                            // 
{

       NOP(6);
}

       PWMA_CCR1H = 0;                                       // , ()
       PWMA_CCR1L = 0;
       PWMA_CCER1 |= 0x05;                            // , 
       PWMA_PS |= 0;                                  //  IO, 0:P1.2 P1.3, 1:P2.2 P2.3, 2:P6.2 P6.3,
// PWMA_IER |= 0x02;                                  // 

       PWMA_CCMR2 = 0x68;                             // , PWM  1, 
       PWMA_CCR2H = 0;                                       // , ()
       PWMA_CCR2L = 0;
       PWMA_CCER1 |= 0x50;                            // , 
       PWMA_PS |= (0<<2);                             //  IO, 0: P1.4 P1.5, 1: P2.4 P2.5, 2: P6.4 P6.5,
// PWMA_IER |= 0x04;                                  // 

       PWMA_CCMR3 = 0x68;                             //  
       PWMA_CCR3H = 0;                                // , ,
       PWMA_CCR3L = 0;                                //,
       PWMA_CCER2 |= 0x05;                            // , bit7=1:
       PWMA_PS |= (0<<4);                             //(),
// PWMA_IER |= 0x08;                                  //=0:()
                                                      //, ,
       PWMA_BKR = 0x80;                               //
       PWMA_CR1 = 0x81;                               // 1~4 

       PWMA_EGR = 0x01;

// PWMA_ISR_En = PWMA_IER;
}

//========================================================================
// : void PWMB_config(void)
// : PPWM 

// : noe.
// : none.
// : V1.0

// :

//========================================================================

void PWMB_config(void)

{

   P_SW2 |= 0x80;                        //SFR enable

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1443 -
Ai8051U             : www.STCAI.com         MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

   PWMB_PSCR = 11;                         //, Fck_cnt = Fck_psc/(PSCR[15:0]+1),
   PWMB_DTR = 0;                           // PWM  = SYSclk/((PSCR+1)*(AAR+1)),
                                           // PWM  = SYSclk/((PSCR+1)*(AAR+1)*2).
   PWMB_CCER1 = 0;                         // , n=0~127: DTR= n T,
   PWMB_CCER2 = 0;                         //0x80 ~(0x80+n), n=0~63: DTR=(64+n)*2T,
   PWMB_CR1 = 0;                           //0xc0 ~(0xc0+n), n=0~31: DTR=(32+n)*8T,
                                           //0xE0 ~(0xE0+n), n=0~31: DTR=(32+n)*16T,
   PWMB_CR2       = 0;
   PWMB_SR1       = 0;                     // , ,
   PWMB_SR2       = 0;                     //, , bit7=1:
   PWMB_ENO        = 0;                    //(), =0:
   PWMB_PS        = 0;                     //()
   PWMB_IER       = 0;
                                           //  5 , , 8 
       PWMB_CCMR1 = 0x31;                  // 0x01:, +0x00:, +0x02:
// PWMB_CCER1 |= (0x01+0x02);              //  IO, 0:P2.0, 1:P1.7, 2:P0.0, 3:P7.4,
                                           // 
       PWMB_PS |= 0;
// PWMB_IER |= 0x02;                       //  6 , , 8 
                                           // 0x10:, +0x00:, +0x20:
       PWMB_CCMR2 = 0x31;                  // 0: P2.1, 1: P5.4, 2: P0.1, 3: P7.5,
// PWMB_CCER1 |= (0x10+0x20);              // 

       PWMB_PS |= (0<<2);                  //  7 , , 8 
// PWMB_IER |= 0x04;                       // 0x01:, +0x00:, +0x02:
                                           //  IO, 0:P2.2, 1:P3.3, 2:P0.2, 3:P7.6,
       PWMB_CCMR3 = 0x31;                  // 
// PWMB_CCER2 |= (0x01+0x02);
                                           //, ,
       PWMB_PS |= (0<<4);                  //
// PWMB_IER |= 0x08;
                                           // 
   PWMB_EGR = 0x01;                        // , ,
                                           //, , bit7=1:
   PWMB_SMCR = 0x60;                       //(), =0:
   PWMB_BKR = 0x00;                        //()
   PWMB_CR1 |= 0x01;
                                           // 5 6 7  IO 
// P2n_standard(0x07);
}

//========================================================================

void PWMB_ISR(void) interrupt PWMB_VECTOR

{

   PWMB_SR1 = 0;                           //

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1444 -
Ai8051U           : www.STCAI.com                  MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

PWMB_SR2 = 0;                                                  //
                                                               //

}

void ADC_config(void)                             //ADC 
{                                                 //P1.7 P1.6 
                                                  //P0.3~P0.0 
       P1n_pure_input(0xc0);                      //ADC on + channel
       P0n_pure_input(0x0f);                      // XSFR
       ADC_CONTR = 0x80 + 6;
       ADCCFG = RES_FMT + ADC_SPEED;              //Timer0 
       P_SW2 |= 0x80;                             // T0  16 
       ADCTIM = CSSETUP + CSHOLD + SMPDUTY;        //4ms
}                                                 //  0
                                                  //  ET0 
void Timer0_config(void)
{                                                 //Timer0 
                                                  //4ms 
       Timer0_16bitAutoReload();                  //, .
       Timer0_12T();
       TH0 = (65536UL-MAIN_Fosc/12 / 250) / 256;  //XFR
       TL0 = (65536UL-MAIN_Fosc/12 / 250) % 256;  //(32 )
       TR0 = 1;                                   //XFR
                                                  //(8 )
       ET0 = 1;                                   //
}                                                 // 0 
                                                  // xdata 
void Timer0_ISR(void) interrupt 1                 // 0 
{

       B_4ms = 1;
// if(B_RUN) StepMotor();
}

/**********************************************/
void main(void)
{

       EAXFR = 1;

// P_SW2 |= 0x80;

       WTST = 0;

       CKCON = 0;

P2n_standard(0xf8);
P3n_standard(0xbf);
P5n_standard(0x10);

PWMA_config();       //Timer0 
PWMB_config();
ADC_config();
Timer0_config();
PWW_Set = 0;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1445 -
Ai8051U              : www.STCAI.com          MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

EA = 1; // 

while (1)

{                       // 4ms 
       if(B_4ms)

          {

             B_4ms = 0;

             YouMen = (u8)(Get_ADC10bitResult(11) >> 2); // 8 , P0.3 ADC11-->

             if(YouMen >= 128) PWW_Set = YouMen - 128, B_direct = 0; //

             else PWW_Set = 127 - YouMen, B_direct = 1; //

             PWW_Set *= 2;                              //PWM  0~254

             if(!B_RUN && (PWW_Set >= 30))              // PWM_Set >= 30, , 
             {
                                                        // PWM, 
                    PWM_Value = 30;                     // PWM
                    PWMA_CCR1L = PWM_Value;
                    PWMA_CCR2L = PWM_Value;             //
                    PWMA_CCR3L = PWM_Value;             //
                    B_RUN = 1;
                    StepMotor();
             }

             if(B_RUN) //

             {
                   if(PWM_Value < PWW_Set) PWM_Value++;//, 

                  if(PWM_Value > PWW_Set) PWM_Value--;

                  if(PWM_Value < 20)                    // 

                  {

                        B_RUN = 0;

                        PWMB_IER = 0;

                        PWMB_CCER1 = 0;

                        PWMB_CCER2 = 0;

                        PWM_Value = 0;

                        PWMA_ENO = 0;

                        PWMA_CCR1L = 0;

                        PWMA_CCR2L = 0;

                        PWMA_CCR3L = 0;

                        PWM1_L=0;

                        PWM2_L=0;

                        PWM3_L=0;

                  }

                  else

                  {

                        PWMA_CCR1L = PWM_Value;

                        PWMA_CCR2L = PWM_Value;

                        PWMA_CCR3L = PWM_Value;

                  }

             }

          }

       }
}

31.3 

31.3.1  PWM 

// 12MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                     //

#include "intrins.h"                     //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

#define FOSC 12000000UL

#define  HSCK_MCLK             0
#define  HSCK_PLL              1
#define  HSCK_SEL              HSCK_PLL

#define  PLL_96M               0
#define  PLL_144M              1
#define  PLL_SEL               PLL_144M

#define  CKMS                  0x80
#define  HSIOCK                0x40
#define  MCK2SEL_MSK           0x0c
#define  MCK2SEL_SEL1          0x00
#define  MCK2SEL_PLL           0x04
#define  MCK2SEL_PLLD2         0x08
#define  MCK2SEL_IRC48         0x0c
#define  MCKSEL_MSK            0x03
#define  MCKSEL_HIRC           0x00
#define  MCKSEL_XOSC           0x01
#define  MCKSEL_X32K           0x02
#define  MCKSEL_IRC32K         0x03

#define  ENCKM                 0x80
#define  PCKI_MSK              0x60
#define  PCKI_D1               0x00
#define  PCKI_D2               0x20
#define  PCKI_D4               0x40
#define  PCKI_D8               0x60

void delay()
{

       int i;

       for (i=0; i<100; i++);
}

char ReadPWMA(char addr)                 //
{                                        //, XFR  7 
                                         //HSPWMA_ADR  1,
       char dat;                         //

       while (HSPWMA_ADR & 0x80);
       HSPWMA_ADR = addr | 0x80;

       while (HSPWMA_ADR & 0x80);

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1473 -
Ai8051U             : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

dat = HSPWMA_DAT;                                 //

       return dat;
}

void WritePWMA(char addr, char dat)  //
{                                    //
                                     //, XFR  7 
       while (HSPWMA_ADR & 0x80);    //HSPWMA_ADR  0,
       HSPWMA_DAT = dat;
       HSPWMA_ADR = addr & 0x7f;

}

void main()                          //XFR
{                                    //(32 )
                                     //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                    //(8 )
                                     //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                    // 0 
                                     // xdata 
       WTST = 0;                     // 0 

       CKCON = 0;                    // PLL  96M  PLL 
                                     // PLL  144M  PLL 
      // PLL                         // PLL  96M  PLL 
#if (PLL_SEL == PLL_96M)
                                     //PLL  1 
       CLKSEL &= ~CKMS;              //PLL  2 
#elif (PLL_SEL == PLL_144M)          //PLL  4 
                                     //PLL  8 
       CLKSEL |= CKMS;               // PLL  1 
#else
                                     // PLL 
       CLKSEL &= ~CKMS;              // PLL 
#endif
                                     //HSPWM/HSSPI 
      // PLL , 12M                   //HSPWM/HSSPI  PLL 
       USBCLK &= ~PCKI_MSK;          // HSPWM/HSSPI 
#if (FOSC == 12000000UL)
       USBCLK |= PCKI_D1;
#elif (FOSC == 24000000UL)
       USBCLK |= PCKI_D2;
#elif (FOSC == 48000000UL)
       USBCLK |= PCKI_D4;
#elif (FOSC == 96000000UL)
       USBCLK |= PCKI_D8;
#else
       USBCLK |= PCKI_D1;
#endif

      // PLL
       USBCLK |= ENCKM;

       delay();

      // HSPWM/HSSPI 
#if (HSCK_SEL == HSCK_MCLK)

       CLKSEL &= ~HSIOCK;
#elif (HSCK_SEL == HSCK_PLL)

       CLKSEL |= HSIOCK;
#else

       CLKSEL &= ~HSIOCK;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1474 -
Ai8051U            : www.STCAI.com        MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

#endif

HSCLKDIV = 0;                            //HSPWM/HSSPI 

HSPWMA_CFG = 0x03;                       // PWMA 

// PWMA                                  //CC1 
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_CCER1, 0x00);      //OC1REF  PWM1(CNT<CCR  1)
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_CCMR1, 0x00);      // CC1/CC1N 
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_CCMR1, 0x60);      // PWM 
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_CCER1, 0x05);      //
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_ENO, 0x03);        // PWM 
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_BKR, 0x80);
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_CCR1H, 200 >> 8);  // PWM 
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_CCR1L, 200);
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_ARRH, 1000 >> 8);  // PWM 
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_ARRL, 1000);       // PWM 
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_DTR, 10);
WritePWMA((char)&PWMA_CR1, 0x01);

P2M0 = 0;                                //
P2M1 = 0;
P3M0 = 0;
P3M1 = 0;

P2 = ReadPWMA((char)&PWMA_ARRH);
P3 = ReadPWMA((char)&PWMA_ARRL);

       while (1);
}

Ai8051U   : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

void main()                                        // 0 
{                                                  // xdata 
                                                   // 0 
       EAXFR = 1;

// P_SW2 |= 0x80;

WTST = 0;

CKCON = 0;

       P0M0 = 0x00;
       P0M1 = 0x00;
       P1M0 = 0x00;
       P1M1 = 0x00;
       P2M0 = 0x00;
       P2M1 = 0x00;
       P3M0 = 0x00;
       P3M1 = 0x00;
       P4M0 = 0x00;
       P4M1 = 0x00;
       P5M0 = 0x00;
       P5M1 = 0x00;

       UsbInit();

       EA = 1;

       while (1);
}

BYTE ReadReg(BYTE addr)
{

       BYTE dat;

       while (USBADR & 0x80);
       USBADR = addr | 0x80;
       while (USBADR & 0x80);
       dat = USBDAT;

       return dat;
}

void WriteReg(BYTE addr, BYTE dat)
{

       while (USBADR & 0x80);
       USBADR = addr & 0x7f;
       USBDAT = dat;
}

BYTE ReadFifo(BYTE fifo, BYTE *pdat)
{

       BYTE cnt;
       BYTE ret;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1498 -
Ai8051U   : www.STCAI.com                         MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       ret = cnt = ReadReg(COUNT0);              // enable PLL
       while (cnt--)                             // pll 
       {

              *pdat++ = ReadReg(fifo);
       }

       return ret;
}

void WriteFifo(BYTE fifo, BYTE *pdat, BYTE cnt)
{

       while (cnt--)
       {

              WriteReg(fifo, *pdat++);
       }
}

void DelayXns(WORD delayTime)
{

       while( delayTime-- );
}

void UsbInit()
{

       P3M0 = 0x00;
       P3M1 = 0x03;

       P_SW2 |= 0x80;
       PLLCR = (1<<7)|(0<<5)|(1<<3)|(1<<1);
       DelayXns(100);
       CLKSEL = 0x02;
       CLKDIV = 0;
       P_SW2 &= ~0x80;
       USBCLK = 0x90;
       USBCON = 0x90;

       WriteReg(FADDR, 0x00);
       WriteReg(POWER, 0x08);
       WriteReg(INTRIN1E, 0x3f);
       WriteReg(INTROUT1E, 0x3f);
       WriteReg(INTRUSBE, 0x00);
       WriteReg(POWER, 0x01);

       Ep0Stage.bStage = EPIDLE;
}

void usb_isr() interrupt 25
{

       BYTE intrusb;
       BYTE intrin;
       BYTE introut;
       BYTE csr;
       BYTE cnt;
       WORD len;

       intrusb = ReadReg(INTRUSB);
       intrin = ReadReg(INTRIN1);
       introut = ReadReg(INTROUT1);

if (intrin & EP1INIF)
{

       WriteReg(INDEX, 1);
       csr = ReadReg(INCSR1);
       if (csr & INSTSTL)
       {

              WriteReg(INCSR1, INCLRDT);
       }
       if (csr & INUNDRUN)
       {

              WriteReg(INCSR1, 0);
       }
}

if (introut & EP1OUTIF)
{

       WriteReg(INDEX, 1);
       csr = ReadReg(OUTCSR1);
       if (csr & OUTSTSTL)
       {

              WriteReg(OUTCSR1, OUTCLRDT);
       }
       if (csr & OUTOPRDY)
       {

              ReadFifo(FIFO1, HidOutput);
              WriteReg(OUTCSR1, 0);

                     WriteReg(INDEX, 1);
                     WriteFifo(FIFO1, HidOutput, 64);
                     WriteReg(INCSR1, INIPRDY);
              }
       }
}

34.3.11 ADC_DMA 

ADC  ADC 
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+0] =  1  1  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+1] =  1  1  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+2] =  1  2  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+3] =  1  2  ADC ;
...
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+2n-2] =  1  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+2n-1] =  1  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+2n] =  1  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+2n+1] =  1  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+2n+2] =  1  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+2n+3] =  1  n  ADC ;

XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(2n+4)+0] =  2  1  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(2n+4)+1] =  2  1  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(2n+4)+2] =  2  2  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(2n+4)+3] =  2  2  ADC ;

...
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(2n+4)+2n-2] =  2  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(2n+4)+2n-1] =  2  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(2n+4)+2n] =  2  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(2n+4)+2n+1] =  2  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(2n+4)+2n+2] = 2  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(2n+4)+2n+3] = 2  n  ADC ;

...
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(m-1)(2n+4)+0] =  m  1  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(m-1)(2n+4)+1] =  m  1  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(m-1)(2n+4)+2] =  m  2  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(m-1)(2n+4)+3] =  m  2  ADC ;

...
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(m-1)(2n+4)+2n-2] =  m  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(m-1)(2n+4)+2n-1] =  m  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(m-1)(2n+4)+2n] =  m  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(m-1)(2n+4)+2n+1] =  m  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(m-1)(2n+4)+2n+2] = m  n  ADC ;
XRAM[DMA_ADC_RXA+(m-1)(2n+4)+2n+3] = m  n  ADC ;

void UartPutc(unsigned char dat)
{

       BusyFlag = 1;
       SBUF = dat;
       while(BusyFlag);
}

char putchar(char c)
{

       UartPutc(c);
       return c;
}

void DMA_Config(void)                                    //bit7 1:Enable Interrupt
{
                                                         //n+1
       DMA_UR1T_CFG = 0x80;
       DMA_UR1T_STA = 0x00;                              //bit7 1: UART1_DMA,
       DMA_UR1T_AMTH = (u8)(DMA_AMT_LEN >> 8);           //bit6 1: UART1_DMA 
       DMA_UR1T_AMT = (u8)(DMA_AMT_LEN);
       DMA_UR1T_TXAH = (u8)(((u16)DMABuffer) >> 8);
       DMA_UR1T_TXAL = (u8)((u16)DMABuffer);
       DMA_UR1T_CR = 0xc0;

       DMA_UR1R_CFG = 0x80;                              //bit7 1:Enable Interrupt
       DMA_UR1R_STA = 0x00;
       DMA_UR1R_AMTH = (u8)(DMA_AMT_LEN >> 8);           //n+1
       DMA_UR1R_AMT = (u8)(DMA_AMT_LEN);
       DMA_UR1R_RXAH = (u8)(((u16)DMABuffer) >> 8);      //bit7 1: UART1_DMA,
       DMA_UR1R_RXAL = (u8)((u16)DMABuffer);             //bit5 1: UART1_DMA ,
       DMA_UR1R_CR = 0xa1;                               //bit0 1: FIFO

}

void SetTimer2Baudraye(u16 dat)                          //Timer stop
{                                                        //Timer2 set As Timer
                                                         //Timer2 set as 1T mode
       AUXR &= ~(1<<4);
       AUXR &= ~(1<<3);                                  //
       AUXR |= (1<<2);                                   //Timer run enable
       T2H = dat / 256;
       T2L = dat % 256;
       IE2 &= ~(1<<2);
       AUXR |= (1<<4);
}

void UART1_config(u8 brt)                                //:
                                                         //2:  Timer2 ,
{                                                        //:  Timer1 .
      /***********  2 *****************/
       if(brt == 2)                                      //S1 BRT Use Timer2;
       {
              AUXR |= 0x01;

Ai8051U                      : www.STCAI.com          MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       SetTimer2Baudraye(65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1);
}

/***********  1 *****************/

else

{

      TR1 = 0;

      AUXR &= ~0x01;                                 //S1 BRT Use Timer1;

      AUXR |= (1<<6);                                //Timer1 set as 1T mode

      TMOD &= ~(1<<6);                               //Timer1 set As Timer

      TMOD &= ~0x30;                                 //Timer1_16bitAutoReload;

      TH1 = (u8)((65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1) / 256);

      TL1 = (u8)((65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1) % 256);

      ET1 = 0;                                       //

      INTCLKO &= ~0x02;                              //

      TR1 = 1;

}

/*************************************************/

       SCON = (SCON & 0x3f) | 0x40;                  //UART1 :
                                                     //0x00: ,
// PS = 1;                                           //0x40: 8 ,,
       ES = 1;                                       //0x80: 9 ,,
       REN = 1;                                      //0xc0: 9 ,
       P_SW1 &= 0x3f;                                //
       P_SW1 |= 0x00;                                //
                                                     //

                                                     //UART1 switch to:
                                                     //0x00: P3.0 P3.1,
                                                     //0x40: P3.6 P3.7,
                                                     //0x80: P1.6 P1.7,
                                                     //0xC0: P4.3 P4.4

       RX1_TimeOut = 0;
}

void UART1_int (void) interrupt 4                    // 5ms 
{

       if(RI)
       {

              RI = 0;
              Rx_cnt++;
              if(Rx_cnt >= DMA_AMT_LEN) Rx_cnt = 0;
              RX1_TimeOut = 5;
       }

       if(TI)
       {

              TI = 0;
              BusyFlag = 0;
       }
}

void timer0 (void) interrupt 1                       //1ms 
{

       B_1ms = 1;
}

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1583 -
Ai8051U    : www.STCAI.com                    MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

void UART1_DMA_Interrupt(void) interrupt 13               //
{                                                         //
                                                          //
       if (DMA_UR1T_STA & 0x01)                           //
       {

              DMA_UR1T_STA &= ~0x01;
              DMATxFlag = 1;
       }
       if (DMA_UR1T_STA & 0x04)
       {
              DMA_UR1T_STA &= ~0x04;
       }

       if (DMA_UR1R_STA & 0x01)
       {

              DMA_UR1R_STA &= ~0x01;
              DMARxFlag = 1;
       }
       if (DMA_UR1R_STA & 0x02)
       {
              DMA_UR1R_STA &= ~0x02;
       }
}

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1585 -

#include "stdio.h"                22118400L  // 115200 
#include "crc16.h"                115200L    //(0~255)DMA_AMT_LEN+1

#define MAIN_Fosc
#define Baudrate1

#define DMA_AMT_LEN 255

bit  DMATxFlag;

bit  DMARxFlag;

u8   xdata DMABuffer[256];

void UART1_config(u8 brt);
void DMA_Config(void);

void UartPutc(unsigned char dat)
{

       SBUF = dat;
       while(TI == 0);
       TI = 0;
}

char putchar(char c)
{

       UartPutc(c);
       return c;
}

/*****CRC ********/

u16 crc16_ccitt(u8 *pbuf, u16 len)
{

       unsigned short code crc16_ccitt_table[256] =
       {

void DMA_Config(void)                                //bit7 1:Enable Interrupt
{
                                                     //n+1
       DMA_UR1T_CFG = 0x80;
       DMA_UR1T_STA = 0x00;                          //bit7 1: UART1_DMA,
       DMA_UR1T_AMTH = (u8)(DMA_AMT_LEN >> 8);       //bit6 1: UART1_DMA 
       DMA_UR1T_AMT = (u8)(DMA_AMT_LEN);             //bit7 1:Enable Interrupt
       DMA_UR1T_TXAH = (u8)(((u16)DMABuffer) >> 8);
       DMA_UR1T_TXAL = (u8)((u16)DMABuffer);         //n+1
       DMA_UR1T_CR = 0xc0;
                                                     //bit7 1: UART1_DMA,
       DMA_UR1R_CFG = 0x80;                          //bit5 1: UART1_DMA , bit0 1: FIFO
       DMA_UR1R_STA = 0x00;
       DMA_UR1R_AMTH = (u8)(DMA_AMT_LEN >> 8);
       DMA_UR1R_AMT = (u8)(DMA_AMT_LEN);
       DMA_UR1R_RXAH = (u8)(((u16)DMABuffer) >> 8);
       DMA_UR1R_RXAL = (u8)((u16)DMABuffer);
       DMA_UR1R_CR = 0xa1;

}

void SetTimer2Baudraye(u16 dat)                      //:
                                                     //2:  Timer2 ,
{                                                    //:  Timer1 .
       AUXR &= ~(1<<4);
       AUXR &= ~(1<<3);                              //Timer stop
       AUXR |= (1<<2);                               //Timer2 set As Timer
                                                     //Timer2 set as 1T mode

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1588 -
Ai8051U                  : www.STCAI.com      MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       T2H = dat / 256;                              //
       T2L = dat % 256;                              //Timer run enable
       IE2 &= ~(1<<2);
       AUXR |= (1<<4);
}

void UART1_config(u8 brt)                            //:
                                                     //2:  Timer2 

                                                     //:  Timer1 .

{
      /***********  2 *****************/

if(brt == 2)

{

      AUXR |= 0x01;                                  //S1 BRT Use Timer2;

      SetTimer2Baudraye(65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1);

}

/***********  1 *****************/

else

{

      TR1 = 0;

      AUXR &= ~0x01;                                 //S1 BRT Use Timer1;

      AUXR |= (1<<6);                                //Timer1 set as 1T mode

      TMOD &= ~(1<<6);                               //Timer1 set As Timer

      TMOD &= ~0x30;                                 //Timer1_16bitAutoReload;

      TH1 = (u8)((65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1) / 256);

      TL1 = (u8)((65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4) / Baudrate1) % 256);

      ET1 = 0;                                       //
      INTCLKO &= ~0x02;                              //

      TR1 = 1;

}

/*************************************************/

       SCON = (SCON & 0x3f) | 0x40;                  //UART1 ,
                                                     //0x00: ,
// PS = 1;                                           //0x40: 8 ,,
// ES = 1;                                           //0x80: 9 ,,
                                                     //0xc0: 9 ,
       REN = 1;                                      //
       P_SW1 &= 0x3f;                                //
       P_SW1 |= 0x00;                                //
}

void UART1_DMA_Interrupt(void) interrupt 13          //
{                                                    //
                                                     //

       {

              DMA_UR1T_STA &= ~0x01;
              DMATxFlag = 1;
       }
       if (DMA_UR1T_STA & 0x04)
       {
              DMA_UR1T_STA &= ~0x04;
       }

       if (DMA_UR1R_STA & 0x01)
       {

Ai8051U    : www.STCAI.com             MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

              DMARxFlag = 1;
       }
       if (DMA_UR1R_STA & 0x02)
       {
              DMA_UR1R_STA &= ~0x02;
       }
}

while (INIT[i])

       j = INIT[i++] - 1;

       {

              lcm_write_dat(INIT[i++]);
       }
}

       lcm_write_cmd(0x29);              //

                                         // 8 
void lcm_write_cmd(BYTE cmd)
{

       LCM_RS = 0;
       LCM_CS = 0;
       LCM_WRDB(cmd);
       LCM_CS = 1;
}

void lcm_write_dat(BYTE dat)
{

       LCM_RS = 1;
       LCM_CS = 0;
       LCM_WRDB(dat);
       LCM_CS = 1;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1598 -
Ai8051U   : www.STCAI.com                             MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

}                                                                 // 16 

void lcm_write_dat2(WORD dat)                                     // SPI  FLASH 
{

       LCM_RS = 1;
       LCM_CS = 0;
       LCM_WRDB(dat >> 8);
       LCM_WRDB(dat);
       LCM_CS = 1;
}

BYTE spi_shift(BYTE dat)
{

       SPIF = 1;
       SPDAT = dat;
       while (!SPIF);

       return SPDAT;                                      // TFT 
}                                                         //()

void lcm_set_window(int x0, int x1, int y0, int y1)
{

       lcm_write_cmd(0x2a);
       lcm_write_dat2(x0);
       lcm_write_dat2(x1);
       lcm_write_cmd(0x2b);
       lcm_write_dat2(y0);
       lcm_write_dat2(y1);
}

void lcm_clear_screen()
{

       int i, j;

       lcm_set_window(0, SCREENCX - 1, 0, SCREENCY - 1);  //

       lcm_write_cmd(0x2c);
       LCM_RS = 1;
       LCM_CS = 0;
       for (i=SCREENCY; i; i--)
       {

              for (j=SCREENCX; j; j--)
              {

                     LCM_WRDB(WHITE >> 8);
                     LCM_WRDB(WHITE);
              }
       }
       LCM_CS = 1;
}

void lcm_show_next_image()                                // Flash 
{

       DWORD addr;

       switch (image++)
       {
       default: image = 1;
       case 0: addr = IMG1_ADDR; break;
       case 1: addr = IMG2_ADDR; break;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1599 -

case 2: addr = IMG3_ADDR; break;
}

SPI_SS = 0;                                        // FLASH 
                                                   //
spi_shift(0x03);
spi_shift((BYTE)(addr >> 16));
spi_shift((BYTE)(addr >> 8));
spi_shift((BYTE)(addr));

lcm_set_window(0, SCREENCX - 1, 0, SCREENCY - 1);  //

lcm_write_cmd(0x2c);                               // LCM  8 ,i8080 , P6
LCM_RS = 1;                                        // LCM 
LCM_CS = 0;                                        // LCM 
                                                   // LCM 
LCMIFCFG = 0x04;                                   // LCM  DMA , DMA 
LCMIFCFG2 = 0x09;                                  // DMA 
LCMIFSTA = 0x00;                                   // DMA 
LCMIFCR = 0x80;
DMA_LCM_CFG = 0x80;                                // SPI  DMA , DMA 
DMA_LCM_STA = 0x00;                                // DMA 
DMA_LCM_AMT = (DMA_BUFSIZE - 1);                   // DMA 
DMA_LCM_AMTH = (DMA_BUFSIZE - 1) >> 8;
DMA_SPI_CFG = 0xa0;                                //DMA  SS 
DMA_SPI_STA = 0x00;                                // DMA 
DMA_SPI_AMT = (DMA_BUFSIZE - 1);
DMA_SPI_AMTH = (DMA_BUFSIZE - 1) >> 8;             // DMA 
DMA_SPI_CFG2 = 0x00;
DMA_SPI_RXAL = (BYTE)&buffer1;
DMA_SPI_RXAH = (WORD)&buffer1 >> 8;
DMA_SPI_CR = 0xc1;

       stage = 0;
}

//SPI_speed: SPI , 0: fosc/4, 1: fosc/8, 2: fosc/16, 3: fosc/2

void delay_ms(u16 ms)
{

      u16 i;
      do
      {

            i = MAIN_Fosc / 6000;
            while(--i) ;
      }while(--ms);
}

{

k = 0;            //

delay_ms(10);

      {

      for(i=0; i<(LED_NUM*3); i++, px++) *px = 0; //

   // led_RGB[i][0] = COLOR; // 
   // led_RGB[i][2] = COLOR; // 

      if(++i >= LED_NUM) i = 0;       //
      led_RGB[i][0] = COLOR;          // 
      if(++i >= LED_NUM) i = 0;       //
      led_RGB[i][2] = COLOR;          //

//================  SPI  ==============
void LoadSPI(void)
{

      u8 xdata *px;
      u16 i,j;
      u8 k;
      u8 dat;

   for(i=0; i<SPI_NUM; i++) led_SPI[i] = 0;

   px = &led_RGB[0][0]; //

   for(i=0, j=0; i<(LED_NUM*3); i++)

   {

      dat = *px;

      px++;

      for(k=0; k<4; k++)

      {

         if(dat & 0x80) led_SPI[j] = 0xE0;     // 1
                                               // 0
         else             led_SPI[j] = 0x80;   // 1
                                               // 0
         if(dat & 0x40) led_SPI[j] |= 0x0E;

         else             led_SPI[j] |= 0x08;

         dat <<= 2;

         j++;

      }

   }

Ai8051U           : www.STCAI.com          MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

}

//========================================================================

// : void SPI_Config(u8 io, u8 speed)

// : SPI 

// : io:  IO,                      SS MOSI MISO SCLK

//                      0:  P5.4 P1.3 P1.4 P1.5

//                      1:  P2.2 P2.3 P2.4 P2.5

//                      2:  P5.4 P4.0 P4.1 P4.3

//                      3:  P3.5 P3.4 P3.3 P3.2

//    SPI_speed: SPI , 0: fosc/4, 1: fosc/8, 2: fosc/16, 3: fosc/2

// : none.

// :

//========================================================================

//sfr SPCTL = 0x85; SPI 

// 7        6        5          4      3  2           1            0  Reset Value

// SSIG SPEN DORD MSTR CPOL CPHA SPR1 SPR0 0x00

#define SSIG         1 //1:  SS  MSTR  0: SS 

#define SPEN         1 //1:  SPI                                      0 SPI SPI 

 IO

#define DORD         0 //1LSB                                         0MSB 

#define MSTR         1 //1                                            0

#define CPOL         0 //1:  SCLK                                     0 SCLK 

#define CPHA         1 //1:  SCLK ,.                                  0:  SCLK 

,.

#define SPR1         0 //SPR1,SPR0 00: fosc/4, 01: fosc/8

#define SPR0         0 //                 10: fosc/16, 11: fosc/2

void SPI_Config(u8 SPI_io, u8 SPI_speed)

{                       //
      HSCLKDIV = 0;

    SPCTL = (SSIG << 7) + (SPEN << 6) + (DORD << 5) + (MSTR << 4) + (CPOL << 3) + (CPHA << 2) +

(SPI_speed & 3);        // SPI

    P_SW1 = (P_SW1 & ~0x0c) | ((SPI_io<<2) & 0x0c);   // IO

    if(SPI_io == 1)             // P2.2(SS) P2.3(MOSI) P2.4(MISO) P2.5(SCLK), 
    {                           //MISO = 0, MOSI 
                                // WS2812  MOSI 
          P2n_standard(0x3C);
          P24 = 0;              // P5.4(SS) P4.0(MOSI) P4.1(MISO) P4.3(SCLK), 
          P2n_push_pull(Pin3);
    }
    else if(SPI_io == 2)
    {
          P5n_standard(0x10);

Ai8051U            : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

         P4n_standard(0x0B); //

         P41 = 0;        //MISO = 0, MOSI 

         P4n_push_pull(Pin0); // WS2812  MOSI 

   }

   else if(SPI_io == 3)

   {

         P3n_standard(0x3C); // P3.5(SS) P3.4(MOSI) P3.3(MISO) P3.2(SCLK), 

         P33 = 0;        //MISO = 0, MOSI 

         P3n_push_pull(Pin4); // WS2812  MOSI 

   }

   else

   {

         P1n_standard(0x38); // P5.4(SS) P1.3(MOSI) P1.4(MISO) P1.5(SCLK), 

         P5n_standard(0x10); //P5.4(SS) 

         P14 = 0;        //MISO = 0, MOSI 

         P1n_push_pull(Pin3); // WS2812  MOSI 

   }

}

#define  DMA_ENSPI 1 // SPI DMA  bit7, 0: SPI DMA  1

 SPI DMA 

#define  SPI_TRIG_M 1 // SPI DMA bit6, 0: 0          1 1

 SPI DMA 

#define  SPI_TRIG_S 0 // SPI DMA bit5, 0: 0          1 1

 SPI DMA 

#define  SPI_CLRFIFO 1 //  SPI DMA  FIFO bit0, 0: 0  1 1

//DMA_SPI_CFG SPI_DMA

#define  SPI_ACT_TX 1 // SPI DMA bit6, 0: SPI DMA

. 1

//DMA_SPI_STA SPI_DMA 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1608 -

#define    DMA_SPIIF 0     // SPI DMA bit0,  0.
#define    SPI_RXLOSS 0    // SPI DMA bit1,  0.
#define    SPI_TXOVW 0     // SPI DMA bit2,  0.

/*****************************************************************************

   * @name :void DMA_SPI_config(void)

   * @function :Config SPI DMA

   * @parameters :None

   * @retvalue :None

******************************************************************************/

void DMA_SPI_config(void)

{

   u16 j;

   j = (u16)&led_SPI[0]; //

   DMA_SPI_TXAH = (u8)(j >> 8);          //

   DMA_SPI_TXAL = (u8)j;                 //

   DMA_SPI_AMTH = (u8)((SPI_NUM-1)/256); // = n+1

   DMA_SPI_AMT = (u8)((SPI_NUM-1)%256); // = n+1

   DMA_SPI_STA = 0x00;

   DMA_SPI_CFG = (DMA_SPIIE << 7) + (SPI_ACT_TX << 6) + (SPI_ACT_RX << 5) + (DMA_SPIIP

<< 2) + DMA_SPIBAP;

   DMA_SPI_CFG2 = (SPI_WRPSS << 2) + SPI_SSS;

   DMA_SPI_CR = (DMA_ENSPI << 7) + (SPI_TRIG_M << 6) + (SPI_TRIG_S << 5) + SPI_CLRFIFO;

}

// 45.1584MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                   //

#include "intrins.h"                   //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

//#define FOSC        24576000UL       //
//#define SampleRate  8000             //

//#define FOSC        32768000UL       //
//#define SampleRate  32000            //

//#define FOSC        33868800UL       //
#define FOSC          45158400UL       //
#define SampleRate    44100            //

#define MCKOE         1                //I2S 
                                       //0: I2S 
                                       //1: I2S 

#define I2SEN         0x04             //I2S 
                                       //0x00:
                                       //0x04:

#define I2S_MODE 2                     //I2S 
                                       //0:
                                       //1:
                                       //2:
                                       //3:,

#define PCMSYNC 0                      //PCM 
                                       //0:
                                       //1:

#define STD_MODE 1                     //I2S 
                                       //0: I2S 
                                       //1: MSB 
                                       //2:LSB 
                                       //3:PCM 

#define CKPOL         0                //I2S 
                                       //0:
                                       //1:

#define DATLEN        0                //
                                       //0:16 
                                       //1:24 
                                       //2:32 
                                       //3:

#define CHLEN         0                //()
                                       //0:16 
                                       //1: 32 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1615 -
Ai8051U                : www.STCAI.com              MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

#if (MCKOE == 1)                                   //
       #define I2SDIV FOSC/(16*2*8*SampleRate)     // 16bit 256fs
                                                   // 2*DIV + ODD = I2S  / 256fs
#endif                     FOSC/(16*2*SampleRate)  // DIV >= 2,  >=4.
#if (MCKOE == 0)
                                                   //
       #define I2SDIV                              // 16bit
                                                   // 2*DIV + ODD = I2S  / 32fs
                                                   // DIV >= 2,  >=4.

#endif

Typedef unsigned char u8;                          //

u8 dac_index;
bit B_rise;

void main(void)                                    //XFR
{                                                  //(32 )
                                                   //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                                  //(8 )
                                                   //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                                  // 0 
                                                   // xdata 
       WTST = 0;                                   // 0 

       CKCON = 0;

P0M0 = 0x00; P0M1 = 0x00;
P1M0 = 0x00; P1M1 = 0x00;
P2M0 = 0x00; P2M1 = 0x00;
P3M0 = 0x00; P3M1 = 0x00;
P4M0 = 0x00; P4M1 = 0x00;
P5M0 = 0x00; P5M1 = 0x00;

I2SMD = 0xff;                                      //, FFH

I2SCR = 0x80;                                      //(0x80)
I2SPRH = (MCKOE << 1) + (I2SDIV & 1);              // I2S (I2SMCK),  ODD
I2SPRL = I2SDIV/2;                                 // I2S 

I2SCFGH = I2S_MODE;                                // I2S 

I2SCFGL = (PCMSYNC << 7) + (STD_MODE << 4) + (CKPOL << 3) + (DATLEN << 1) + CHLEN;

P_SW3 = (P_SW3 & 0x3f) | (0<<6);                   //I2S 

                                                   //0: P3.2(BCLK) P3.4(SD) P5.4(MCLK) P3.5(WS)

                                                   //1: P1.5(BCLK) P1.3(SD) P1.6(MCLK) P5.4(WS)

                                                   //2: P2.5(BCLK) P2.3(SD) P5.4(MCLK) P2.2(WS)

I2SCFGH |= I2SEN;                                  //3: P4.3(BCLK) P4.0(SD) P1.6(MCLK) P5.4(WS)
                                                   // I2S 

EA = 1;

dac_index = 0;
B_rise = 1;

       while (1);                                  // 2 
}

void I2S_ISR(void) interrupt 62
{

       u8 i;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1616 -
Ai8051U   : www.STCAI.com                            MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       if (I2SSR & 0x02)                            //
       {                                            //
                                                    //()
              if (I2SSR & 0x04)                     //
              {
                                                    //
                     i = dac_index + 0x80;          //()
                     I2SDRH = i;                    //
                     I2SDRL = 0;
                     if(B_rise)
                     {

                            if(++dac_index == 255)
                                   B_rise = 0;

                     }
                     else
                     {

                            if(--dac_index == 0)
                                   B_rise = 1;

                     }
              }
              else
              {

                     i = dac_index + 0x80;
                     I2SDRH = i;
                     I2SDRL = 0;
              }
       }
}

P4M0 = 0x00; P4M1 = 0x00;
P5M0 = 0x00; P5M1 = 0x00;

I2SMD = 0xff;                                      //, FFH
I2SCR = 0x80;                                      //(0x80)
I2SPRH = (MCKOE << 1) + (I2SDIV & 1);              // I2S (I2SMCK),  ODD

void I2S_ISR(void) interrupt 62
{

       u16 j;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1619 -
Ai8051U   : www.STCAI.com                               MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

       if (I2SSR & 0x02)                                        //
       {                                                        //
                                                                //()
              if (I2SSR & 0x04)                                 //
              {
                                                                //
                     j = T_SINE_R[dac_index] + 32768;           //()
                     I2SDRH = (u8)(j /256);                     //
                     I2SDRL = (u8)(j %256) & 0xfe;
                     dac_index++;
                     dac_index &= 31;
              }
              Else
              {
                     j = T_SINE_L[dac_index] + 32768;
                     I2SDRH = (u8)(j /256);
                     I2SDRL = (u8)(j %256) & 0xfe;
              }
       }
}

// 52MHz

#include "Ai8051U.H"                   //

#include "intrins.h"                   //_nop_(),

//_nop_()

#include <math.h>

float data cfl1=3.9;
float data cfl2=5.1;
float data cfl3;

void main(void)                        //XFR
{                                      //(32 )
                                       //XFR
       EAXFR = 1;                      //(8 )
                                       //
// P_SW2 |= 0x80;                      // 0 
                                       // xdata 
       WTST = 0;                       // 0 

       CKCON = 0;                      //
                                       //
P0M1 = 0;             P0M0 = 0;        //
P1M1 = 0;             P1M0 = 0;        //
P2M1 = 0;             P2M0 = 0;        //
P3M1 = 0;             P3M0 = 0;        //
P4M1 = 0;             P4M0 = 0;        //
P5M1 = 0;             P5M0 = 0;        //
P6M1 = 0;             P6M0 = 0;
P7M1 = 0;             P7M0 = 0;

P10 = 0;
cfl3 = cfl1*cfl2;
cfl3 = cfl1/cfl2-cfl3;
cfl3 = cfl1*cfl2+cfl3;
cfl3 = cfl1/cfl2*sin(cfl3);
cfl3 = cfl1/cfl2*cos(cfl3);
cfl3 = cfl1/cfl2*tan(cfl3);
cfl3 = cfl1/cfl2*sqrt(cfl3);
cfl3 = cfl1/cfl2*atan(cfl3);
P10 = 1;

       while(1);
}

/****************************** MODBUS_CRC (shift) *************** past test 06-11-27 *********
       CRCMODBUS_CRC16(&CRC,8); &CRC 8 

    CRC-16 for MODBUS

    CRC16=X16+X15+X2+1

    TEST: ---> ABCDEFGHIJ CRC16=0x0BEE 1627T

*/

//========================================================================

// : u16 MODBUS_CRC16(u8 *p, u8 n)

// :  CRC16 .

// : *p: .

//         n: .

// : CRC16 .

// : V1.0

//========================================================================

u16 MODBUS_CRC16(u8 *p, u8 n)

{

    u8 i;

    u16 crc16;

    crc16 = 0xffff; // 16  CRC  0xffff 1

    do

    {                                   // 8  16  CRC  CRC 
           crc16 ^= (u16)*p;            //8 
           for(i=0; i<8; i++)

              {                     crc16 =  (crc16 >> 1) ^ 0xA001;  // 0 CRC 
                     if(crc16 & 1)
                                                                                  // 0xA001
() 0                                                                 // 0 CRC 

                     else crc16 >>= 1;
() 0 

        }

        p++;

    }while(--n != 0);

    return (crc16);

}

/********************* modbus  *************************/

/***************************************************************************

:                           CRC16
:          0
:       1 byte         1            23       45        6             7~   2 

                       1 byte           2 byte 2 byte     1byte 2*n byte 2 byte

           addr        0x10             xxxx xxxx         xx             xx....xx xxxx

:                         CRC16

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1785 -
Ai8051U         : www.STCAI.com                            MCU           139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

:       0          1           23              45           67
:    1 byte     1 byte                                           2 byte
                                       2 byte 2 byte               xxxx
      addr       0x10
                                       xxxx xxxx

:()                                      CRC16

:    01                    23          45             67

:    1 byte 1 byte                     2 byte 2 byte      2 byte

     addr       0x03                   xxxx xxxx          xxxx

:()                                      CRC16

:    0       1             2                   3~          2 

: 1 byte        1 byte                 1byte 2*n byte 2 byte

     addr       0x03                   xx             xx....xx xxxx

:()              CRC16

:    0 1  2 

: 1 byte        1 byte                 2 byte

     addr       0x03                   xxxx

***************************************************************************/

u8 MODBUS_RTU(void)

{

   u8 i,j,k;
   u16 reg_addr; //

   u8 reg_len; //

   u16 crc;

   if(RX1_Buffer[1] == 0x10)//

   {                           return 0x91;               //
          if(RX1_cnt < 9)

              if((RX1_Buffer[4] != 0)  || ((RX1_Buffer[5] *2) != RX1_Buffer[6])) return 0x92;  //  

     if((RX1_Buffer[5]==0) || (RX1_Buffer[5] > REG_LENGTH)) return 0x92; //

     reg_addr = ((u16)RX1_Buffer[2] << 8) + RX1_Buffer[3];           //
     reg_len = RX1_Buffer[5]; //

     if((reg_addr+(u16)RX1_Buffer[5]) > (REG_ADDRESS+REG_LENGTH))        return 0x93;          //

     if(reg_addr< REG_ADDRESS)                     return 0x93; //

     if((reg_len*2+7) != RX1_cnt) return 0x91; //

     j = reg_addr - REG_ADDRESS;                   //
     for(k=7, i=0; i<reg_len; i++,j++)
     {

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1786 -
Ai8051U       : www.STCAI.com            MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

        modbus_reg[j] = ((u16)RX1_Buffer[k] << 8) + RX1_Buffer[k+1]; //, 
         k += 2;
  }

  if(RX1_Buffer[0] != 0) //

  {
        for(i=0; i<6; i++) TX1_Buffer[i] = RX1_Buffer[i]; //

     crc = MODBUS_CRC16(TX1_Buffer, 6);
     TX1_Buffer[6] =(u8)(crc>>8); //CRC 

     TX1_Buffer[7] =(u8)crc;  //
     B_TX1_Busy = 1;          //
     TX1_cnt = 0;             //
     TX1_number = 8;          //
     TI = 1;

  }

  }
  else if(RX1_Buffer[1] == 0x03) //

  {
        if(RX1_Buffer[0] != 0) //

  {

     if(RX1_cnt != 6) return 0x91;      //

     if(RX1_Buffer[4] != 0) return 0x92; //

     if((RX1_Buffer[5]==0) || (RX1_Buffer[5] > REG_LENGTH)) return 0x92;  //

     reg_addr = ((u16)RX1_Buffer[2] << 8) + RX1_Buffer[3];  //
     reg_len = RX1_Buffer[5]; //

     if((reg_addr+(u16)RX1_Buffer[5]) > (REG_ADDRESS+REG_LENGTH))  return 0x93;  //

     if(reg_addr< REG_ADDRESS)          return 0x93; //

     j = reg_addr - REG_ADDRESS; //
     TX1_Buffer[0] =SL_ADDR; //
     TX1_Buffer[1] =0x03; //
     TX1_Buffer[2] =reg_len*2; //

     for(k=3, i=0; i<reg_len; i++,j++)

     {

          TX1_Buffer[k++] = (u8)(modbus_reg[j] >> 8);       //

          TX1_Buffer[k++] = (u8)modbus_reg[j];

     }

     crc = MODBUS_CRC16(TX1_Buffer, k);
     TX1_Buffer[k++] = (u8)(crc>>8); //CRC 

     TX1_Buffer[k++]  = (u8)crc;
                            //
     B_TX1_Busy = 1;        //

     TX1_cnt  = 0;

     TX1_number = k;          //

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1787 -
Ai8051U                   : www.STCAI.com   MCU   139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

                 TI = 1;                      //
          }               //
   }
   else return 0x90;

      return 0; //
}

//========================================================================
// :u8 Timer0_Config(u8 t, u32 reload)

// : timer0 .

// :   t: , 0 , (us).
//    reload: .

// : 0: , 1: , .

// : V1.0

//========================================================================
u8 Timer0_Config(u8 t, u32 reload) //t=0: reload , t=1: reload ( us)

{
      TR0 = 0; //

       if(t != 0) reload = (u32)(((float)MAIN_Fosc * (float)reload)/1000000UL);  //(us),     
.

      if(reload >= (65536UL * 12)) return 1; //, 
       if(reload < 65536UL) AUXR |= 0x80; //1T mode
       else
       {

              AUXR &= ~0x80; //12T mode
              reload = reload / 12;
       }
       reload = 65536UL - reload;
       TH0 = (u8)(reload >> 8);
       TL0 = (u8)(reload);

   ET0 = 1; //

   TMOD &= 0xf0;

      TMOD |= 0; //,          0: 16 , 1: 16 /, 2: 8 , 3: 16 ,                    

   TR0 = 1;               //

   return 0;

}

//========================================================================
// : void timer0_ISR (void) interrupt TIMER0_VECTOR
// : timer0 .
// : none.

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1788 -
Ai8051U     : www.STCAI.com   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

// : none.
// : V1.0
//========================================================================
void timer0_ISR (void) interrupt 1
{

       if(RX1_TimeOut != 0)
       {

             if(--RX1_TimeOut == 0) //
              {

                    if(RX1_cnt != 0) //
                     {

                          B_RX1_OK = 1; //
                     }
              }
       }
}

//========================================================================
// : SetTimer2Baudraye(u16 dat)
// :  Timer2 
// : dat: Timer2 .
// : none.
// : VER1.0
// :
//========================================================================
void SetTimer2Baudraye(u16 dat) // , 2:  Timer2 , :  Timer1 .
{

       AUXR &= ~(1<<4); //Timer stop
       AUXR &= ~(1<<3); //Timer2 set As Timer
       AUXR |= (1<<2); //Timer2 set as 1T mode
       T2H = (u8)(dat >> 8);
       T2L = (u8)dat;
      IE2 &= ~(1<<2); //
       AUXR |= (1<<4); //Timer run enable
}

//========================================================================

// : void UART1_config(u32 brt, u8 timer, u8 io)

// : UART1 

// : brt: .

//  timer: ,timer=2:  2, :  Timer1 .

//          io:  1  IO, io=0:  1  P3.0 P3.1, =1:  P3.6 P3.7, =2:   

P1.6 P1.7, =3:  P4.3 P4.4.

// : none.

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1789 -
Ai8051U              : www.STCAI.com                  MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

// : VER1.0
