//========================================================================
void UART1_config(u32 brt, u8 timer, u8 io) // brt:, timer=2:         2,    :  
Timer1 . io=0:  1  P3.0 P3.1, =1:  P3.6 P3.7, =2:  P1.6 P1.7, =3:    P4.3

   P4.4.

{

   brt = 65536UL - (MAIN_Fosc / 4)           / brt;
   if(timer == 2) // 2

   {

          AUXR |= 0x01; //S1 BRT Use Timer2;

          SetTimer2Baudraye((u16)brt);

   }

   else         // 1

   {

          TR1 = 0;

          AUXR &= ~0x01;         //S1 BRT Use Timer1;

          AUXR |= (1<<6); //Timer1 set as 1T mode

          TMOD &= ~(1<<6); //Timer1 set As Timer

          TMOD &= ~0x30;         //Timer1_16bitAutoReload;

          TH1 = (u8)(brt >> 8);

          TL1 = (u8)brt;         //  Timer1 
          ET1 = 0;

          TR1 = 1;               //  Timer1

   }
   P_SW1 &= ~0xc0; // P3.0 P3.1

   if(io == 1)

   {
         P_SW1 |= 0x40; // P3.6 P3.7

          P3M1 &= ~0xc0;

          P3M0 &= ~0xc0;

   }

   else if(io == 2)

   {
         P_SW1 |= 0x80; // P1.6 P1.7

          P1M1 &= ~0xc0;

          P1M0 &= ~0xc0;

   }

   else if(io == 3)

   {
         P_SW1 |= 0xc0; // P4.3 P4.4

          P4M1 &= ~0x18;

          P4M0 &= ~0x18;

   }

   else

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1790 -
Ai8051U   : www.STCAI.com               MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

{
       P3M1 &= ~0x03;
       P3M0 &= ~0x03;

}

       SCON = (SCON & 0x3f) | (1<<6);  // 8 ,  1 , 1 , 
// PS = 1; //

      ES = 1; //
      REN = 1; //

}

// :  1

// :
//========================================================================
void UART1_ISR (void) interrupt 4
{

       if(RI)
       {

              RI = 0;
             if(!B_RX1_OK) //
              {

                     if(RX1_cnt >= RX1_Length) RX1_cnt = 0;
                     RX1_Buffer[RX1_cnt++] = SBUF;
                    RX1_TimeOut = 36; //, 35 
              }
       }

       if(TI)
       {

              TI = 0;
             if(TX1_number != 0) //
              {

                     SBUF = TX1_Buffer[TX1_cnt++];
                     TX1_number--;
              }
              else B_TX1_Busy = 0;
       }
}

       IAP_ADDRL = 0x02;

       SCON = 0x52;

       TL1 = BAUD;
       TR1 = 1;

      printf("%c \n", 'A' + id);

       while (1);
}

BYTE usb_read_reg (BYTE addr)                           //
{                                                       //     USB          
                                                        //
      BYTE dat;
      while (USBADR & 0x80);                                         // USB 
      USBADR = addr | 0x80;
USBADR 
      while (USBADR & 0x80);
      dat = USBDAT;
      return dat;
}

      2. USB 

       USBADR  1 1  USBDAT USB 
 USB  0x7f  USBADR 
 USB  USBDAT  USB 
 15-2 

                   15-2  USB  C 

/********************************** USB **********************************/

void usb_write_reg(BYTE addrBYTE dat)

{

   while (USBADR & 0x80);              //

   USBADR = addr & 0x7f;               // USBDAT 

   USBDAT = dat;                       // USBDAT 

}

 /************************************* FIFO*********************************/
 BYTE usb_read_fifo(BYTE fifo, BYTE *pdat)
 {

       BYTE cnt;
       BYTE ret;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1837 -
Ai8051U             : www.STCAI.com         MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      ret = cnt = usb_read_reg(COUNT0);    // 0  OUT 
                                                                   // 0 
      while (cnt--)
      {

            *pdat++ = usb_read_reg(fifo);
      }
      return ret;
(:)
}

   2. FFO ( IN)

       FIFO 
 15-4 

                               15-4  FIFO  C 

/************************************* FIFO************************************/
void usb_write_fifo(BYTE fifo, BYTE *pdat, BYTE cnt)
{

      while(cnt--)
      {

            usb_write_reg(fifo, *pdat++);
      }
}

3.USB

 IN  FIFO
 FIFO  0  EP0_SIZE 
 0  15-5 

                     15-5 USB  IN  C 

/************************************USB  IN ************************************/

void usb_ctrl_in()

{

   BYTE csr;                  // 8  csr 

   BYTE cnt;                  // 8  cnt 

   usb_write_reg(INDEX,0);    //INDEX  0

   csr = usb_read_reg(CSR0);  //csr  CSR0 

   if (csr & IPRDY) return;   // IN  FIFO

   cnt = EpOstate.wSize > EPO_SIZE ? EPO_SIZE : EpOstate.wSize;

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1838 -
Ai8051U       : www.STCAI.com                   MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

   usb_write_fifo(FIFO0,Ep0State.pData, cnt);

                                      // Ep0State  pDATA  FIFO

   EpOState.wSize -= cnt;             //wsize  cnt 

   Ep0State.pData += cnt;             //pdata  cnt 

   If (Ep0State.wSize == 0)           // 0

   {

         usb_write_reg(CSRO,IPRDY | IDATEND);

                                      // 1IPRDY  DATEND  0 ()

         EpOState.bState = EPSTATE_IDLE;

                                      // 0  IDLE 

   }

   else

   {

         usb_write_reg(CSRO,IPRDY);

         // 0  1IPRDY 0  FIFO()

   }

}

      2. 0UT 

       INDEX  0 CSRO  CSR  OPRDY  0
 0UT  FIFO 
 0  EPO_SIZE  0 
 15-6 

                      15-6 USB  OUT  C 

/*************************************USB  OUT ***********************************/

void usb_ctrl_out()

{

   BYTE csr;                                   // 8  csr 

   BYTE cnt;                                   // 8  cnt 

   usb_write_reg(INDEX,0);                     //INDEX  0

   csr = usb_read_reg(CSR0);                   //csr  CSR0 

   if (!(csr & OPRDY)) return;                 // Out 

   cnt = usb_read_fifo(FIFO0Ep0State.pData); //cnt=FIFO 

   Ep0State.wSize -= cnt;                      //wsize  cnt 

   Ep0State.pData += cnt;                      //pdata  cnt 

   If (Ep0State.wSize == 0)                    //

      {

         usb_write_reg(CSRO, SOPRDY | DATEND); // OPRDY

         Ep0State.bState = EPSTATE_IDLE;       // 0  IDLE 

      }

   else

      {

         usb_write_reg(CSR0, SOPRDY)

         // 0  OPRDY 0UT ()

/****************************************USB *************************************/

void usb_init()

{

   USBCLK = 0X00

   USBCON = 0x90;

   usb_write_reg(FADDR, 0x00);

   // UADDR  USB FADDR  7  USB 

   usb_write_reg(POWER, 0x09);      // USB 

   usb_write_reg(INTRIN1E, 0x3f);   // IN 

   usb_write_reg(INTROUT1E, 0x3f);  // OUT 

   usb_write_reg(INTRUSBE, 0x07);

   // USB  USB  USB 

   usb_write_reg(POWER, 0x01);

   //USB 

   DeviceState = DEVSTATE_DEFAULT;  //

   Ep0State.bState = EPSTATE_IDLE;  // 0  IDLE 

   InEpstate = 0x00;                // IN 

   OutEpState = 0x00;               // 0UT

/*************************************USB /**********************************/

void usb_isr() interrupt USB_VECTOR        //USB 

{

   BYTE intrusb;                           //usb 

   BYTE intrin;                            //in 

   BYTE introut;                           //out 

   BYTE adrTemp;                           //

   adrTemp = USBADR;

   //USBADR  USBADR  USBADR 

   intrusb = usb_read_reg(INTRUSB);        //usb =USB 

   intrin = usb_read_reg(INTRIN1);         //USB  IN 

   introut = usb_read_reg(INTROUT1);       //USB  OUT 

   if (intrusb & RSUIF) usb_resume();      // USB ()
   if (intrusb & RSTIF) usb_reset();       // USB 

   if (intrin & EPOIF) usb_setup();        // 0  IN/OUT USB  setup 

#ifdef EN_EP1IN                            // 1  IN 
      If (intrin & EP1INIF) usb_in_ep1();

#endif

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1841 -
Ai8051U           : www.STCAI.com              MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

#ifdef EN_EP1OUT                              // IN  1IN 
      if (introut & EP1OUTIF) usb_out_ep1();  // 1  OUT 

#endif

      If (intrusb & SUSIF) usb_suspend();     // OUT  1OUT 
      USBADR = adrTemp;                       //USBADR 
}

                      15-9 USB  SETUP  C 

/**************************************USB  SETUP *********************************/

void usb_setup()

{

   BYTE csr;                                  //csr 

   usb_write_reg(INDEX,0);                    // 0

   csr = usb_read_reg(CSR0);                  // USB  0 

   if (csr & STSTL)                           // STALL 

   {

      usb_write_reg(CSR0, csr & SDSTL);       //SDSTL 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1842 -
Ai8051U            : www.STCAI.com          MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      Ep0State.bState = EPSTATE_IDLE;      // 0  IDLE 

   }

   if (csr & SUEND)                        // SETUP 

   {

      usb_write_reg(CSR0, csr & ~SSUEND);  // SSUEND

   }

   switch (Ep0State.bState)                // 0 

   {

   case EPSTATE_IDLE                       //IDLE 

      if (csr & OPRDY)                     // OUT 

      {

           usb_read_fifo(FIFO0, (BYTE * ) & Setup); // FIFO0  Setup 

           Setup.wLength = reverse2(Setup.wLength); //wlength  8  8 

           switch (Setup.bmRequestType & REQUEST_MASK)

                                           // setup 

      {

      case STANDARD_REQUEST                //(usb )

           usb_req_std();

           break;

      case CLASS_REQUEST                   //(hid )

           usb_req_class();

           break;

      case VENDOR_REQUEST                  //

           usb_req_vendor();               //

           break;

      default                              //

      usb_setup_stall();                   //

      return;

      }

   }

   break;

   case EPSTATE_DATAIN                     //

      usb_ctrl_in();

      break;

   case EPSTATE_DATAOUT                    //

      usb_ctrl_out();

      break;

   }

}

#define GET_STATUS   0x00

#define CLEAR_FEATURE 0x01

#define SET_FEATURE  0x03

#define SET_ADDRESS  0x05

#define GET_DESCRIPTOR 0x06

#define SET_DESCRIPTOR 0x07

#define GET_COFIGURATION 0x08

#define GET_COFIGURATION 0x09

#define GET_INTERFACE 0x0A

#define SET_INTERFACE 0x0B

#define SYNCH_FRAME  0x0C

void usb_req_std()

{

   switch(Setup.bRequest)             // SETUP 

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1845 -
Ai8051U        : www.STCAI.com         MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

      {                                //
      case GET_STATUS;                 //
                                       //
            usb_get_status();          //
            break;                     //
      case CLEAR_FEATURE;              //
            usb_clear_feature();       //
            break;                     //
      case SET_FEATURE                 //
            usb_set_feature();         //
            break;                     //
      case SET_ADDRESS
            usb_set_address();        //
            break;
      case GET_DESCRIPTOR
            usb_get_descriptor();
            break;
      case SET_DESCRIPTOR;
            usb_set_descriptor();
            break;
      case GET_COFIGURATION
            usb_get_configuration();
            break;
      case SET_CONFIGURATION
            usb_set_configuration();
            break;
      case GET_INTERFACE
            usb_get_interface();
            break;
      case SET_INTERFACE
            usb_set_interface();
            break;
      case SYNCH_FRAME
            usb_synch_frame();
            break;
      default:
            usb_setup_stall();
            return;
     }
}

       /**************************USB  1IN **************************/
       void usb_in_ep1()
       {

             BYTE csr;
             usb_write_reg(INDEX1);
             csr = usb_read_reg(INCSR1);
             if (csr & INSTSTL)
             {

 : 0513-55012928 / 55012929 / 89896509 :www.STCAIMCU.com - 1882 -
Ai8051U   : www.STCAI.com       MCU  139-2282-9991 : 139-2280-5190

            usb_write_reg(INCSR1,INCLRDT);
      }
      if (csr & INUNDRUN)
      {

            usb_write_reg(INCSR1,0);
      }
      UsbInBusy = 0
}

/************************USB  10UT ************************/
void usb_out_ep1()
{

      BYTE csr

   usb_write_reg(INDEX,1);

   esr-usb_read_reg(0UTCSRl);

   if (csr & OUTSTSTL)

   {

      usb_write_reg(OUTCSR1,OUTCLRDT);

   }

   if (csr & OUTOPRDY)

   {

      usb_class_out()          // class_out()

   }

}

void Timer0_Init(void)
{                       //
                        // 12T 
      TM0PS = 0x65;     //
      AUXR &= 0x7F;     //
      TMOD &= 0xF0;     //
      TL0 = 0xB1;       // TF0 
      TH0 = 0x00;       // 0 
      TF0 = 0;          // 0 
      TR0 = 1;
      ET0 = 1;
}

                        = (65536 - 177) * 12 * (101 + 1) / 40000000
                        = 1.9999854 ()
